| Peter,

I just wanted to reach out before our mid-month deadline tonight. We’re getting ready for our critically important FEC end-of-quarter deadline at the end of the month, so meeting tonight’s goal will help us stay on track.

Republicans are preparing to spend heavily across the country next year to hold onto their slim majority in the House. If we want to protect our Senate majority and take back the House, we need to build a strong foundation now to ensure we’re ready for anything.

Not only is this our last chance to fundraise before the FEC quarterly deadline, but my first Republican opponent officially launched her campaign against me. **[It’s for these reasons that we need to hit our mid-month goal. I’ve set the bar at $12,000, but I know we can go beyond that. Look, I know raising $12,000 in three days may seem like a heavy lift.
But I’ve seen the full power of our campaign in action, so trust me when I say that I know we can get it done. _It certainly wasn’t good luck that helped us win the last election!_
And the truth is, we have no choice but to reach this goal. Falling short would mean veering off course from our fundraising projections for the rest of March – a position we cannot afford to be in with the FEC deadline looming.
Republicans are hoping that we have a slip-up in our fundraising so that they can swoop in and steal this seat. **I’m going to fight like hell to ensure that doesn’t happen, but I can’t do this without your help.**
[**Can you chip in $25 or more to help me reach my mid-month goal before the deadline? Not only is this our last chance to fundraise before the FEC quarterly deadline, but my first Republican opponent officially launched her campaign against me. = | | | = Look, I know raising $12,000 in three days may seem like a heavy lift. But I’ve seen the full power of our campaign in action, so trust me when I say that I know we can get it done. It certainly wasn’t good luck that helped us win the last election! And the truth is, we have no choice but to reach this goal. Falling short would mean veering off course from our fundraising projections for the rest of March – a position we cannot afford to be in with the FEC deadline looming. Republicans are hoping that we have a slip-up in our fundraising so that they can swoop in and steal this seat. name: Adam Schiff
subject: Today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1953%2E5257348%2EAhz6cU ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Today, you can do something special. You can make your first contribution
to my campaign for U.S. Senate (and all I’m asking for is $3 — yes,
seriously). Here’s why your early support makes a huge difference:

Running a Senate campaign is not easy — especially in the largest state in
the nation. It’s going to take a massive number of resources to hold
events all over California, build a strong campaign team and volunteer
network, scale up our organizing efforts, print campaign literature,
invest in our digital program (👋), and ultimately, get our message out to
voters all over the state.

And while we’re focused on that, extremist Republicans are going to be
attacking me non-stop — they’re already doing it on Fox News nearly every
day. They’re going to do whatever it takes to keep me out of the Senate,
and they’re banking on us not having the resources to respond to the
constant smears and lies. We need to prove them wrong.

With your help, I’m confident we will. We’re running this campaign without
taking a dime of corporate PAC money, and the response so far has been
amazing.

If we’re going to make the major changes our country needs to protect
voting rights, tackle the climate crisis, safeguard our democracy, and
more, then we can’t afford to slow down anytime soon.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dt2mVY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_ND_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1953%2E5257348%2EAhz6cU ]So with that in mind, I’m asking: Will you make your first $3
contribution to my campaign before tonight’s mid-month deadline to help
fuel this fight?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=mar2023_abs_em.DC74Jc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MMG_ND_20230315_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1953%2E5257348%2EAhz6cU ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: You can be sure about this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I want to take a moment to give you a behind-the-scenes look at how campaigns like ours operate.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=52%2E35263%2EZMA7qg)
Peter, I want to take a moment to give you a behind-the-scenes look at how campaigns like ours operate. Every three months, my team and I have to submit a report to the Federal Election Commission. Everyone will see these numbers — reporters, election experts, supporters like you, and yes, Wisconsin Republicans. That means having a strong report is crucial. If our numbers look weak, then you can be sure Republicans and shady special interest groups will pull out all the stops attacking me, so I’m really counting on this grassroots team to help send a powerful message and keep those outside forces at bay. So to ensure we’ve got the strongest possible FEC report at the end of this month, my team and I set smaller goals and deadlines along the way. The last of those slightly smaller — _but no less important!_ — deadlines expires at midnight tonight, which is why I’m reaching out. [**I have to ask: Will you pitch in now to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal and begin the sprint to our end-of-quarter deadline on the strongest possible footing?**](http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1860?t=4&akid=52%2E35263%2EZMA7qg) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $3 NOW](http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1861?t=5&akid=52%2E35263%2EZMA7qg)

name: Don Huffines
subject: Senate Property Tax "Relief" Falls Short
body:
Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O; property taxes.
No images? [Click here](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-e-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-p/) [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** Press Manager
Contact: [Press@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:Press@HuffinesLiberty.com)
## **Senate Property Tax "Relief" Falls Short**
## _" Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O property taxes."_
DALLAS, TX, March 15, 2023 -- Texas has received an unprecedented amount of your money this year. Taxpayers have overfunded the government by $62 billion. This massive surplus should be returned to Texans by eliminating the school property tax.There is no reason the state shouldn't put the M&O tax on a definitive path to zero, then phase out all property taxes. If not now, when? This is _your_ money.Our latest _Huff_ _ines Liberty Brief_ analyzes SB 3, SB 4, and SB 5 and will be used as written testimony before the Senate Finance Committee.At the core, our bill analysis found that SB 3 only treats the symptoms of our broken property tax system while failing to address the underlying disease: incessant growth in local government and school district spending.

Another problem with SB 3 is that homestead and business exemptions, like appraisal caps, cause rates to rise in order to maintain increased revenue from properties with lower taxable valuations.Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O property taxes. [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-y/) [Read Full Analysis](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-j/) Huffines Liberty Foundation President, former State Senator Don Huffines, issued the following statement:_" To put it bluntly, property taxes are immoral. Any policy that keeps Texans from owning their own home, while at the same time forcing renters and businesses to carry a burden from which they get no relief, should not pass. It should not even be considered. I spend my time and treasure advocating for broad property tax relief where every citizen is a winner and treated equally. Texans have options, let's explore them."_Huffines further added:_" Texas tax problems are largely self-inflicted. That's the bad news. The good news, however, is the fixes needed are uncomplicated. This bill analysis charts the way forward through five easy steps:__1) Limit state spending growth
2) Freeze school M&O property taxes
3) Use state budget surpluses to buydown M&O property taxes
4) Require voter approval for local governments and special districts to exceed the no-__new-revenue tax rate
5) Enshrine property tax relief in the Texas Constitution_ _Following this path, the Texas Legislature could cut property taxes almost in half in eight years, or less. "_ [Read Full Analysis](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-t/) The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of **liberty** , **prosperity** , and **virtue** in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.### [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-h/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-k/)[](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-u/) [Donate](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-o/) | [](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-b/) | [ Share ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-fb-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-x/) | [ Tweet ](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-tw-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-f/) | [ Forward ](https://huffineslibertyfoundation.forwardtomyfriend.com/t-yuddtktydi-17329976-fhiiudt-l-z)
---|---|---
[www.HuffinesLiberty.com](https://news.huffinesliberty.com/t/t-l-fhiiudt-yuddtktydi-n/)[info@HuffinesLiberty.com](mailto:info@huffinesliberty.com)
(214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible.
By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. This massive surplus should be returned to Texans by eliminating the school property tax.There is no reason the state shouldn't put the M&O tax on a definitive path to zero, then phase out all property taxes. If not now, when? This is your money.Our latest Huff ines Liberty Brief analyzes SB 3, SB 4, and SB 5 and will be used as written testimony before the Senate Finance Committee.At the core, our bill analysis found that SB 3 only treats the symptoms of our broken property tax system while failing to address the underlying disease: incessant growth in local government and school district spending. Another problem with SB 3 is that homestead and business exemptions, like appraisal caps, cause rates to rise in order to maintain increased revenue from properties with lower taxable valuations.Texans deserve definitive action that permanently locks in property tax relief and puts Texas on the path to eliminate school M&O property taxes. Huffines Liberty Foundation President, former State Senator Don Huffines, issued the following statement:" To put it bluntly, property taxes are immoral. Any policy that keeps Texans from owning their own home, while at the same time forcing renters and businesses to carry a burden from which they get no relief, should not pass. It should not even be considered. I spend my time and treasure advocating for broad property tax relief where every citizen is a winner and treated equally. Texans have options, let's explore them."Huffines further added:" Texas tax problems are largely self-inflicted. That's the bad news. The good news, however, is the fixes needed are uncomplicated. This bill analysis charts the way forward through five easy steps:1) Limit state spending growth 2) Freeze school M&O property taxes 3) Use state budget surpluses to buydown M&O property taxes 4) Require voter approval for local governments and special districts to exceed the no-new-revenue tax rate 5) Enshrine property tax relief in the Texas Constitution Following this path, the Texas Legislature could cut property taxes almost in half in eight years, or less. " The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) non-profit, non-partisan research institute. Our mission is to advance the cause of liberty , prosperity , and virtue in the State of Texas by educating and equipping citizens so they may hold their elected officials accountable and better informed to tackle the toughest challenges.### | | | | ---|---|--- (214) 526-3000 The Huffines Liberty Foundation is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization. Contributions are tax-deductible. By completing forms on this website, you agree to receive marketing and communications from the Huffines Liberty Foundation. |

name: American Defense News
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2s62430fnll5qu5862i0iipbdvl3psis74lltf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjhm0o72cth2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh8svhi2sovhqi0tlg4g2t0qniaqlsoggva4ct4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjhm0o72cth2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhspjj2keaq46ihm1bqsbrf7pm91i0fmqi2m78ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjhm0o72cth2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl0nfd14jb03p826rhkt8dbsm51d66irm6l40q1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjhm0o72cth2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Defense News
---

The IRS is trying to close the tax loophole that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market crashes and recessions. **[Learn More](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2keajcnqgu4nmen10u87i8mvt29qj81pbehe5f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjhm0o73chh2bs)**
# **
The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1h5phsuvfmu2itn2vqsdrvfa0ltvleqktfep86o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjhm0o73chh2bs).

Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a["Financial Rat-Lab"](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsd1lebmjo8rvrie0kvqqcvpsr29nlhq9lkjaq5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjhm0o73chh2bs). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **
Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za1gk9n7orjj6hjjf4e9u87fnormad2int69cgng_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjhm0o73chh2bs)
There has never been a more urgent time to understand the role of gold and how to own it. Taking control back of both your privacy and your retirement wealth are key. Investing in gold and silver can help you sit back and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with protecting your retirement.
The time on missing on great opportunities is over. **[Act today!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2h6ro4hs1b3s1hsvsd5dsulor3bh8fbkukhkas0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjhm0o73chh2bs)** Explore, 100% free, how gold inside your retirement can significantly improve your future wealth.

The IRS is trying to close the tax loophole that can safeguard your IRA or 401k from market crashes and recessions. **[Learn More](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652256%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yED8EgfcGCqWdlIl012cYg&sysid=1)**
* * *
# **
The Feds's Digital Dollar Is Here!**
**It is official.** The digital dollar, once talked about, is here. Reuters reported that on Tuesday November 15th, 2022, a statement from the Fed's of New York, announcing that Global Banking Giants and the New York Fed are testing the digital dollar in a 12-week pilots.
Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo are among the financial companies participating in the experiment. According to New York Fed, the project, which is called the regulated liability network, will use simulated data.
How will that affect you and your finances? Well, go figure. You will no longer have any privacy whatsoever. Your hard-earned savings will be "worth-less". Surely the dollar will continue to devalue resulting in heavily diminishing your purchasing power. [Learn more](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652257%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cGFmKYsvJPwN44FS%2bwWXKg&sysid=1).
**Our government will know what you have, where you have it, and how you are spending it.** This is the ultimate control that they are after. It limits and blocks the way [you spend your money](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652258%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q7oBJ4RVyPnKYu2pN1nJPw&sysid=1) unless obtaining their approval at first.
Therefore, your money is no longer safe! Prepare for the worst. Your dollar could be worth a fraction of what it is worth today.
**They are all in cahoots. Americans can't afford for their wealth to be tested on. We are not in a[ "Financial Rat-Lab"](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652259%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DvyaW7KXXOSTcp%2bm%2b84rUQ&sysid=1). Enough is Enough, we have suffered greatly. **
Time is no longer on your side, and you can't afford to gamble anymore with your money. The reset is real, and the project to replace the "king of currencies" is underway.
You shouldn't have to work as hard to protect your retirement nest egg as you did to earn it.
Whether you love or hate gold and silver, there is no way to hate what the asset itself can offer you. In the past, gold was viewed as a safe haven. Today, it is role has completely expanded. It offers you privacy, insurance, preservation of wealth, hedge against inflation and potential profit making. [Get more information.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652250%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=81Ne6kGGhdz2ji6DoOZZcw&sysid=1)
There has never been a more urgent time to understand the role of gold and how to own it. Taking control back of both your privacy and your retirement wealth are key. Investing in gold and silver can help you sit back and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with protecting your retirement.
The time on missing on great opportunities is over. **[Act today!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652251%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CSGLXamzu9%2fgXAK5qJxsAw&sysid=1)** Explore, 100% free, how gold inside your retirement can significantly improve your future wealth.
Call**(844) 790-9191** or simply [click here](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652252%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WZbr2h6ZOVJ6GZC15tMIog&sysid=1) to receive all the essential information tailored specifically to your needs. name: Your America
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01781%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nV%2b4W749DYfeN1g3qshVzA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01782%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FcwJOsi3ZpMpWvhykVv7eg&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01783%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VMIpw2%2bg9UzkW4%2fnBvJyXA&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

---

Your America News

body:
Well, there’s no easy way to put this -- but Tuesday’s rehearing of Harper v. Hall signified what’s really at stake for our democracy and the future of fair maps

Team -- Did you see our message from earlier this week?
Well, there’s no easy way to put this -- but Tuesday’s rehearing of _Harper v. Hall_ signified what’s really at stake for our democracy and the future of fair maps. We are reviewing everything from the rehearing. If the NC Supreme Court overturns their earlier decision, it will send a clear message to North Carolina voters that extreme lawmakers can get away with ignoring the growth and influence of communities of interest by gerrymandering maps for their partisan power.
**[Help us prepare for the decision that could shake up our democracy and rush a rapid response contribution of $5 right now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60254508/396530799/-1533261029?amount=5&refcode=20230316_AOTL_F_NCRR2Forward_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjczOGYzNjE0LWYyYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hjm1USanWJLg2M7BM6EsK705_dFhKtxXfzUVSK2uYKk=)**
\-- Emuni Sanderson
Mobilization Strategist
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: NC Supreme Court Alert [AOTL]
Date: Tues, Mar 14, 2023
Subject: It will irreparably damage the legitimacy and reputation of NC's highest court...
> * * *
> _**“Let me be very clear: neither the map nor the law has changed, only the composition of the Court. It is my hope that the Court applies the law without bias or political agenda and puts a halt to Republican attempts to undermine free elections through egregious gerrymandering.”**
> \-- A.G. Holder_
> Friend,
>
> Today, the North Carolina Supreme Court heard oral arguments as it reconsiders its most recent decision in _Harper v. Hall_ , a landmark state redistricting case. Experts predict extreme ramifications ahead of the 2024 elections if the decision is overturned.
> _“It will irreparably damage the legitimacy and reputation of NC's highest court.”_
> _\-- WRAL News_

body:
The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.

|
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Do You think Biden is a Crook?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Team Biden is clearly not prioritizing the needs of the American people. It makes me wonder why.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440505:63HkzMGMN:m:1:3331421248:ABFDA7C0735D51306A4C18221409DD29:r "Logo") Peter: Over the last decade, the Biden family has quickly become one of America's most influential and wealthiest. They don't claim to have a traditional "business" selling goods or products, yet they have money and power. They obtained it by selling access to our government and its secrets for their influence peddling schemes on Joe Biden's coattails and I intend to expose it all through my work in Congress. Why else would they be receiving millions from around the world with Joe's brothers reaping profits along with Hunter? Why are these men the first call by so many foreign businesses and countries seeking favor from the U.S. Government? **[We can't waste a single moment getting to the truth! Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY and help ensure the Biden White House and their lawyers can't impede our investigation.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440505:63HkzMGMN:m:1:3331421248:ABFDA7C0735D51306A4C18221409DD29:r "We can’t waste a single moment getting to the truth! Donate
$50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY and help ensure the Biden White House and their lawyers can’t impede our investigation.")** China didn't even hesitate to send spy balloons to fly all over the country to test our military readiness. Why? Because they know Joe Biden is weak and he won't do a thing to jeopardize his "friendship" with them. **Or is it a business relationship?** Americans deserve to know if they are safe and why their President isn't sharing information about this threat. Americans deserve to know if their President is a crook. **[Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY and help me get you the answers about why China Joe has a stronger allegiance to the Chinese Government than he does to U.S. Citizens!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440505:63HkzMGMN:m:1:3331421248:ABFDA7C0735D51306A4C18221409DD29:r "Donate $50, $100 or even $1,000 TODAY and help me get you the
answers about why China Joe has a stronger allegiance to the Chinese Government than he does to U.S. Citizens!")** We have a long way to go to fully expose all the corruption surrounding the Biden Family's business affairs. You, me and EVERY American deserves to know the truth. **Americans are witnessing their government fail them time and time again. It 's despicable and we need to stop it.** It took Biden over a week to FINALLY order the Chinese object in the sky that was spying on us to be shot down, and even after three more were shot down, he's refused to provide answers. He's doing the same thing with the train that derailed carrying hazardous chemicals in East Palestine, Ohio. When Americans lives are in harm's way, Joe isn't a man of the people he professed to be. As usual, China Joe and his team are turning a blind eye to the threats his friends in China are levying, blaming President Trump, and even Kamala Harris told the media that we should avoid "conflict or confrontation" with China. **Team Biden is clearly not prioritizing the needs of the American people. It makes me wonder why.** **[Will you help me uncover how the Biden Family became one of the most influential families in country for over the last decade?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440505:63HkzMGMN:m:1:3331421248:ABFDA7C0735D51306A4C18221409DD29:r "Will you help me uncover how the Biden Family became one of the
most influential families in country for over the last decade?")** There may not be aliens flying overhead, but clearly something strange is brewing and until China Joe admits he's covering things up for his friends in China, I'm going to keep digging until we have everything we need to impeach him. Americans should not have to live in fear or without transparency from our government. **We need a leader who will exemplify strength, put the American people first, secure our borders, and let bad actors like China, Iran and Russia know, you can 't mess with the U.S.** **[If you agree, then join my efforts to expose the truth and hold China Joe accountable.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440505:63HkzMGMN:m:1:3331421248:ABFDA7C0735D51306A4C18221409DD29:r "If you agree, then join my efforts to expose the truth and hold
China Joe accountable.")** The more Joe stays silent, the more I believe he's guilty. For the truth, Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Trump vs. DeSantis
body:
Trump vs. DeSantis It was almost exactly a year ago, I was having dinner with my friend Roger Stone at Andolini's Pizza in Owasso, OK that he told me
| | |
---
## Trump vs. DeSantis
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18762749.10985.1.f6d730e2259ccdd4faab181e988c851e)
---
It was almost exactly a year ago, I was having dinner with my friend **Roger Stone** at Andolini's Pizza in Owasso, OK that he told me something **VERY disturbing**...
**Mr. Stone** informed me that Florida Govenor **Ron DeSantis** was going to challenge President **Donald Trump** in 2024.
I had a hard time believing it because it made _no sense_ as to why **DeSantis** would do such a low-character thing given the fact that without **President Trump** dragging **DeSantis** across the finish line in the FL Gubernatorial race there would be no **Govenor DeSantis**.
**Mr. Stone** made it very clear to me that _Ivy League Frat Boy_ (Skull & Bones) had no loyalty in his character make up and was in fact a pawn of the Globalist RINO Elites.
At the time when Roger shared this information with me it really made no sense, _but it does now_.
As the founder of [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18762749.10986.1.13bb351e54f86a5f6e69929a63b20a83), I am unapologetically behind **President Trump** for 2024.
**Why not DeSantis?**
-RINO's like Paul Ryan, Karl Rove and Jeb Bush love DeSantis and despise Trump.
-DeSantis said he is glad the J6 political prisoners are locked up.
-DeSantis shutdown Florida even though he claims he did not.
-DeSantis "war" on Disney has proven to be all bark and no bite.
-DeSantis has been a strong supporter of the war in Ukraine.
-DeSantis is NOT Trump 2.0 even though he tries to mimic his hand gestures but DeSantis is actually Bush 3.0
**Why President Donald Trump?**
-The godless Globalists despise Trump for a reason.
-Trump has said he will pardon the J6 political prisoners.
-Trump is the Peace candidate and has a track record of no new wars under his watch.
-No President has moved the needle for the Christian agenda like Donald Trump.
-Trump is thoroughly America First.
-4 years of tremdous accomplishments in the White House despite not only taking on the Left and the Media but the RINO's as well.
America needs a President that represents the interest of the American people FIRST not the interest of the godless Globalists.
Donald Trump is hated by the Globalists while DeSantis (the Ivy League Frat Boy) is loved the by the Globalists. That should make the decision quite easy.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

name: Kyle Parrish for Congress
subject: You heard it here first!!
body:
Let's turn the 5th Blue in '24! Greetings!! The world is moving fast and we can’t wait, so I am sending this email to formally announce my candidacy
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/447264?id=13.26.1.d3615f309a5c3463e0c6e03219f183db)
---
[](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/447264?id=13.27.1.179a570cbf92c87bf37093d7c6008833) |
---
## Let's turn the 5th Blue in '24!
---
Greetings!! The world is moving fast and we can’t wait, so **I am sending this email to formally announce my candidacy for Congress in 2024!** I am eager to get to work and prove that we, as Democrats, can best represent needs of everyone across the 5th. I am even more committed to fighting for policies that will improve the lives of all constituents, not just the few, and I believe that we have the ideas that can create a more just and equitable society. By investing in education, creating good-paying jobs, and expanding access to healthcare, we can build the kind of NC we all want. With your support, I am confident that we can make progress on these issues and more! We all understand that our district is RED, but after running in the last cycle, I truly believe that we can win!! If we work together, meet people where they are, and tell them how we can make their lives better, we can shift the tide. Our 2022 campaign received over 100,000 votes and gained 5% over 2020, and that was with EXTREMELY limited resources. Imagine what we can do with almost two years, a focused organization and motivation! The Republicans and Virginia Foxx have done NOTHING for the folks in the 5th and we have a great story to tell. To tell the story, I need your support. There are 20 months until the election and with hard work and dedication, we can succeed! I promise to work tirelessly to earn the support of every voter in our district. I also promise to fight for all down ballot candidates, so we can win at the county, state and federal levels. Together we can make a real impact. I hope that you will consider supporting my campaign and helping to spread the word about our message. Together, we can make a difference and create a brighter future for our district. **Now, LET'S WIN in 2024!** Sincerely, Kyle
---
---
**To win we are going to need resources, so we appreciate any amount you can contribute to launch our 2024 campaign!**
---
---
| | [ Chip In Here! ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/447264?id=13.28.1.ff734e88722b04b0afddc60a3ac3a49f)
---
---
**Also, please follow along on social media and get involved promoting our campaign!**

name: Shift WA
subject: Democrats pick power over safety
body:
Democrat "leaders" in the State House arrogantly put personal power ahead of public safety. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61602498:WDtzYdDON:m:1:2610672541:B6FBC9064831FF3C2B381D2BC7616F27:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

During a media availability, Democrat Speaker of the House Laurie Jinkins declared she would never "[**cede authority**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61602499:WDtzYdDON:m:1:2610672541:B6FBC9064831FF3C2B381D2BC7616F27:r)" to the minority party as her petty reason for refusing to follow the will of a majority of the members of the State House of Representatives and bring a bill reforming the Democrats' failed ban on police pursuits to a floor vote before a major deadline. Her shocking response demonstrates that Democrat "leaders" in the State House arrogantly put personal power ahead of public safety.

Democrats know that their 2021 ban on police pursuits continues to fail catastrophically. Innocent lives have been lost because of their actions. **But the lives lost are not good enough reasons to allow Republicans a legislative victory.** For Democrats, it's all about power. Even the if that means sacrificing the safety of our communities.

Speaker Jinkins must be pressured by the public to do the right thing and pass the reform bill - the original version of House Bill 1363 - as that's probably the only way she will put her arrogance aside. **And the only way to alert the public of what is going on in Olympia right now is through organizations like Shift WA.**

Mainstream media outlets have proved, time and time again, that they cannot be trusted to put any pressure on legislative Democrats. **To protect Democrats, media outlets will omit key facts, delay relevant stories, or just not report on a story at all.**

That's why organizations like Shift WA are so important. We work to hold Democrats, who control every branch of our state government, accountable to the people. **Our mission is to highlight the stories and events that mainstream media outlets ignore or underplay just because they reflect badly on Democrats.**

[**Will you help us keep going strong by donating $50 today?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61602500:WDtzYdDON:m:1:2610672541:B6FBC9064831FF3C2B381D2BC7616F27:r)

[**We depend on the grassroots support of people like you. Please consider contributing today so we can continue delivering content you can trust!**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61602500:WDtzYdDON:m:1:2610672541:B6FBC9064831FF3C2B381D2BC7616F27:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61602501:WDtzYdDON:m:1:2610672541:B6FBC9064831FF3C2B381D2BC7616F27:r)
---
|

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). name: Victor Riches
subject: This could make or break school choice
body:
Passing laws are a big step towards ensuring school choice across America -- but it's not enough.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0cf152d701e54adfaee66a7baa09fe8b&_e=EGvO8Lg4wf76kXLyUlPGMh0fmIc8ELuK_X1uszzdSOpT2IyvbOVwhUo9nvywMpE8NZMY50He8-yQnj3jHnD8DYy6AKeWrlX__4HaOXMzKRvpUvY5yxXdF5Bw3hVO82zYZwYVC-o8GmUaQPgiPQGnCkksYN3ryHJLxw9Amor0fZnoJ8SuodMhnKvTsPcp0JO8n4lzn2KsXo8kUzpf37csNCzxxbABByCXCvJx8fSVAqBmma_oKDKhMYOG6P5r86nJO9RXXC-P4lLa2dAFD6vxsjvaIZ7kkdBYk4144z57B0k%3D)

Friend,

Passing laws are a big step towards ensuring school choice across America -- **but it 's not enough. **

You _HAVE_ to defend them in the courts.

While school choice in Arizona has been one of the top conservative victories of the last decade, it's now under attack by Governor Katie Hobbs.

**Hobbs claims to be a _ "Champion for every Arizonan"_ -- ****except for parents who want school choice****.**

My name is Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute. **The Goldwater Institute is the nation 's leading organization in promoting school choice and parental rights.** Unlike others, we not only fight for school choice in the legislature, we also protect school choice victories in the courts.

I am asking for your immediate help to defend school choice from Governor Katie Hobbs. **I 've set a goal to raise $25,000 before the end of the month. I am asking for your support in defending the rights of parents to ensure their children have access to the best possible education.**

[_**Will you donate $10, $25, $50, or any generous amount to defend school choice?**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0cf152d701e54adfaee66a7baa09fe8b&_e=EGvO8Lg4wf76kXLyUlPGMh0fmIc8ELuK_X1uszzdSOpT2IyvbOVwhUo9nvywMpE8NZMY50He8-yQnj3jHnD8DYy6AKeWrlX__4HaOXMzKRvpUvY5yxXdF5Bw3hVO82zYZwYVC-o8GmUaQPgiPQGnCvBq5kUhp71Y9-DGnTMT2cULrSWs1xPr0fTTHvcyEalqvKGkk-rJcowC4JEpgWHyCuGsWuZpw2eQF6vG9bu8W4d56nVvb9tq9mdNmf94oJFPmIB2HOLBjgB8iAKdHC1Wyggqkj3uL74xE6ewEDwAk5g%3D)

[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0cf152d701e54adfaee66a7baa09fe8b&_e=EGvO8Lg4wf76kXLyUlPGMh0fmIc8ELuK_X1uszzdSOpT2IyvbOVwhUo9nvywMpE8NZMY50He8-yQnj3jHnD8DYy6AKeWrlX__4HaOXMzKRvpUvY5yxXdF5Bw3hVO82zYl1gbxVNoIqODgA-Zi_868_D0je5VxtPnaj_WhVLOmrOkBjVvj41HUWFNZMJmfN12D93Q7MYDYR4GzAwByxl-53hoBSwzRSxmCKTpLjti1KTrVyQkZGJ2vzeF4r8hO3NiOmQlGNcaQ1Kb2Y5fprOX6jLemXWAc_4ob3gsAw3rxwu_qiKqP133cgfqwCGdwRGV)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0cf152d701e54adfaee66a7baa09fe8b&_e=EGvO8Lg4wf76kXLyUlPGMh0fmIc8ELuK_X1uszzdSOpT2IyvbOVwhUo9nvywMpE8NZMY50He8-yQnj3jHnD8DYy6AKeWrlX__4HaOXMzKRvpUvY5yxXdF5Bw3hVO82zYZwYVC-o8GmUaQPgiPQGnCm9ZH25DyXX-tckS9W_wz5oLh8Op3bxLfTTsybas_gAg0TJJRGoCKc7l8lGh0Rd45zjuOBZUCbeF4n9THMXnwvu11WP0f8Tb5rUXYG-zmwwfKQNUDmtX2wrKa9KzybwyljrZ6YmRad9pn9tLNEIpPRg%3D)

Across the country, schools are indoctrinating children with anti-American propaganda, Critical Race Theory, Marxism, and gender ideology, while ignoring key skills like reading, writing, and math. Too often, schools teach kids to be activists instead of teaching them the skills necessary to compete in a global marketplace.

Parents are fed up. They want options so their kids aren't stuck in failing schools.

Goldwater delivered **the nation 's first universal school choice program**, ensuring all families in Arizona have access to the education that best fits their needs.

But our success is now threatened by an administration that believes in government control over every aspect of our lives.

_Governor Hobbs doesn 't want families to have access to school choice_. She intends to ratchet up red tape on charter schools and funnel more taxpayer money into failing government-run schools.

This isn't going to happen on our watch.

The Goldwater Institute is standing by parents and ensuring families have access to school choice. Our team defends the rights of parents at the legislature and in the courtroom. **But we can 't do this alone. We are up against powerful unions and Leftist special interests who spend MILLIONS each year to stop parental rights.**

[_**You can help us fight for parents ' rights in education. Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0cf152d701e54adfaee66a7baa09fe8b&_e=EGvO8Lg4wf76kXLyUlPGMh0fmIc8ELuK_X1uszzdSOpT2IyvbOVwhUo9nvywMpE8NZMY50He8-yQnj3jHnD8DYy6AKeWrlX__4HaOXMzKRvpUvY5yxXdF5Bw3hVO82zYZwYVC-o8GmUaQPgiPQGnCmv3vqu3L9RvSdMDZXCzga7gchftBts7JEGhfWCWnAg8T3Tc41wc8BXEc3QOMCZcCns0vFarSdLN-kqM7yVgvSWA7pBv0kkVZ-7b0RVGhEYykJNzeeidtjzZORffv5K9G6DbGRf2qO0DFeHVtZcJmOQ%3D)

The Goldwater Institute has passed the strongest school choice legislation in Arizona's history, which set the gold standard for the entire country. In the past year alone, we have helped Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia implement school choice. We won't stop until it is the law of the land across the country.

clean_body: Passing laws are a big step towards ensuring school choice across America -- but it's not enough. Friend, Passing laws are a big step towards ensuring school choice across America -- but it 's not enough. You HAVE to defend them in the courts. While school choice in Arizona has been one of the top conservative victories of the last decade, it's now under attack by Governor Katie Hobbs. Hobbs claims to be a "Champion for every Arizonan" -- except for parents who want school choice. My name is Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute. The Goldwater Institute is the nation 's leading organization in promoting school choice and parental rights. Unlike others, we not only fight for school choice in the legislature, we also protect school choice victories in the courts. I am asking for your immediate help to defend school choice from Governor Katie Hobbs. I 've set a goal to raise $25,000 before the end of the month. I am asking for your support in defending the rights of parents to ensure their children have access to the best possible education. Across the country, schools are indoctrinating children with anti-American propaganda, Critical Race Theory, Marxism, and gender ideology, while ignoring key skills like reading, writing, and math. Too often, schools teach kids to be activists instead of teaching them the skills necessary to compete in a global marketplace. Parents are fed up. They want options so their kids aren't stuck in failing schools. Goldwater delivered the nation 's first universal school choice program, ensuring all families in Arizona have access to the education that best fits their needs. But our success is now threatened by an administration that believes in government control over every aspect of our lives. Governor Hobbs doesn 't want families to have access to school choice. She intends to ratchet up red tape on charter schools and funnel more taxpayer money into failing government-run schools. This isn't going to happen on our watch. The Goldwater Institute is standing by parents and ensuring families have access to school choice. Our team defends the rights of parents at the legislature and in the courtroom. But we can 't do this alone. We are up against powerful unions and Leftist special interests who spend MILLIONS each year to stop parental rights. The Goldwater Institute has passed the strongest school choice legislation in Arizona's history, which set the gold standard for the entire country. In the past year alone, we have helped Iowa, Michigan, Utah, and West Virginia implement school choice. We won't stop until it is the law of the land across the country. By standing with Goldwater, you are helping to protect families from big-spending bureaucrats who want to take away educational freedom. Will you help me reach our goal of raising $25,000 before the end of the month? Click any link below to send your support. Friend, your support will advance and defend school choice and parental rights across our country. Sincerely, Victor Riches President & CEO Goldwater Institute The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661. Conservatives Gives 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1829b36d8d9c46d7a2b2e87a715e8670&_e=3yyHdTCYIk_oMKoPMdPOdXyZvwOSDu72ebBWJpeGsHudHzUv9kCO4dD8x7cjFfD_HJwNrs2EV0R-kA-oFuK8WB2z3Sk4PrgiqxoDvQJqXf84xcmeIyam7leW3QqahfTL2s7urSjy9NxbH3AIBrvibq6hc3zXiDHX1qC1Srne2o2TZJ7eLlSERp9ul6frdIqB47sHcK1sWsksY6OKudt24g9WHTG6GAr3SP19o7v2UoHOoSkDOOExm9T5S0ZYv56J)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

He is very beatable. _[_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to protect our banking system by getting Scott out of the Senate?_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e0a4e55-f0a3-43d7-b95a-c695b190e781/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** _Thank you for taking this blight on Congress and our democracy out of office._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Friend, my mid-month deadline is just a few hours away, and I'm still $2,639 short of my goal. **With the GOP already strategizing their 2024 investments, we can't afford to show ANY signs that this seat could be vulnerable. [_If you're ready to chip in now, click here to rush your donation and defend our Senate majority._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60266999/396564875/-1386043057?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3981-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjIzOGY4YS0wM2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVC5i7upTThDLffC9tDljLVuU5MLGTfTZ8xLD3l_eSw=)**
Here's why your donation to my campaign means so much today:
* Experts at The Washington Post are already calling the 2024 Senate map **"a GOP dream"** — meaning we have to fight to defend _ every single seat._
* And in 2022, Republicans flipped enough congressional seats in New York to retake the House majority — and **now they're targeting my seat** so that they can take back the Senate too.
* We need to build a strong foundation in the early days of this campaign to stop the GOP from gaining any more ground in New York — **but without a huge surge in grassroots donations right now, I'll fall short of my mid-month goal!**

| | [RUSH A GIFT NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60267003/396564879/-1386043057?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3981-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjIzOGY4YS0wM2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xVC5i7upTThDLffC9tDljLVuU5MLGTfTZ8xLD3l_eSw=)

Kirsten

As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. name: Sen. Rosen
subject: grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Wow, friend – I am so incredibly grateful.
After my team and I reached out yesterday about our mid-month fundraising gap, supporters like you stepped up to help us reach our goal and make sure we've got enough resources to fight back against the GOP.
**With you by my side, I _know_ we can defend Nevada's crucial battleground seat, keep the Senate blue, and continue making progress for working families across the country.**
Growing up, my family instilled in me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence. I carry these lessons with me to this day – and I'm proud to see them reflected in our grassroots team.
The truth is, the road ahead won't be easy. The last Senate race here in Nevada ended up being the _closest_ in the entire country, and experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection.

But this much is clear: I know that we can deliver victory as long as we're together in this fight. So, thank you again, friend.
– Sen. Jacky Rosen

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: EXPOSED: The D.C. Swamp’s lies about January 6 are crumbling
body:
President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason. | | | | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440775:JjXO9MGlN:m:1:3331421248:D79B05DE4CD756B28394F240D85E8AEC:r)
---
| |
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440775:JjXO9MGlN:m:1:3331421248:D79B05DE4CD756B28394F240D85E8AEC:r)Dear Peter,

**[Please give a crucial donation IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440775:JjXO9MGlN:m:1:3331421248:D79B05DE4CD756B28394F240D85E8AEC:r)**

There's growing panic in the Washington, D.C. Swamp as you read this email.

Both Democrats and RINOs in Congress and in the national media are terrified by Tucker Carlson's release of U.S. Capitol camera footage this week.

**As a generous supporter of Freedom Watch, you know this is a good sign.**

Thanks to Tucker, millions of Americans are seeing for themselves that the official narrative about a "violent insurrection" at the U.S. Capitol building on January 6, 2021 is a pack of lies!

**People across the country who bought the "violent insurrection" pitch now know:**

* The protester known as Q Shaman was not violent, and he was actually escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

* US Capitol Police officer Brian Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

* Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

**President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason.**

Tens of millions more Americans will know this crucial information within two weeks, as their family, friends, and neighbors spread the word in person and on social media.

What's more, that critical video footage may help me defend my clients and all January 6 peaceful protesters...we'll know soon!

**[Please help me fight back as hard as I can for each abused, ignored, and tortured January 6 peaceful protester with your special gift now of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440775:JjXO9MGlN:m:1:3331421248:D79B05DE4CD756B28394F240D85E8AEC:r)**

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

name: National Rifle Association
subject: Official NRA Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
We want to hear what you think | We're committed to having a massive year in 2023, and with gun-grabbers in Washington feeling as emboldened as ever, we will need it.

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)

Peter,

Did you see our message?

We're committed to having a massive year in 2023, and with gun-grabbers in Washington feeling as emboldened as ever, _we will need it._ The fate of the Second Amendment hangs in the balance, and it's up to us to save it.

**We rely heavily on the input of law-abiding gun owners like YOU, so we're asking that you complete our****Official Survey on Gun Verification****IMMEDIATELY.**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)**
It's no secret that these are trying times for our Second Amendment. _The Executive Branch's current occupants are the most anti-firearm group of government officials in American history._ If we're going to defeat their radical gun-grabbing agenda, we must band together.

**This survey will only take a few minutes to complete, but those few minutes will have an immense impact on our fight to save the Second Amendment.****Please complete it NOW while you still can.**

**[Complete the NRA's OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN VERIFICATION TODAY to help us move forward with the best possible strategy to SAVE THE SECOND AMENDMENT.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)**

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: **NRA**
Subject: The NRA has a new survey

**[OFFICIAL SURVEY ON GUN VERIFICATION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)**
**DO YOU AGREE THAT EVERY LAW-ABIDING CITIZEN IS ENTITLED TO THE RIGHT TO SELF-DEFENSE?**

**[YES»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)**

**[NO»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)**

Peter,

The NRA needs YOU to see this.

As the nation's largest organization dedicated to defending the Second Amendment rights of EVERY American citizen, **we rely heavily on the input of law-abiding firearm owners like YOU.**

We're contacting you today for your input on our **[Official Survey on Gun Verification.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)** _Without your response, our mission to defend your rights from the gun-grabbers will be even more difficult._
**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)**
Our nation has reached a crossroads regarding gun rights; _never before have we seen such brazen attempts to disarm the American People._ If we're going to stop radical anti-gun politicians from DESTROYING the Second Amendment, we MUST have a plan.

Peter, can you step up and help the NRA form a winning strategy to protect YOUR rights?
**[GIVE YOUR INPUT»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)**
While the anti-gunners rely on _**dark-money billionaires**_ to set their agenda, the NRA gets its input from red-blooded American patriots. It's grassroots supporters like you who power our movement.

**[Please use this personalized link to take the NRA's Official Survey on Gun Verification and help protect YOUR rights.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)**

Thank you,

NRA

**[TAKE THE SURVEY»](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442014:JC2uXMGNM:m:1:3371812801:29704F7644010EB660D49378DFD9EF90:r)**

Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America

name: American Update
subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s Second Amendment Survey because you’re someone who understands

This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652284%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nT2n26CNt3lWsECWs1DJLg&sysid=1

Dear Friend of the Constitution,

The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitutionwith a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s Second Amendment Survey because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty.

We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.

Could you take a few minutes to complete our Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below?

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652295%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HnTecRM2PGcKWtB7hphmCQ&sysid=1 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652284%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nT2n26CNt3lWsECWs1DJLg&sysid=1

Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of libertywhich includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance.

Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844.

Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment.

As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in Imprimis, our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles.”

This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.

This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example

Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.

Why?

The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body.

Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America.

But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.

That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

And this work continues today.

That’s why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link:

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652295%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HnTecRM2PGcKWtB7hphmCQ&sysid=1 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652284%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nT2n26CNt3lWsECWs1DJLg&sysid=1

We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.”

Do you agree? I hope so.

This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today.

As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government fundingnot even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

It also means your gift really matters.

Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve libertyincluding the Second Amendmentfor future generations.

After completing your Second Amendment Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today.

And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you.

This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurrysupplies are limited!

Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

P.S. Our Constitutionincluding the Second Amendmentis under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you!

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652295%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HnTecRM2PGcKWtB7hphmCQ&sysid=1 https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652284%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nT2n26CNt3lWsECWs1DJLg&sysid=1

American Update

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1864%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=BjtfR%2b5gWyVOn%2fVNE7jZzg&sysid=1 Unsubscribe

And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government fundingnot even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve libertyincluding the Second Amendmentfor future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurrysupplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Our Constitutionincluding the Second Amendmentis under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 Unsubscribe

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: backstory on my campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi there –
It is the honor of my lifetime to serve in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention.
That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and we’re under a time crunch to fill the gap. If you could split $20 right now -- between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
The backstory is this:
GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win.
My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.
Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to my campaign and Serve America to help us retire our debt? Every dollar you give helps me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for hardworking families, and I’m grateful for anything you can give. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Thank you so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]

clean_body: Hi there – It is the honor of my lifetime to serve in the Senate. Working to make life better for Granite Staters is something that deserves my full attention. That’s why I’m sending you this email. Our (victorious!) campaign has some debt to pay off, and we’re under a time crunch to fill the gap. If you could split $20 right now -- between my campaign and Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. [] The backstory is this: GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. My team was laser-focused on making strategic decisions that would allow us to win. We made last-minute investments with the information we had, hoping that the funding we needed would come through. Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to my campaign and Serve America to help us retire our debt? Every dollar you give helps me spend less time fundraising and more time fighting for hardworking families, and I’m grateful for anything you can give. [] Thank you so much. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They used her like a lab rat
body:
| |
---
| | Peter, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decided she was "trans"... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente 's multi-billion-dollar __industry to "transition" her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442155:J_u9xMGYN:m:1:3365131770:A4182C6B14904CEA6B84F66F317D0F3C:r)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. **And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to "test" their "gender affirming care."** Now for the rest of Chloe's life, her voice will always be deeper, she'll never be able to breastfeed - if she can even have children - and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. **Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe 's healthy body for profit.** **And this is happening to children across America.** My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... **... and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust. **
---
| | |
---
**I 'm asking you to support Chloe's landmark lawsuit today by contributing a tax-deductible donation to the case's legal fund.**
---
[**DONATE AND HELP SUPPORT CHLOE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442155:J_u9xMGYN:m:1:3365131770:A4182C6B14904CEA6B84F66F317D0F3C:r)
---
|
---
| | Winning this case won't be easy. Kaiser Permanente is the largest medical group in the country. They're going to come at us with high-powered lawyers to protect their goldmine. **But making radical activists like this pay through litigation is the only way we 'll shut them down.**
---
| | |
---
**I 'm counting on you to join me in Chloe's fight today by supporting our legal battle with a tax-deductible donation to our legal fund.**
---
[**DONATE AND HELP SUPPORT CHLOE**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62442155:J_u9xMGYN:m:1:3365131770:A4182C6B14904CEA6B84F66F317D0F3C:r)
---
Any donation you can send today will get us one step closer to finally bringing Chloe the justice she deserves after being coerced and harmed by a hospital that abused her like a lab rat.
---

body:
President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason.

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrca6un669qbso7d4248c44bfd81pqq9pg7pciu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjgecpj4c3h2bs)**

There’s growing panic in the Washington, D.C. Swamp as you read this email.

Both Democrats and RINOs in Congress and in the national media are terrified by Tucker Carlson’s release of U.S. Capitol camera footage this week.

**As a generous supporter of Freedom Watch, you know this is a good sign.**

Thanks to Tucker, millions of Americans are seeing for themselves that the official narrative about a “violent insurrection” at the U.S. Capitol building on January 6, 2021 is a pack of lies!

**People across the country who bought the “violent insurrection” pitch now know:**

* The protester known as Q Shaman was not violent, and he was actually escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

* US Capitol Police officer Brian Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

* Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

**President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason.**

Tens of millions more Americans will know this crucial information within two weeks, as their family, friends, and neighbors spread the word in person and on social media.

What’s more, that critical video footage may help me defend my clients and all January 6 peaceful protesters...we’ll know soon!

**[Patriot, please help me fight back as hard as I can for each abused, ignored, and tortured January 6 peaceful protester with your special gift now of $25, $50, $100, $250, or more.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zk27mlj1lm63h1k39l96v4p0tusv0ene4fp247d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjgecpj4c3h2bs)**

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch

Deroy Murdock
