name: Katie Porter
subject: Why I’m running for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I just announced: I’m running to represent California in the U.S. Senate.

I’m running for the U.S. Senate because “better than the way things were”
isn’t good enough.

It’s not “good enough” that huge corporations are making record profits
while more and more families can’t afford necessities.

It’s not “good enough” that my kids had to ask me if they were safe at
school after a shooting in a nearby church.

It’s not “good enough” that extremist politicians could ban abortion
nationwide if they win just a few more Senate seats.

Our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. Republicans
funded by big corporate interests have rigged the game against families,
making it difficult to get ahead. The elected leaders we send to
Washington must be accountable to the people they represent, and they must
prove to voters that democracy can work for them. That’s why I’m running
for the Senate, and I want you on my team. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18910?t=1001&akid=3062%2E346206%2EGpm8cP ]Can you make a donation
today that will support my campaign for Senate and Charles Booker’s
progressive movement?

CHIP IN →

I’ve spent my career—both before and after being elected to the
House—delivering for working people and protecting taxpayers. In the
House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to
fund Members' pet projects. I’m leading the fight to ban congressional
stock trading, and the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings
is more than a fun prop—my questioning of witnesses in congressional
hearings secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass
bills that lower costs for families, and showed how corporate profits are
driving inflation.

Before I ran for office, I was a consumer protection advocate, and I
worked directly with California families who were cheated by the five
biggest Wall Street banks prior to the 2008 mortgage crisis. I held the
banks’ feet to the fire and won thousands of victories against the banks,
forcing them to pay California families billions.

I wouldn’t be running if I didn’t know we have what it takes to win, and
more importantly, to serve the people of California. But as Elizabeth
Warren taught me, nobody wins alone. This will be a competitive and
expensive race, and I’d be so honored to have your support. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18910?t=1002&akid=3062%2E346206%2EGpm8cP ]Can you
make a split contribution today and become a Founding Donor to our Senate
campaign?

Katie Porter

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230316-3062-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3062_346206_Gpm8cP&akid=3062%2E346206%2EGpm8cP

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3062%2E346206%2EGpm8cP

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: this case could ban medication abortion nationwide
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60255466/396533676/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=7ea83563-f7c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=By3VSLbmxUEdMaYAzNXJIkeM/dyJl9WfoCaAiRl8OLj7ov6fgc+BfnnOB2fqIrk/&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE4MzU2My1mN2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQA_OrOABpJjibVmUXeiYKE9D8HwYhZbMBJiaLAPMjM=)

Last June, the U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe vs. Wade, wrongfully ending the Constitutional right of a woman to terminate a pregnancy and triggering a nightmare in anti-choice states where more than 58% of all women live. That was 9 months ago and the nightmare continues today.
**[Join us to keep fighting back](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60255467/396533677/1783325621?refcode=&refcode2=7ea83563-f7c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=By3VSLbmxUEdMaYAzNXJIkeM/dyJl9WfoCaAiRl8OLj7ov6fgc+BfnnOB2fqIrk/&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE4MzU2My1mN2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQA_OrOABpJjibVmUXeiYKE9D8HwYhZbMBJiaLAPMjM=)**[**!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60255468/396533678/1783325621?refcode=&refcode2=7ea83563-f7c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=By3VSLbmxUEdMaYAzNXJIkeM/dyJl9WfoCaAiRl8OLj7ov6fgc+BfnnOB2fqIrk/&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE4MzU2My1mN2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQA_OrOABpJjibVmUXeiYKE9D8HwYhZbMBJiaLAPMjM=)
Since the Court's Dobbs decision we have seen women in our country denied reproductive healthcare — even in cases where their lives are in jeopardy — and women, including victims of rape and violence, forced to drive long distances to neighboring states for care or forced to give birth. Since Roe was overturned an increasing number of women have relied on FDA’s two-decade-old approval of certain drugs used to terminate a pregnancy.
But this week in Texas a radical Trump judicial appointee is overseeing a case that could ban women's access to the abortion medication mifepristone — a decision that would impact women across the country regardless of whether or not they live in states that protect reproductive rights.
This nightmare will continue until we stop it by confirming more qualified, top notch judicial nominees to the federal bench to defend our democracy and restore faith in our judiciary. And that's what we are hard at work doing in the Democratic-controlled Senate. [**Click here to chip in to support our fight to protect the Senate majority and our fundamental rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60255469/396533679/-1562067234?refcode=&refcode2=7ea83563-f7c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=By3VSLbmxUEdMaYAzNXJIkeM/dyJl9WfoCaAiRl8OLj7ov6fgc+BfnnOB2fqIrk/&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE4MzU2My1mN2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQA_OrOABpJjibVmUXeiYKE9D8HwYhZbMBJiaLAPMjM=)
From the Supreme Court's Dobbs decision to Citizen United, which opened the floodgates of secret dark money in our elections, we have seen the dangerous consequences of not having the Senate votes to confirm qualified judges and to block unqualified extremist ideologies. It will take time to overcome the damage inflicted on our judicial bench during the Trump Presidency, but we are working at it every day.
Federal judges that respect the Constitution are not only critical to protecting our democracy and our fundamental rights — but they have life-time appointments!
****[Protect our democracy and fundamental rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60255470/396533680/-1562067234?refcode=&refcode2=7ea83563-f7c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&contactdata=By3VSLbmxUEdMaYAzNXJIkeM/dyJl9WfoCaAiRl8OLj7ov6fgc+BfnnOB2fqIrk/&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE4MzU2My1mN2MzLWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bQA_OrOABpJjibVmUXeiYKE9D8HwYhZbMBJiaLAPMjM=)****
Thank you for all you do to protect and strengthen our democracy!
Onwards,
Chris

Van Hollen for Senate
10605 Concord St. Ste 202
Kensington, MD 20895

name: NextGen Pennsylvania
subject: Rally for gun safety
body:
Join us on March 23.

| | Friend, **This spring, our state has the unique opportunity to pass common-sense gun safety legislation — but we need to act.** For the first time in twelve years, Pennsylvania has a gun safety majority in the state House of Representatives, giving us a real chance to pass life-saving legislation. **Activists across the state, including our partners Ceasefire PA, will unite in Harrisburg on March 23 to demand action from our legislators — and we need you there with us.** **[Join us at the Pennsylvania state capitol as we seize this opportunity on March 23 during the March for Our Lives: Pennsylvania Advocacy Day.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60276191/396600375/1453772460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDIxMmVlMC0xOWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0Ktz6hqcVmNDm_qC43ylYJYRZD-3o-AclwnfQMEZww=&emci=9ca4d2ce-53c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5d212ee0-19c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6787172)** Together, we’re rallying to call for change for a safer Pennsylvania. **We don’t know when we’ll get another chance like this again. Join us on March 23 to help create a safer and stronger Pennsylvania for generations to come.** | [RSVP](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60276193/396600377/1097476564?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDIxMmVlMC0xOWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O0Ktz6hqcVmNDm_qC43ylYJYRZD-3o-AclwnfQMEZww=&emci=9ca4d2ce-53c3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=5d212ee0-19c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

Join us on March 23 to help create a safer and stronger Pennsylvania for generations to come. | "CTA Button" In solidarity, NextGen Pennsylvania | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

name: American Action News
subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z89m6tcmt7tj5ngs8q3es52eqnteu13d807e4438_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjge2oj4cph2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zasl0e48n91rj983lnkksu2hepulsokf8bdk7c20_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjge2oj4cph2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/") Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlm5grd1inivn0d7afmc60scbkc6s5itiehnlqmo_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjge2oj4cph2bs) We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zki1lunpobtu0c8ih60qommc9h2q7o2o765krado_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjge2oj4cph2bs)
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8tdo2nro26lsa8rdonj9ms28k2jq4qec754j0qg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni60or7c1h6eoh1k8gn48n24hhmeo74s3gm4p36c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9e2odr5h9og7iv4dqs89ce0c31u3c5odspievc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjge2oj4cph2bs)_

name: Adam Frisch
subject: the attacks have already begun
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60259599/396540838/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2347-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxM2I0OTI0LWZiYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ORPNrFU9humxt0JUTe38rXBT0XdXec2bln0h4maPV5U=)
Hello,

Well, it didn’t take long. **The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began.**

It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024.

Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors.

I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies.
**We’ve set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now:**
**[Please, if you’re able to, will you split $15 or more right now – any amount you can afford – between my campaign and American Bridge PAC to help us hit our goal and defeat Lauren Boebert?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60259600/396540839/-321553144?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2347-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxM2I0OTI0LWZiYzMtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ORPNrFU9humxt0JUTe38rXBT0XdXec2bln0h4maPV5U=)**

clean_body: | | | = Hello, Well, it didn’t take long. The same day I announced that I was running again in a rematch against Lauren Boebert, the smear campaign from her national Republican allies began. It’s no mystery why: Last year, I lost to Boebert by only 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. And unless they lie about me and smear my name on every TV across the district, they know we’re going to win in 2024. Here’s the thing, though. I’m not running to represent myself like Boebert. I’m not going to be a part of the circus in Washington. I’m running because the people of Western and Southern Colorado deserve someone in Congress who will wake up every day ready to work for them and their families – not corporate PAC donors. I’m ready to put forward a positive vision for our district and our country, but I need your help to make sure we don’t get drowned out by Boebert’s lies. We’ve set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to win, but right now we’re still short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on you to chip in now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Frisch and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Lauren Boebert may have the special interests behind her, but I have something even more powerful: You. name: Defend Texas
subject: 1,254 unchecked miles of border
body:
| | | | The Lone Star State is under attack.... |
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652298%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=L3XbB3QxLjtqS9ftogz3DA&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American,
Texas shares 1,254 miles of border with Mexico - 882 miles more than any other state.
As a result, the crime and destruction of open border policies that have been brought into many of our backyards is devastating.
An estimated 1,739,000 illegal immigrants currently live in Texas.
Fentanyl overdoses in Texas have risen by 399% in just a few years.
1,245 Texans have been murdered by illegal immigrants.
This isn’t an issue of political party, gender, age, religion, race, or creed.
This is an issue of life and death.
We must secure our border and we must defend Texas.
Are you ready to defend Texas?
---
| [YES](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652299%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2h8oY0Rlxs3gN7j2kP0hSg&sysid=1)
---
---
| [NO](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652290%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vtxr7tN1%2fAgnZu3hzviICg&sysid=1)
---
The assault on the freedoms and lives of Texans doesn’t stop with illegal immigration and open borders.

We’re also experiencing an invasion of epic propositions coming from California - _as 1 out of every new Texas resident comes from California._

And what’s the first thing they do once they get here?

They vote to take our guns and open our borders. _It’s insanity_.

Don’t let the slogan “Don’t Mess With Texas” lose its truth.

Fight back against invasions both foreign and domestic, and save Texas.

Thank you,
Defend Texas Fund

---
| [HELP DEFEND TEXAS](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652291%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gQlXANa%2fuoSFRJVhPkl6sQ&sysid=1)

name: Vice President Kamala Harris
subject: re: momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I’m asking you to support the DNC’s work to organize across the country, protect the right to vote, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide in the months and years ahead. | |
---
Derek, we have the momentum on our side. With the support of this grassroots team, our administration has helped create 12 million new jobs, capped insulin at $35 a month for seniors, passed the largest climate investment ever, made historic infrastructure investments, _and_ protected marriage equality in federal law. **But this was just the start of our work --_we have to finish the job_. To build on our progress together, we need to elect more Democrats nationwide. So I’m asking:** **[Will you renew your DNC membership with a gift of $10 today? When you pitch in, you’ll also reserve your very own Official 2023 DNC Membership Card to show just how committed you are to electing Democrats nationwide.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ymOoaZ2Tr-ojHUJEEb0iKbel_6jx5t5IoVHXReKN5GzCJcLN79V6GcZKl_WRYHbM0HMyTE-4tLHXf5YZxzFAw06cA3TfGxdPSFh0s5l-CAiOYULNAqmrbMm0kqYiacZqDZJsHEZix2BCPH_uW09K0TaBvkTMcK7Q0cte9uvA7c7FbgwC7GzO7Vti0htWWAdF4CrlaGfOfqpsJFHytQ9WZCQVDl1lDWeyA0kM_5LdQMw0UPsjmmgHM0Ns_UirJAWm-T2RRdgx0zC0ahn-sgokUFxl8_j2qqyDNxc4cFokvLZeDhHS9tm_WuGuE6_MFQDZX5J9JaPBnOKbTtF4lrDsrAsYyGi2gkq_cfIcgPNoW_VKRplLRp7kZKRWSvKSGT00hoPllgZnJrCJxiNXsEF7fFQCQuWKYp8hriNEd6JPmzBO0YlG4hRgHluw8hvnPWOR8/3uj/gt3FUYBrTy-CTAWVHF9-Aw/h0/MyNTNS6oJ2a_yQKNqg9IDP_3-DLFmafxuDrhyxj5qx4)**

clean_body: I’m asking you to support the DNC’s work to organize across the country, protect the right to vote, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide in the months and years ahead. | | Derek, we have the momentum on our side. With the support of this grassroots team, our administration has helped create 12 million new jobs, capped insulin at $35 a month for seniors, passed the largest climate investment ever, made historic infrastructure investments, and protected marriage equality in federal law. But this was just the start of our work --we have to finish the job. To build on our progress together, we need to elect more Democrats nationwide. So I’m asking: Derek, we couldn’t have gotten to where we are without your support. But if we’re going to keep building a better America, we have to keep up the momentum. So, I’m coming to you personally to ask you to support the DNC’s work today. From protecting the right to vote to organizing across the country, the DNC is laying the groundwork to elect Democrats nationwide in the months and years ahead. Thank you for everything, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Derivative of Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . name: Bryce Reeves
subject: Friend, I need your help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Bryce Reeves
body:
It’s been an honor to work alongside Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears on the Senate floor
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/01000186eabe499d-6d2bbe2e-cda3-4d6a-9ec5-c004b5dc99a6-000000/q2okIyoUAXqe3QH98C59wjPn1To=313)
---
|
---
| “As someone who served both as a United States Marine and a Virginia Delegate, I know what it takes to get things done. Bryce has served his constituents well, getting even the toughest of bills out of a democrat-controlled senate, and I am proud to endorse him for reelection.” \- **Lieutenant** Governor Winsome Sears
---
| | |
---
| **Peter, Can Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears count on you to endorse Senator Reeves?**
---
| | [ENDORSE SENATOR REEVES TODAY!](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fendorse/1/01000186eabe499d-6d2bbe2e-cda3-4d6a-9ec5-c004b5dc99a6-000000/sm6LhBUwgBuq8D1zuXzfm7h5p5c=313)
---
| Friend, It’s been an honor to work alongside Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears on the Senate floor, and in the General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus. We have worked together to improve the lives of our veterans and protect your constitutional rights. l'll be honest with you though, the work we have been able to accomplish could never have happened without your support. Times are tough for all Americans right now. But every single dollar we raise is another voter we're able to reach, another opportunity to promote our shared conservative values. I am facing a challenger for the Republican nomination Saturday, May 6, 2023 in a “Firehouse Primary”. It’s critically important to keep this seat and I’m the only person that the democrats fear.
---
| | [DONATE! ](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/1/01000186eabe499d-6d2bbe2e-cda3-4d6a-9ec5-c004b5dc99a6-000000/gTJ_LmsSW_TPWLF266QSIoh4VhU=313)
---
| **_I don't know about you, but I am sick and tired of of good conservative legislation being killed in the Senate by leftist Democrats who have adopted Nancy Policy style “blue wall” tactics, killing any legislation with an “R” next to it. _** The Democrats have already made it clear that they know they wont be able to defeat me in a General Election. That is why as Senate Republican Whip I have made it my personal obligation to make sure **_Republicans all across Virginia win BIG this November. _**But as you and I both know elections are expensive, and it is support from patriots like you that will help us win. **My opponent however has made it clear that he could care less about a “red wave” in November.** He even has the audacity to claim he thinks of it as an **HONOR** that **YOUR** money has to be spent running against him. **YOUR** money that we could be using to elect strong republican candidates with tough races all across the state. That is why if we are going to take back the Senate this November and get strong conservatives elected on all levels of government, I need your help. I know you probably get emails like this a lot, but I am humbling asking that you consider investing whatever you can towards our cause. Whether that is [_$20_](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/2/01000186eabe499d-6d2bbe2e-cda3-4d6a-9ec5-c004b5dc99a6-000000/-KxBjb0sAAmw4MIE4FeOf44eWGs=313) , [_$200_](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/3/01000186eabe499d-6d2bbe2e-cda3-4d6a-9ec5-c004b5dc99a6-000000/E0lFsKORdIS4VVOw7164lw13ep4=313) , or [_$2,000_](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/4/01000186eabe499d-6d2bbe2e-cda3-4d6a-9ec5-c004b5dc99a6-000000/klAwl2CKgS87eLXHpXUbfAozWgc=313) anything will help me in reaching my March goals. It is supporters like you that will be the reason for a “red wave” in Virginia this November. Thank you for your prayers, support, and financial investments as I work to continue to preserve our constitutional rights in Richmond. Your humble servant,
---
| | |
---
| | [Donate $20](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdonate/5/01000186eabe499d-6d2bbe2e-cda3-4d6a-9ec5-c004b5dc99a6-000000/afnYjP5fsGpS-hjljsI7LsVxYMY=313)

clean_body: It’s been an honor to work alongside Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears on the Senate floor | | | | | | | “As someone who served both as a United States Marine and a Virginia Delegate, I know what it takes to get things done. Bryce has served his constituents well, getting even the toughest of bills out of a democrat-controlled senate, and I am proud to endorse him for reelection.” \- Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears | | | | Peter, Can Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears count on you to endorse Senator Reeves? | | | Friend, It’s been an honor to work alongside Lieutenant Governor Winsome Sears on the Senate floor, and in the General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus. We have worked together to improve the lives of our veterans and protect your constitutional rights. l'll be honest with you though, the work we have been able to accomplish could never have happened without your support. Times are tough for all Americans right now. But every single dollar we raise is another voter we're able to reach, another opportunity to promote our shared conservative values. I am facing a challenger for the Republican nomination Saturday, May 6, 2023 in a “Firehouse Primary”. It’s critically important to keep this seat and I’m the only person that the democrats fear. | | | I don't know about you, but I am sick and tired of of good conservative legislation being killed in the Senate by leftist Democrats who have adopted Nancy Policy style “blue wall” tactics, killing any legislation with an “R” next to it. The Democrats have already made it clear that they know they wont be able to defeat me in a General Election. That is why as Senate Republican Whip I have made it my personal obligation to make sure Republicans all across Virginia win BIG this November. But as you and I both know elections are expensive, and it is support from patriots like you that will help us win. My opponent however has made it clear that he could care less about a “red wave” in November. He even has the audacity to claim he thinks of it as an HONOR that YOUR money has to be spent running against him. YOUR money that we could be using to elect strong republican candidates with tough races all across the state. That is why if we are going to take back the Senate this November and get strong conservatives elected on all levels of government, I need your help. I know you probably get emails like this a lot, but I am humbling asking that you consider investing whatever you can towards our cause. Whether that is , , or anything will help me in reaching my March goals. It is supporters like you that will be the reason for a “red wave” in Virginia this November. Thank you for your prayers, support, and financial investments as I work to continue to preserve our constitutional rights in Richmond. Your humble servant, | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Bryce Reeves | | | | | | | | P.O. Box 7021 Fredericksburg, VA 22404, United States | | or

name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
I know they don’t want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78239%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=G9Clb2TCuLDSZS6ZnUgEPA&sysid=1)

Friend,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _“deadly insurrection,”_ but the video evidence doesn’t back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I’m launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. name: Tom Fitton
subject: Stand with us as we fight for the rule of law!
body:
Even as we face increasingly strong opposition from the radical Left and the lawless, secretive Biden administration, Judicial Watch continues to stand firm for the rule of the law.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I'll be short and direct....
...even as we face increasingly strong opposition from the radical Left and the lawless, secretive Biden administration, Judicial Watch continues to stand firm for the rule of the law.
_[And if you will join with us today by making a tax-deductible gift](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62562&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)_ ...we can have even greater impact:

* **_Exposing_** Biden secrecy and family corruption

* **_Reducing_** voter fraud by suing states and counties to comply with federal law and clean
their voter rolls

* **_Fighting_** to get to all the facts the American people have a right to know about the
source and spread of Covid-19, and the federal government's response to it under both
the Trump and Biden administrations

* **_Protecting_** the free speech rights of conservative teachers who have lost their jobs for
speaking out against Critical Race Theory and other woke programs in their schools

* **_Challenging_** efforts by the Left to create racially discriminatory laws that divide Americans

* and other issues that conservatives care about.

| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62562&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

As far as I'm concerned, we can't ever do enough to fight for the rule of law and honest and open government.

Because when it comes to using the courts to support the rule of law and government transparency, Judicial Watch is still the "only game in town."

And we take very seriously our leadership role in pressing for good government.

**[But we also take our budget realities very seriously.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62562&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)** We must weigh carefully each of our investigations and lawsuits against our actual resources.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62562&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

And since we are routinely opposed by taxpayer-funded lawyers and bureaucrats in the liberal "permanent government" who fight against us and for unlawful government secrecy with bottomless resources - it's _essential_ that we're always prepared financially, and we need your support to achieve that goal!

Personally, I can’t think of a time in our twenty-nine year history that a strong Judicial Watch has been more important to our nation...and the support of our generous Amicus Society members, like you, has never been more important to Judicial Watch!

I appreciate your interest in the work of Judicial Watch. I hope you will help us increase our impact fighting for the rule of law in 2023 by [making a tax-deductible gift today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62562&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62562&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Personally, I can’t think of a time in our twenty-nine year history that a strong Judicial Watch has been more important to our nation...and the support of our generous Amicus Society members, like you, has never been more important to Judicial Watch! I appreciate your interest in the work of Judicial Watch. I hope you will help us increase our impact fighting for the rule of law in 2023 by Sincerely, Thomas Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 (C)2023, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | |

name: Supreme Court Alerts
subject: Do you stand with Amy Coney Barrett?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE
body:
|
| | | Let's cut straight to the point. We need to know where you stand:
**Do you stand with Justice Amy Coney Barrett?**
---
| | | [YES!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441780:J0xD4MGNJ:m:1:3365131770:1BD1F6239FDE1750B084A436CED9BCA3:r "Generic Button")
---
| | | [NO.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441780:J0xD4MGNJ:m:1:3365131770:1BD1F6239FDE1750B084A436CED9BCA3:r "Generic
Button")
---
_**FIRST:**_ The Left attacked Justice Brett Kavanaugh while he was being appointed to the Supreme Court. They lied about his reputation as an outstanding judge and HUMILIATED him on national TV.

_**THEN:**_**** The Left came after Justice Clarence Thomas because he is a proud Conservative and will never bend the knee to the wishes of the Democrats.

_**NOW:**_ The Left is calling for Amy Coney Barrett to be impeached.

The Left will do anything they can to impeach our Conservative Justices. They know that the Supreme Court is their golden ticket to abolishing the filibuster and ramming through the most radical pieces of legislation possible.

**If the Left is successful in impeaching just ONE of our Conservative Justices, it 's all over. The Republican party will be destroyed.**

That's why we desperately need your support by midnight. **[Will you please add your name to our local petition to stand with Amy Coney Barrett and save her from the Left's attacks?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441780:J0xD4MGNJ:m:1:3365131770:1BD1F6239FDE1750B084A436CED9BCA3:r "Will you please add your name to our local petition to stand with Amy Coney Barrett and save
her from the Left’s attacks?")**
---
| | | [STAND WITH AMY CONEY BARRETT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441780:J0xD4MGNJ:m:1:3365131770:1BD1F6239FDE1750B084A436CED9BCA3:r "Generic Button")
---
| | | [DEFEND OUR CONSERVATIVE JUSTICES](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441780:J0xD4MGNJ:m:1:3365131770:1BD1F6239FDE1750B084A436CED9BCA3:r "Generic
Button")
---
_You 're the last Conservative in your area we need to sign in order to hit our goal. Don't let us down._
---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441779:J0xD4MGNJ:m:1:3365131770:1BD1F6239FDE1750B084A436CED9BCA3:r)
---

Senator Tim Scott here. Serving the people of South Carolina is the most incredible honor of my life, but none of this would be possible without your support.
I made a promise many years ago that I would do everything possible to restore the American Dream and create opportunities for other kids who grew up like I did-in a single-parent home with a mom who worked two jobs just to put food on the table and keep the lights on.

**_Only in our great country can the grandson of a cotton picker grow up to serve in both chambers of Congress. _** ****
This is just the beginning. **[Can I count on you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441779:J0xD4MGNJ:m:1:3365131770:1BD1F6239FDE1750B084A436CED9BCA3:r "Can I count on
you to join my American Dream Team and keep this fight going?")**
** ******
---
| | [JOIN MY TEAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441779:J0xD4MGNJ:m:1:3365131770:1BD1F6239FDE1750B084A436CED9BCA3:r "JOIN MY TEAM")
---

Thank you for everything, and God Bless,

Tim Scott
---

| Hey Friend
I'm on the ground here in Washington D.C., and I want you to know why I fight...
Growing up, I had the privilege of learning the values of hard work and perseverance. I learned that you have to be the change you want to see in the world, which is why I ran for Congress to continue my work to support the American people.
However, getting things done in Congress takes more than a passion for improving your country. It takes a commitment to fight, a determination for change, and a drive to ensure that our nation can survive any ordeal and still come out on top.
Under Obama, my family lost our home and small cattle ranch, starting me on my journey. I've worked hard to ensure that no family has to struggle as we did. And I'm ready to bring much-needed relief and support to those suffering from the Left's overreach.
My work in Congress has always been focused on improving American lives. I've been one of the staunchest supporters of freedom - pushing legislation to block the Green New Deal, protecting parents' rights, and ensuring you're free to pursue your American dream.
I'm ready to continue to bring the change America needs, but March will be a massive challenge for me and my team. Friend we MUST beat the Left's fundraising this month to end their America-last policies, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to make the difference.
I'm humbly asking... Friend will you rush in your support and join the fight to put America First? [https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/this-is-personal](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NOBFbGWNVOFoyGI8icorxKJI_oFzo8cdbt3JS6V6FNtk1pPJh89oZksf0JsWnhjGwQSBqjts7euIzAuDmryJlUlhKwa_J2_VlYs6yM8jB301CscaLO7fYCf-SbUPSwkMUFQhfQNynWXdYE2yqL2MTtZwz48keqFJyQYbhlPHHTDL2aH1RWAyE74Os2_N4qDZ&c=Rn8Ou0ar9VHz8k3BSABkGR27ZY1PBp0g8FlnUeWAba0EwVEl8mqy7Q==&ch=DxiMMhQt5QWu5FB3aNWFAurV5sxp3FyHj39vFl5BLeLGSZW85FgHfQ==)
Putting Florida and America First,
---
| Kat Cammack
-Sent from iPhone

clean_body: | | | | == | Hey Friend I'm on the ground here in Washington D.C., and I want you to know why I fight... Growing up, I had the privilege of learning the values of hard work and perseverance. I learned that you have to be the change you want to see in the world, which is why I ran for Congress to continue my work to support the American people. However, getting things done in Congress takes more than a passion for improving your country. It takes a commitment to fight, a determination for change, and a drive to ensure that our nation can survive any ordeal and still come out on top. Under Obama, my family lost our home and small cattle ranch, starting me on my journey. I've worked hard to ensure that no family has to struggle as we did. And I'm ready to bring much-needed relief and support to those suffering from the Left's overreach. My work in Congress has always been focused on improving American lives. I've been one of the staunchest supporters of freedom - pushing legislation to block the Green New Deal, protecting parents' rights, and ensuring you're free to pursue your American dream. I'm ready to continue to bring the change America needs, but March will be a massive challenge for me and my team. Friend we MUST beat the Left's fundraising this month to end their America-last policies, and I'm counting on grassroots supporters like you to make the difference. I'm humbly asking... Friend will you rush in your support and join the fight to put America First? == Putting Florida and America First, | Kat Cammack -Sent from iPhone | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | == Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: - Scrap the cap on Social Security?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR BOB**](https://www
body:
Saving Social Security - our Nation's sacred promise to hard working Americans | Strengthening Social Security toward solvency keeps hard-ea
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6bORgfayv/c?w=YE-f3inn7TgB1ze8z_TeUVx56Iy9y6yO6YNofLYRs8U.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby82Yk9SZ2ZheXY_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Good morning, Here's where I stand on whether or not to save Social Security. Before crises arise, we need a long-term solution, not short-term fixes. We must place problem-solving before political party divisions and listen to what Americans want.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6bORgfayv/c?w=lSR3MtyHDrEr1iVE9OayuSuAYZZJRpN1xZ4t2EYqfPc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvTUlSdXJhbEZ1bmQiLCJyIjoiNmQ0NmUwZWYtYWMyNC00ODRhLThkZWQtZDdlMDVkNWM3YjlmIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
---
| | Saving Social Security - our Nation's sacred promise to hard working Americans
---
| | Strengthening Social Security toward solvency keeps hard-earned money in the hands of people who need it most - the elderly, people with disabilities, the middle-class, and struggling rural communities. Social Security is our Nation's insurance, a sacred promise to hard working Americans, and our country's number one anti-poverty program. Help me fight for long-term solutions to save Social Security. [Donate now.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6bORgfayv/c?w=VGLFMV2KNqHl_77nYzQfNHgxGzta6po1vPtGHs68GSE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21pcnVyYWxmdW5kIiwiciI6IjgyNTg4NGRhLTNiNjMtNDljNC1hZTZlLWI5ZGQ2ODlkOWMxNSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)
---
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6bORgfayv/c?w=PCj_o6pnUz5HqPoN8n9D0b1hF58TVSFz4qyGVN58ZtU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvTUlSdXJhbEZ1bmQiLCJyIjoiZGRmOWJmYTUtMDZkYS00MmQ0LWIzY2QtYjA3NDE1YTVjNTk2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
---
| | |
---
| | I look at problems before getting into the details. Let me try here.
The purpose of Social Security for retirement is to provide assistance based on the need of persons over 65 years of age. The program intends to complement pensions and individual savings, not replace their entire income. The amount one receives decreases as your monthly wage increases. This provides higher amounts for the working poor. Research shows that without Social Security, two-thirds of the elderly would be impoverished.Is Social Security solvent? Under current laws, Social Security will exhaust its trust funds by 2034, and unless Congress strengthens the program, payees will see benefits cut by 23% in just over a decade. 1st Decision: Do we want it, or not?2nd Decision: How do we fix it to keep it? How do we pay for it? This decision is where our differences start.
Let's look at our simple choices with clarity.
* Many Republicans want to reduce benefits by increasing the retirement age to 70.
* Democrats want to increase revenue to pay for it.
* Some advocate for a combination of both solutions.

What do I think?
* Social Security is vital.
* Before crises arise, we need a long-term solution, not short-term fixes.
* We must place problem-solving before political party divisions and listen to what Americans want.

Details worthy of consideration for changes:
* Raising the Social Security payroll tax cap to over $400,000 – and increasing the income level at which Social Security payroll taxes are reapplied – would eliminate 61% of the shortfall.
* Reducing benefits for the top 20% of high earners would decrease the shortfall by shortfall by 11%.
* Gradually raising the retirement age and the savings would depend on the age.
* Increasing the payroll tax by 0.3% would help eliminate 16% of the shortfall. Currently, employers and employees pay a tax of 6.2% of wages, and marginally raising that rate could significantly impact the program's solvency.
* Raising the minimum benefit or indexing the minimum benefit to 125% of the federal poverty line would change the minimum benefit for someone who has worked for 30 years from $951 to $1,341 but increase the shortfall by 7%.
* Increasing benefits for beneficiaries over age 80 would increase the shortfall by 5% but ensure they don't revert below poverty levels.

Economists have highlighted that Social Security is an economic stimulus, and strengthening it towards solvency will help grow our economy. Hard working Americans deserve a fact-based discussion without rhetoric or hyperbole to determine the best route forward. Both political parties must work together to find reasonable, commonsense long-term solutions before it's too late.
---
| | |
---
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE $10**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/6bORgfayv/c?w=dKALpsatIT0xapdkPraNhBB9dBFx_Nm_fyUjZhXDFZg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21pcnVyYWxmdW5kP2V4cHJlc3NfbGFuZT10cnVlJmFtb3VudD0xMCZyZWZjb2RlPWV4cHJlc3NfbGFuZV8xMCIsInIiOiJiODA5MDE3NS01OWZiLTRlOTUtMWY5ZC0xNjQ2OGQ2ZmM4ZTAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)

clean_body: Saving Social Security - our Nation's sacred promise to hard working Americans | Strengthening Social Security toward solvency keeps hard-ea | | Can't see this message? | | | | | Good morning, Here's where I stand on whether or not to save Social Security. Before crises arise, we need a long-term solution, not short-term fixes. We must place problem-solving before political party divisions and listen to what Americans want. | | | | Saving Social Security - our Nation's sacred promise to hard working Americans | | Strengthening Social Security toward solvency keeps hard-earned money in the hands of people who need it most - the elderly, people with disabilities, the middle-class, and struggling rural communities. Social Security is our Nation's insurance, a sacred promise to hard working Americans, and our country's number one anti-poverty program. Help me fight for long-term solutions to save Social Security. | | | | | | | | I look at problems before getting into the details. Let me try here. The purpose of Social Security for retirement is to provide assistance based on the need of persons over 65 years of age. The program intends to complement pensions and individual savings, not replace their entire income. The amount one receives decreases as your monthly wage increases. This provides higher amounts for the working poor. Research shows that without Social Security, two-thirds of the elderly would be impoverished.Is Social Security solvent? Under current laws, Social Security will exhaust its trust funds by 2034, and unless Congress strengthens the program, payees will see benefits cut by 23% in just over a decade. 1st Decision: Do we want it, or not?2nd Decision: How do we fix it to keep it? How do we pay for it? This decision is where our differences start. Let's look at our simple choices with clarity. Many Republicans want to reduce benefits by increasing the retirement age to 70. Democrats want to increase revenue to pay for it. Some advocate for a combination of both solutions. What do I think? Social Security is vital. Before crises arise, we need a long-term solution, not short-term fixes. We must place problem-solving before political party divisions and listen to what Americans want. Details worthy of consideration for changes: Raising the Social Security payroll tax cap to over $400,000 – and increasing the income level at which Social Security payroll taxes are reapplied – would eliminate 61% of the shortfall. Reducing benefits for the top 20% of high earners would decrease the shortfall by shortfall by 11%. Gradually raising the retirement age and the savings would depend on the age. Increasing the payroll tax by 0.3% would help eliminate 16% of the shortfall. Currently, employers and employees pay a tax of 6.2% of wages, and marginally raising that rate could significantly impact the program's solvency. Raising the minimum benefit or indexing the minimum benefit to 125% of the federal poverty line would change the minimum benefit for someone who has worked for 30 years from $951 to $1,341 but increase the shortfall by 7%. Increasing benefits for beneficiaries over age 80 would increase the shortfall by 5% but ensure they don't revert below poverty levels. Economists have highlighted that Social Security is an economic stimulus, and strengthening it towards solvency will help grow our economy. Hard working Americans deserve a fact-based discussion without rhetoric or hyperbole to determine the best route forward. Both political parties must work together to find reasonable, commonsense long-term solutions before it's too late. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your time this morning, . Happy to answer any question you might have. I appreciate you considering a contribution so we can continue to advocate for important issues like this. Best Regards, Bob LorinserCandidate for US Congress (MI01) | | | | | You've been e-mailed this content because of information you've supplied through previous contributions to our cause. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: two months ago
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Derek, this week marks two months since I had the high honor of being sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor.

Derek, this week marks two months since I had the high honor of being sworn in as Pennsylvania’s 48th Governor.

And since then, we’ve gotten right to work for the people of Pennsylvania. Here’s just some of what we’re already fighting for:
* Providing free breakfast to every student in our public schools
* Raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour
* Protecting workers’ rights
* Giving tax credits to new teachers, nurses, and cops
* Increasing funding for student mental health

And we’re doing all this and more while guaranteeing the rights of LGBTQ+ Pennsylvanians, the right to choose, and the right to vote are never infringed upon.

**[But Derek, this is not going to be easy. Unfortunately, right-wing extremists would rather play politics as usual than do what the people of Pennsylvania elected us to do. So today, I’m asking for your help. name: Letitia James
subject: This is disappointing, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| |
---
Peter, what happened here?

Two days ago, I reached out to this powerful community asking for support – and the initial response was _overwhelming_ _. _

We shot up toward our 1,000 Team James Membership goal. But then, out of nowhere it seems, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our March membership goal by 163 donations.

I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short of this goal, but I _refuse_ to let it get the best of me. I’m confident in the size and strength of this team – **and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up this gap with only hours left to go. **

**Peter, I’m counting on _you_ to be one of the 163 people I need to reactivate their memberships, so please: **[**Will you donate any amount before 11:59 p.m. to activate your membership and help power my fight for progress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60270910/396580038/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1005-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmMwZTVlOC0wYmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yb0YNT2H4RUhVJzFDz6hsZjP97YfnahqPMe83i0iSZk=)

From: **Letitia James**
Date: Tue, Mar 14, 2023
Subject: 56 cents to every dollar
| | |
---
Peter, in a moment [**I’m going to ask you to contribute to my campaign and re-activate your Team James Membership**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60270913/396580041/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1005-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmMwZTVlOC0wYmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yb0YNT2H4RUhVJzFDz6hsZjP97YfnahqPMe83i0iSZk=) , but first I want to explain why I’m counting on your support.

Today is Equal Pay Day, and it’s one of the most concrete examples of _why_ we cannot falter in our fight for progress. Because in 2023, women in New York are _still_ earning just 88 cents to every dollar a white man earns. And when we break that into smaller groups, the statistics are even more jarring: **Black women are paid just _63 cents_ and Latina women only _56 cents_ for every dollar paid to white men.**

This is _unacceptable_. That’s why I’m fighting hard for the things that matter most to New York’s working families – workers’ rights, reproductive freedom, a future free of gun violence, and, of course, equal pay for equal work – but I can only win these fights with _your_ help.

**I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to activate their 2023 March Team James Memberships and join our fight for equality, but it looks like I’m still missing your membership, Peter. So please:[Will you donate whatever you can spare to activate your 2023 Team James Membership and help me fight for a better New York?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60270915/396580043/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1005-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmMwZTVlOC0wYmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yb0YNT2H4RUhVJzFDz6hsZjP97YfnahqPMe83i0iSZk=)**

Peter, if I can be candid for a second, I didn’t grow up with power of privilege. I had no special strings to tug on and no way to stop the manipulative landlords, predatory lenders, and powerful corporations that had ruled New York for generations from preying on families like my own.

That’s why, when I was elected in 2018, I vowed to do _everything_ in my power to become the fierce fighter that working families like my own need.

But with another Equal Pay Day rolling by and no _real_ progress being made on closing the pay gap, we cannot relent in the fight for equality.

**So please, will you be one of the 1,000 fearless fighters I need to activate their 2023 Team James Memberships before midnight tomorrow?

[Donate any amount to this link to automatically renew your March Team James Membership.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60270927/396580064/-2022127741?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1005-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmMwZTVlOC0wYmM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yb0YNT2H4RUhVJzFDz6hsZjP97YfnahqPMe83i0iSZk=)**

clean_body: | | Peter, what happened here? Two days ago, I reached out to this powerful community asking for support – and the initial response was overwhelming . We shot up toward our 1,000 Team James Membership goal. But then, out of nowhere it seems, donations came to a standstill – causing us to be on the verge of falling short of our March membership goal by 163 donations. I’ll be honest: I’m disappointed that we may fall short of this goal, but I refuse to let it get the best of me. I’m confident in the size and strength of this team – and that’s why I’m asking you to help us make up this gap with only hours left to go. Peter, I’m counting on you to be one of the 163 people I need to reactivate their memberships, so please: = | | = Thank you. Letitia \------- Forwarded message ------- From: Letitia James Date: Tue, Mar 14, 2023 Subject: 56 cents to every dollar | | | Peter, in a moment = , but first I want to explain why I’m counting on your support. Today is Equal Pay Day, and it’s one of the most concrete examples of why we cannot falter in our fight for progress. Because in 2023, women in New York are still earning just 88 cents to every dollar a white man earns. And when we break that into smaller groups, the statistics are even more jarring: Black women are paid just 63 cents and Latina women only 56 cents for every dollar paid to white men. This is unacceptable. That’s why I’m fighting hard for the things that matter most to New York’s working families – workers’ rights, reproductive freedom, a future free of gun violence, and, of course, equal pay for equal work – but I can only win these fights with your help. I’m counting on 1,000 fearless fighters to activate their 2023 March Team James Memberships and join our fight for equality, but it looks like I’m still missing your membership, Peter. So please:= = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Peter, if I can be candid for a second, I didn’t grow up with power of privilege. I had no special strings to tug on and no way to stop the manipulative landlords, predatory lenders, and powerful corporations that had ruled New York for generations from preying on families like my own. That’s why, when I was elected in 2018, I vowed to do everything in my power to become the fierce fighter that working families like my own need. But with another Equal Pay Day rolling by and no real progress being made on closing the pay gap, we cannot relent in the fight for equality. So please, will you be one of the 1,000 fearless fighters I need to activate their 2023 Team James Memberships before midnight tomorrow? = | | = Thank you for being in this fight alongside me. name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: No one expected me to run for elected office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=46%2E35263%2Er8vRrl ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hey Peter, I want to tell you a little bit about why fighting
for American families in the U.S. Senate is so important to me. [ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/766?t=1004&akid=46%2E35263%2Er8vRrl ]My work
is made possible by this grassroots team so, if you’re able, I hope you
split a contribution of any amount between myself and Tammy Baldwin to
help me keep going.

[2]Amy Klobuchar

Every day, I’m reminded of the fact that I stand on the shoulders of those
before me. I am the daughter of a newspaperman and a teacher and the
granddaughter of an iron ore miner who saved his money in a coffee can in
the basement to send my dad to college. No one expected me to run for
elected office — and not many people expected me to win either.

[3]Amy Klobuchar

But thanks to supporters like you, our grassroots movement beat the odds,
and I became the first woman elected to the U.S. Senate from Minnesota.
That’s the American dream in action.

Every day since then I’ve been fighting for progress. And I want you to
know:

I will never stop fighting to build a nation that works for working
families.

[4]Amy Klobuchar

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/766?t=1005&akid=46%2E35263%2Er8vRrl ]But I can’t do it alone, Peter. That's why I'm so thankful to
have grassroots supporters like you by my side. If you can, I’m asking you
to split a quick donation between myself and Tammy today to help me
continue this fight.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately and be split between Tammy Baldwin
and Amy Klobuchar.

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/772?t=1006&akid=46%2E35263%2Er8vRrl ]CHIP IN $5 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/773?t=1007&akid=46%2E35263%2Er8vRrl ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/766?t=1011&akid=46%2E35263%2Er8vRrl ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you so much — this team has never let me down.

— Amy

P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: EXPOSED: The D.C. Swamp’s lies about January 6 are crumbling
body:
President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason.

President Donald Trump has even called for the members of the January 6 Congressional Committee to be tried for fraud and treason. | | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zkr9g114lpheff9ro4pbqcaf82n4ai9qshcsv7e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjieaob7clh2bs)
---
| |
---
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zfcr3q4udvkcha7ceejjavo69a1uhho7r06ekso8_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjieaob7clh2bs)Dear Patriot,

**[Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, $250, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi49na5qtter8etsqah689f9sdunupqp916llaro_rp22sh2s8i66pr0sjieaob7clh2bs)**

There's growing panic in the Washington, D.C. Swamp as you read this email.

Both Democrats and RINOs in Congress and in the national media are terrified by Tucker Carlson's release of U.S. Capitol camera footage this week.

**As a generous supporter of Freedom Watch, you know this is a good sign.**

Thanks to Tucker, millions of Americans are seeing for themselves that the official narrative about a "violent insurrection" at the U.S. Capitol building on January 6, 2021 is a pack of lies!

**People across the country who bought the "violent insurrection" pitch now know:**

* The protester known as Q Shaman was not violent, and he was actually escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

* US Capitol Police officer Brian Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

* Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Michigan and gun safety legislation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=56%2E135344%2ESkJx4t)
Friend —
Barely a month after the tragic shooting at Michigan State University, yesterday I joined former Congresswoman Gabby Giffords, as well as lawmakers, activists and hundreds of Michiganders, at Michigan’s capitol to demand real change to our gun laws.
I’ve had to attend far too many of these kinds of events, but thankfully this one follows hearings in the Michigan legislature on a package of 11 gun safety bills. These are no-brainer proposals that the vast majority of Michiganders support like universal background checks, red flag laws, and safe storage requirements.
I stood alongside advocates, survivors, students, and lawmakers, fighting to make sure gun violence prevention legislation gets the attention it deserves. These are children, some of whom have experienced two shootings at MSU and Oxford High School in less than 15 months, showing unbelievable courage to demand that *something* must change following the deaths of their friends and classmates.
We also stood in front of a group of angry protesters, who spent the day screaming at survivors of gun violence. While this group may have been loud, they don’t represent the majority of responsible gun owners in our state – in fact, they’re out of touch with the shifting sands on this issue. No reasonable person treats an 18-year-old who has just survived a school shooting like that.
The vast majority of Michiganders, regardless of party, understand that you can be a responsible gun owner and support measures to keep our kids safe. We are going to set an example here in Michigan on how to respond to tragedies like MSU with direct, meaningful legislation. This is possible because of what I’ve been saying for months: elections really matter. Michigan is quickly becoming the case study on how to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in a swing state AND on how to put a Democratic majority to good use.
I’m running for Senate because Washington desperately needs leadership like we are seeing right here, right now, in Michigan. It’s going to take a big team to win a race in a swing state like this. So what do you say?
[Can I count on you to contribute $3 to my campaign for U.S. Senate before our mid-month fundraising drive ends tonight at midnight? Every donation will help us stay on track to meet our goals before our first FEC deadline.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar23.udOA3N&refcode=em230316-1-30&t=2&akid=56%2E135344%2ESkJx4t)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-mar23.61X_bA&refcode=em230316-1-30&t=21&akid=56%2E135344%2ESkJx4t)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-mar23.cnZt3c&refcode=em230316-1-30&t=22&akid=56%2E135344%2ESkJx4t)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-mar23.KnXCHn&refcode=em230316-1-30&t=23&akid=56%2E135344%2ESkJx4t)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-mar23.uqN023&refcode=em230316-1-30&t=24&akid=56%2E135344%2ESkJx4t)**

---

---
****
Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign for Senate.
Elissa

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=56%2E135344%2ESkJx4t).

| | Our March Membership Drive ends tomorrow! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60272522/396586975/809333048?sourceid=1048776&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVlYTI4OC0xMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5nj3AH-KqhGorvohpVnWjpRPd73yqpw4sAEVByZoq4=&emci=71f5d15e-fbc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=75eea288-10c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) We opened up EMILYs List Membership for one more week — and that week ends tomorrow at midnight! **Donate today to activate your 2023 EMILYs List Membership and get a personalized membership card in the mail:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60272523/396586976/809333048?sourceid=1048776&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVlYTI4OC0xMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5nj3AH-KqhGorvohpVnWjpRPd73yqpw4sAEVByZoq4=&emci=71f5d15e-fbc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=75eea288-10c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

In 1985, the Founding Mothers of EMILYs List set an ambitious goal: we wanted to build a network of at least **1,000 members** who were committed to our mission of electing Democratic pro-choice women to every level of office. We surpassed that goal in just ten months.

Today, 38 years later, our community is now _millions-strong_ and as dedicated as ever.

Though the political landscape may look different now than it did in 1985, our mission hasn't changed a bit. EMILYs List members are still tenacious, passionate individuals committed to breaking barriers for women, fighting back against Republican extremism, and supporting incredible leaders who _get things done_.

**[**That's why I'm inviting you, Peter, to pledge your support and become an official 2023 EMILYs List member.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60272531/396586984/809333048?sourceid=1048776&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVlYTI4OC0xMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5nj3AH-KqhGorvohpVnWjpRPd73yqpw4sAEVByZoq4=&emci=71f5d15e-fbc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=75eea288-10c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**** Like you, I was furious when the conservative-packed Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ this past summer. But while far-right Republicans celebrated the decision, we rolled up our sleeves.

And because of our hard work as a community, we were able to hold the Senate, defend critical governorships, and block Republicans from enacting even more extensive and draconian abortion restrictions last cycle thanks, in large part, to investments made by EMILYs List members — people like you! Without the support and determination of our pro-choice supporters, _none_ of those victories would have been possible.

But this fight is nowhere near over. The 2023-2024 election cycle is now underway, and the battle for our democracy and autonomy continues.

**Peter, this week is your _last chance_ to become a 2023 EMILYs List member. Please donate any amount to activate your membership, help hit our total annual goal of 150,000 new and renewed members, and stand with our millions-strong pro-choice community:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Membership-Last-Chance](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60272532/396586990/809333048?sourceid=1048776&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVlYTI4OC0xMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5nj3AH-KqhGorvohpVnWjpRPd73yqpw4sAEVByZoq4=&emci=71f5d15e-fbc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=75eea288-10c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**

Thank you for your support,

Ellen R. Malcolm
Founder and Chair Emerita, EMILYs List [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60272534/396587013/809333048?sourceid=1048776&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVlYTI4OC0xMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5nj3AH-KqhGorvohpVnWjpRPd73yqpw4sAEVByZoq4=&emci=71f5d15e-fbc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=75eea288-10c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60272535/396587028/-1808286107?sourceid=1048776&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWVlYTI4OC0xMGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L5nj3AH-KqhGorvohpVnWjpRPd73yqpw4sAEVByZoq4=&emci=71f5d15e-fbc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=75eea288-10c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) \--- If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to activate your 2023 membership, thank you! body:

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441669:6t-T0MG6N:m:1:3391001263:0868C1B5AAC2980BB259B1BE4F2AC443:r)

This is important, Peter, and it's one of the reasons why I chose to reach out to YOU today.

Senate Democrats and the media want you to believe that support for conservative candidates is _fleeting_.

This is a scare tactic to keep Republican voters home so the left can HOLD their Senate majority. I'm not asking for anything special today - _**just that you use one of the secure links in this email to PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT FOR REPUBLICANS.**_

**[PLEDGE YOUR REPUBLICAN SUPPORT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441669:6t-T0MG6N:m:1:3391001263:0868C1B5AAC2980BB259B1BE4F2AC443:r)**

I informed my team earlier that your response is critical and that I need to know Republicans still have your support.

As one of my most trusted allies and a strong conservative fighter, knowing I can still count on you is critical to my efforts of winning back the Senate.

Republicans are facing an uphill battle. The Democrat machine has outraised us repeatedly.

We can't win without knowing you're still on our side and that we have your support.

**[Please, pledge your support for Republicans and help me FLIP THE SENATE MAJORITY.>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62441669:6t-T0MG6N:m:1:3391001263:0868C1B5AAC2980BB259B1BE4F2AC443:r)**

Friend — can I have two minutes of your time?
Our mid-month fundraising drive is coming to a close at MIDNIGHT tonight and we need 101 more donations before midnight.
Our goals are modest — just enough to keep our movement up and running. But these goals are our path to helping Democrats across the country win races that can bring back the Democratic House Majority.
So I’m hoping some of our top supporters, like you, will chip in $3 before midnight to get us reach those goals. [**Can you be one of them? Robert Garcia

I’ve set aside a membership card with your name on it, and you have 24 HOURS to claim it before it goes to the next patriot on our list. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC
