name: Shontel Brown
subject: It’s time to tell AG Yost enough is enough.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Democrats are fighting in Congress to protect your abortion rights.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60273733/396591784/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230316YostFR_RR_SB_90DO_4_NG_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWJkMTJjNS0xM2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pSb12I77HS4zaSPYlaNi9o5rpaE2bmDGIysiIsoeeFs=) Peter, I can’t believe this.

Ohio has one of the most restrictive abortion bans in the country, and now the GOP is attempting to take it to another level. After President Biden and the FDA moved to approve the distribution of safe and legal abortion pills nationwide, the GOP mounted their counterattack.

**Ohio Attorney General Dave Yost is leading a coalition of anti-choice states to pressure pharmacies against stocking legal abortion medications.** Worse, big pharmacies like Walgreens have already folded under the GOP’s pressure and will now not distribute abortion pills in Ohio and other states.

The GOP's radical anti-abortion laws are not only a threat to public health but also strip women of their fundamental right to personal healthcare choices. We cannot sit idly by while Republicans continue to use their power to advance their assault on abortion rights.

[**_I need your help sending a powerful message to Attorney General Yost and the GOP, Peter. We fought for these rights, but the only way to secure them is for a Democratic Congress to enact federal abortion protections that take the power away from radical GOP state legislators. clean_body: Democrats are fighting in Congress to protect your abortion rights. = Peter, I can’t believe this. Ohio has one of the most restrictive abortion bans in the country, and now the GOP is attempting to take it to another level. After President Biden and the FDA moved to approve the distribution of safe and legal abortion pills nationwide, the GOP mounted their counterattack. Ohio Attorney General Dave Yost is leading a coalition of anti-choice states to pressure pharmacies against stocking legal abortion medications. Worse, big pharmacies like Walgreens have already folded under the GOP’s pressure and will now not distribute abortion pills in Ohio and other states. The GOP's radical anti-abortion laws are not only a threat to public health but also strip women of their fundamental right to personal healthcare choices. We cannot sit idly by while Republicans continue to use their power to advance their assault on abortion rights. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = We’re in this together, Shontel Brown As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. | Peter, **I'll be LIVE SOON at 4:30PM EST for my Common Ground Podcast.** Today's topic revolves around people helping people. We'll also be discussing a series of important health solutions for your family. By working together and sharing information, resources, and experiences, individuals can make a significant impact on the health and well-being of their families and communities.
---
| | [CLICK HERE TO OPEN THE COMMON GROUND STREAM NOW (I'LL BE LIVE AT 4:30PM EDT)](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/c289b9af4c8c961925798a416502db53/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRs4M3EYlF8xB1jm0daknXZR0lE_97a0mngq4z3_sebwRCxRWxEiK408P3A3DAoJBaoqKkUcTF6-uHay_wHKikum1N02mIxq_hDzCfN17oAA0aLXHYx0nGiu0pZ0VmQc2NrfhLE87NiybdxSyHafrpxVpS2lt1CxGZDuc9pbSb6Ggqy1-JdBu5rmjqulEX26HKlai6s1vJHq2Aa42qXLZnOLw10xOBn2J5)

Joining me today are two special guests who are great examples of people that are invested in helping others. First up is Nurse Erin Pein from In Home IVs Living Water. And then, Maria Crisler, a Clinical Scientist and Microbiology Specialist.

---
|
---
| Erin Pein will be on to share her unique experience that resulted in the creation of a new business. She was a nurse at Stafford School District, and when she spoke out against the mask mandates in 2021, Erin was fired as a result. She now has her own business called In Home IVs Living Water, where she gives IVs to boost the immune system as well as other healthy injections. Maria Crisler will discuss how, in this ever-expanding digital landscape, it is almost impossible to avoid electromagnetic waves that are constantly emitted by our phones, radios, Wi-Fi and other devices. CENTROPIX is a holistic wellness solution that can shield you from these waves so you can take control of your energy, your balance, your quality of life, and your future. Make sure you [**join us now (I'll be live right at 4:30PM EST),**](https://xtz223.keap-link005.com/v2/click/592b6ed3396d80a04b543c8140db474e/eJyNj0ELgkAQhf_LnCVRs4M3EYlF8xB1jm0daknXZR0lE_97a0mngq4z3_sebwRCxRWxEiK408P3A3DAoJBaoqKkUcTF6-uHay_wHKikum1N02mIxq_hDzCfN17gAA0aLXHYx0nGiu0pZ0VmQc2NrfhLE87NiybdxSyHafrpxVpS2lt1CxGZDuc9pbSb6Ggqy1-JdBu5rmjqulEX26HKlai6s1vJHq2Aa42qXLZnOLw10xOAC2J3) Bill

body:

| | [**A progressive district attorney wants to put an innocent cop in prison for 99 years. This is a****death********sentence****. Please help!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440877:Jh8P0MGNy:m:1:3331421248:49E3670BA215D0567B53AEA2CED6DA99:r)**[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440877:Jh8P0MGNy:m:1:3331421248:49E3670BA215D0567B53AEA2CED6DA99:r) ** This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. [**A progressive district attorney, bought and paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt. Josh Blake to 99 years in prison for doing his job.**** **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440877:Jh8P0MGNy:m:1:3331421248:49E3670BA215D0567B53AEA2CED6DA99:r) If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid**** progressive**** D.A., Jose Garza will win. [**And if that happens, I'm deeply concerned Josh won't live long enough to die of old age in prison. Because violent criminals -- maybe some he arrested himself, will****murder****him.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440877:Jh8P0MGNy:m:1:3331421248:49E3670BA215D0567B53AEA2CED6DA99:r) On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. **Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?[NO! He indicted Josh and 19 other Austin police officers for committing first degree felonies!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440877:Jh8P0MGNy:m:1:3331421248:49E3670BA215D0567B53AEA2CED6DA99:r)** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. [**Sgt. Josh Blake may die behind bars because a rabid****progressive****D.A. is on a mission to destroy good cops!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440877:Jh8P0MGNy:m:1:3331421248:49E3670BA215D0567B53AEA2CED6DA99:r) And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. [**Please help save Josh's life by fully funding his crucial legal defense with your very best gift immediately.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440877:Jh8P0MGNy:m:1:3331421248:49E3670BA215D0567B53AEA2CED6DA99:r) Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke
---

| **But in 2024, you have the chance to make history. You have the chance to choose GREATNESS!**

subject: 1,254 unchecked miles of border
body:
As a result, the crime and destruction of open border policies that have been brought into many of our backyards is devastating.

| | | | The Lone Star State is under attack.... |
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4c11a9024190497ca729604b3f182abf&_e=lB_CX4rAA_qgIjwoMcj-1jIPbIwP38rPR55-oFAiY5RQVYOQbwOzfZeOzR9tv3ZSgf1EckT9YUleM9jj_U_yb0gpW98MBdH98vPLQWwwYhr0Zo5xL5N1D3ZWD6HOdXyOabJQ8B8vNt6rn_WIea2Q86azS1gZttR33uLFkET570ONKp1bbM08TBiePlnyWsXfi8n6v1Sj4b9Ypcs-G9_TzTfYh3zjVqqnnuwytRmnCKWVNrYkaiV_L_wZrnlH3dnl-tztYqBoMqS-jRLsX-xvUA%3D%3D)

Fellow American, Texas shares 1,254 miles of border with Mexico - 882 miles more than any other state. As a result, the crime and destruction of open border policies that have been brought into many of our backyards is devastating.
An estimated 1,739,000 illegal immigrants currently live in Texas.
Fentanyl overdoses in Texas have risen by 399% in just a few years.
1,245 Texans have been murdered by illegal immigrants. This isn't an issue of political party, gender, age, religion, race, or creed. This is an issue of life and death.
We must secure our border and we must defend Texas. Are you ready to defend Texas?

The assault on the freedoms and lives of Texans doesn't stop with illegal immigration and open borders.

We're also experiencing an invasion of epic propositions coming from California - _as 1 out of every new Texas resident comes from California._

And what's the first thing they do once they get here?

They vote to take our guns and open our borders. _It 's insanity_.

Don't let the slogan "Don't Mess With Texas" lose its truth.

Fight back against invasions both foreign and domestic, and save Texas.

Thank you,
Defend Texas Fund

clean_body: As a result, the crime and destruction of open border policies that have been brought into many of our backyards is devastating. | | | | The Lone Star State is under attack.... | Fellow American, Texas shares 1,254 miles of border with Mexico - 882 miles more than any other state. As a result, the crime and destruction of open border policies that have been brought into many of our backyards is devastating. An estimated 1,739,000 illegal immigrants currently live in Texas. Fentanyl overdoses in Texas have risen by 399% in just a few years. 1,245 Texans have been murdered by illegal immigrants. This isn't an issue of political party, gender, age, religion, race, or creed. This is an issue of life and death. We must secure our border and we must defend Texas. Are you ready to defend Texas? | | The assault on the freedoms and lives of Texans doesn't stop with illegal immigration and open borders. We're also experiencing an invasion of epic propositions coming from California - as 1 out of every new Texas resident comes from California. And what's the first thing they do once they get here? They vote to take our guns and open our borders. It 's insanity. Don't let the slogan "Don't Mess With Texas" lose its truth. Fight back against invasions both foreign and domestic, and save Texas. Thank you, Defend Texas Fund | Conservatives Gives 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Hoosier Republican, can you help us out?
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3eb99c16b217e6ff/c033694c93075298c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Hoosier Republican, Here’s the truth — The Biden administration and Democrats in Congress spent the first two years of his administration focused only on the priorities of the far-left, not those of
everyday Hoosiers and Americans.
Now, we’re paying for it. **Literally.**
**Their reckless spending and big government boondoggles sent prices skyrocketing,****hampered our energy production and security, and weakened our southern border.**
But last fall, the American people said **enough was enough** , and rejected this administration’s failed leadership by electing a Republican majority in the U.S. House.
And we’ve been gaining [**momentum**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3eb99c16b217e6ff/df99a7dbffd09cefc3d6b838967d376c/40313) ever since.
[**Could you please pitch in now to help us build on this momentum and send more Hoosiers****to Congress to send the Democrats packing for good?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3eb99c16b217e6ff/b9088ca13674f58ec3d6b838967d376c/40313)
Our mid-month fundraising campaign is a great way to do just that. [Follow this link to pitch in $10](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3eb99c16b217e6ff/8e28f9349703cca2c3d6b838967d376c/40313)[, $25,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3eb99c16b217e6ff/6732373f17b666dbc3d6b838967d376c/40313)[ $50,](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3eb99c16b217e6ff/10fc1cecb92c7ca4c3d6b838967d376c/40313)[ or whatever you can >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/3eb99c16b217e6ff/1288f87118ffe250c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
**Thanks in advance for any contribution you can make right now before our midnight****deadline!**
— Luke Thomas, Digital Director

clean_body: Hoosier Republican, can you help us out? | | | Hoosier Republican, Here’s the truth — The Biden administration and Democrats in Congress spent the first two years of his administration focused only on the priorities of the far-left, not those of everyday Hoosiers and Americans. Now, we’re paying for it. Literally. Their reckless spending and big government boondoggles sent prices skyrocketing,hampered our energy production and security, and weakened our southern border. But last fall, the American people said enough was enough , and rejected this administration’s failed leadership by electing a Republican majority in the U.S. House. And we’ve been gaining ever since. Our mid-month fundraising campaign is a great way to do just that. Thanks in advance for any contribution you can make right now before our midnightdeadline! — Luke Thomas, Digital Director | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. It's Congressman Greg Stanton

I'm asking you to contribute to the AZ Democratic Party as they push to raise $10,000 for their Blue Arizona Fundraising Goal. **[Please send a contribution – any amount you give will be so helpful – their way and help them hit their goal.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDL3jfMMv7xurqr8stBPvg3lNDzZjX5dm0rvyhsaMEKbiQRFh5nDzBpZ9dcHdReqeSzbuElrdw2K2JQovXvN8V3D3AiuJrrhK_nJFyc9i6VPNN0ufoiLPgo6shjJ6qBy4ZVhTEj1DjB-TUK9ptjTnQnk6YPNfXRUE0BRX-kyRdxez7fFQtTyGk7LCx_Y8GZELWXwIkSSprM5Wq7XlnJjHrzfgVf-FnyibaLXTSeRb0grd8xmqcM90alIYMYyJLpHw6O2umENrDBMTvHp57wTBQdxTzMKKLm1nMRw-RVt2dPLlyeih18gdLEKsHTaklw65RJoAXIrS73hcCSqeBU-Ak7ssm-yMj9vacRgYSprvTqCgwOFiPRwwl9rHlWXbr-xCWYRtr1LPmZM6YmiLeYxPMEQ/3uj/Xx0KSTgSQjWUE227E553EQ/h2/j4gFeujBV-Y3_QyeUTSskd5QCMgob_IPkfefU0-bERo)**

Look, the GOP in Arizona is making a mess of things, and the legislature here can't work for the people if Republicans can't get it together. That's why it's so crucial for the Arizona Democratic Party to have the grassroots support they need to flip Arizona blue.

While Democrats want nothing more than to get to work for Arizona, the AZ GOP is busier than ever, focusing on election conspiracies and spouting outright lies. Arizona deserves better than politicians focused on nonsense like that. We should be working to improve our education system, expand small businesses, and fight climate change in Arizona.

I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t critical. We need to get to work right now if we want to have any chance of flipping seats across Arizona blue. That means your support at this moment couldn't be more crucial to AZ Dem's efforts.

**[Will you join me in supporting AZ Dems by contributing $5, $10, or whatever you can spare to their $10,000 Blue Arizona Fundraising Goal? clean_body: info@azdem.org | | | AZ Dems need your support. | | | It's Congressman Greg Stanton I'm asking you to contribute to the AZ Democratic Party as they push to raise $10,000 for their Blue Arizona Fundraising Goal. Look, the GOP in Arizona is making a mess of things, and the legislature here can't work for the people if Republicans can't get it together. That's why it's so crucial for the Arizona Democratic Party to have the grassroots support they need to flip Arizona blue. While Democrats want nothing more than to get to work for Arizona, the AZ GOP is busier than ever, focusing on election conspiracies and spouting outright lies. Arizona deserves better than politicians focused on nonsense like that. We should be working to improve our education system, expand small businesses, and fight climate change in Arizona. I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t critical. We need to get to work right now if we want to have any chance of flipping seats across Arizona blue. That means your support at this moment couldn't be more crucial to AZ Dem's efforts. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Thank you, Congressman Greg Stanton Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. We’re just two months out from the 2023 Municipal, Local, and Judicial Primary Election, with even less time before the registration and mail-in ballot request deadlines.

As a voting rights organization that centers the Commonwealth’s Black, Indigenous, and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth, we know how important consistent engagement is. Without voter engagement in the primaries, candidates who best represent their values may never even get a chance. And in Allegheny and Philadelphia, this primary election really is THE election when we look at the local races including county executive and mayor. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Congressman Jamie Raskin's a national treasure, one who's endured a hell that Thomas Paine knew to "try mens' [& womens'] souls."
body:
The Blue Letter
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ef55697-ba36-4205-a74c-00963440dfc2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Blue Amp Action's insiders’ Blue Letter!_** **[Congressman Jamie Raskin's a national treasure, one who's endured a hell that Thomas Paine knew to "try mens' [& womens'] souls."](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5dd2d56-e9e7-41cb-a69c-f0ed371e26ed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_[Raskin was at the Capitol Jan 6th](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4415e666-56f6-4448-9ef4-ffa01f4b0b23/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[, when his life--and those of his colleagues--was in grave danger](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5543ca1-917a-4fe6-a1a8-6bdf41dceba4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). It was only one week after he announced his 25-yr old son, long suffering from depression, had taken his own life. And as if this weren't enough, Raskin was diagnosed with cancer--diffuse Large B-cell lymphoma--in Dec 2022, and has been going through chemotherapy. _** [Please Watch: 3 Raskin Rants That Cut Republican Hypocrites To The Core!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T515d989b-952f-4ab6-ae39-c9ff9a0cc71c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This has added to Raskin's aura. He's a brilliant constitutional scholar, passionate progressive & incredible orator, skilled at pinning Republicans down & hoisting them on their own petards. He not only rises to meet every challenge the world throws at him, but, like a superhero origin story, gets stronger. _ [Please Watch: 3 Raskin Rants That Cut Republican Hypocrites To The Core!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75138edf-4237-45cf-bb25-bcfd3b88d8c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_[Recently, Raskin's come to Congress wearing a bandanna ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T13b561ba-efb1-4ad6-bd02-6ede7bb64bab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_(due to his chemo) that he got from a famous rock star__** _ _**_(_there's an Easter Egg hint in the video thumbnail, see if you can figure it out!_)_**. [Please Watch: 3 Raskin Rants That Cut Republican Hypocrites To The Core!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5d3fe21-efb3-4f9c-986d-08810990d7d4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) — * Blue Amp Action's expanding all the time. We have newsletters, YouTubes, petitions, fundraisers & we're adding new features soon! It takes a lotta work. [Would you consider supporting us w/ a donation so we can continue giving you the best darn service possible?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tad0931f3-1cb5-4c9a-89f9-bc33217beed9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **👍👍: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blueampaction_ez](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0dfac20f-fc27-47bc-9fe2-5a4d9f73542e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) — _It wouldn't be a stretch to say it fits in perfectly with his bad-ass eloquence, including biting sarcasm, emotional delivery and an unmatched repertoire of knowledge._ **_[He's used these skills to thoroughly dismantle and embarrass the likes of Luaren Boebert and Jim Jordan. It has been glorious.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta09e8042-ac9c-433b-a6f0-4eb55e633d70/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** _[Blue Amp's compiled a recent Raskin Rants video. Watch(!!) as he strafes any Republican dumb enough to get in his way, while making a key legislative& cultural case, blowing up GOP talking points & indigestive performance art.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2fdd57a8-0df9-4240-bbf4-7d1334010c51/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ Raskin, as we said, is a national treasure. [He teaches us how to respond to every bad-faith attack with mockery--so viewers stop taking the opposition seriously--and passion, which communicates to viewers he is in the right.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa8536de-5f16-42b9-96fb-8ad48ede0ffe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Please Watch: 3 Raskin Rants That Cut Republican Hypocrites To The Core!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta15adece-3f90-4545-962c-9488fafe7976/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is a learning moment for all of us. [Watch Raskin's GOP destruction](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60c4ab05-f5a7-4cd5-9536-b921cfc8895a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [and subscribe to Blue Amp](https://default.salsalabs.org/T85edc7a9-f9ce-4523-8c3d-c3ce99491c10/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) for more! Thank you for engaging in this generational fight! [Please Watch: 3 Raskin Rants That Cut Republican Hypocrites To The Core!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T77fdec59-a479-466f-8e00-0ce3c389695f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff PS: [Subscribe to the Blue Amp Channel on Youtube!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66d6d2ab-d1d5-490d-966a-dc68d0cad564/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!! [Follow ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T859eee43-fd56-4c8b-bc62-a66e734c8fcf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [@cliffschecter on Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70de1334-270c-48c3-938f-bc2f49ab12fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Get the greatest merch right **[here at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb69ca05e-36f2-4e79-a868-9112fcc3dbc6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Have a great week, Blue Amp Action-ers!

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7085f6b1-dd74-4547-a07c-cec6b97ff58d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Peter, I have an exciting announcement and I want you to be the first to know: **I’m officially running for reelection here in Montana.** I know this race won’t be easy, but my fight for working families isn’t done yet. **[If you’re with me, please split a donation between Eric Sorensen and my campaign right now to become a Founding Donor. If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the start.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvUa2V2fBThg3ZpNKmvBEilLqiZgpUh5m2Ym17XaMJiiQTp5PpnrkEzP8ruWCq2kqx2ce-nVQnWB-qzaThDgZm1V-bJK6FOycjrg57lNcZG4E7pvXbPMI6YbC5wQ1mJvh_txMp8U2O_vvck5-vaLlvj3C6GWkOJ6cr3BgeRiP4YMw1fZQlCAYHd6tvARMFiKiBK1hHwnoPDubIwgFCtCTM0iduI3vk963WoaG7kn6-qFJ3KFrFnLiDIak9eyI0EIJCfpo0MeZr3qOZYztCzF0SU96nPvhLdQwOCIwd2jyEXQ/3uj/Qp-6yv-vRJS56Ak2Uw2kqw/h1/m3LT2MS6I22DS_pqgbgr5tjFSI4fwgcU_nYy7LFV1no)**
---

I’m not like most of my colleagues, and it’s not too hard to spot the differences. I’m the only working dirt farmer in the U.S. Senate, and damn proud of it. My wife Sharla and I still work the very same land my grandparents farmed more than 100 years ago. They didn’t know the meaning of the word “quit.” And neither do I. Our work in the Senate is not done. That’s why I’m running. It won’t be easy. Mitch McConnell and his allies see me as a top target in their fight to take back the Senate — they’re already running ads attacking me. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection right now, and experts are rating my race as a toss-up. But I know how to win tough fights. **I’ve done it before as one of the only Democrats in a red state to win in 2018 — and I’ll do it again.** **[I can’t do it without your support, Peter. Can I count on you to step up and become a Founding Donor of my reelection campaign today so I can get back to work fighting for regular folks like you and me?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvUa2V2fBThg3ZpNKmvBEilLqiZgpUh5m2Ym17XaMJiiQTp5PpnrkEzP8ruWCq2koIGVa28OdtrKGxQodVEoxAvdp7RA1svcVBdpHZYsK5hNDDEln1OfV2hddJO6nr1gC6-HVSS14KvCiO7HDg9Bn05gB4qB_8DDGj3OmxLLBhX54EFXU7q-apj6t6dcCmephZ-c4XdQi5VOHTWOChGarOhL_4xVytvHb4b_QLY04Vuesv_f_aLHiClejx_KvDOJfJfF2P2hdgWljTF9B1Bj2zJQnbR4IYG1YyaCdEWsYyfg/3uj/Qp-6yv-vRJS56Ak2Uw2kqw/h3/PVCxZXP-bbYbREZkUET65ypxa2lQ1odbm1QnOwcsY0I)**
---
[ **Donate** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xvUa2V2fBThg3ZpNKmvBEilLqiZgpUh5m2Ym17XaMJiiQTp5PpnrkEzP8ruWCq2kopXozbG6Vw5pPc_YMMHUmxFkLEmGKMVudg94tkBpVbx23VYYYr3H8r8OFtxrwtjEdHSjpz2RAER33v4hRfSRb2cfRBdSVJm_-p_tk0mDF7c2B6dPBxsItKjW8bhzRggjGrsBXpUi4MoGK8vK7k_pDv4p67fcq3070fWc7WXQrAKbWGJPECS4mjp0CzdFrxzMJu4MYCPwSBzYfMW_8nhd9ipOEnTom5b1q6U5Y5-IJtXA/3uj/Qp-6yv-vRJS56Ak2Uw2kqw/h4/OHNcVp7kM_woWJm55eIymYc7qDcdUWPHSyGN5uq0kmo)
---
I first ran for office because I didn’t see anyone sticking up for dirt farmers like me. In the years since, I’ve demanded that Washington work for the people, fought to get veterans the health care they’ve earned, and ensured Montanans have someone defending our values in the United States Senate. **And that’s exactly what I’ll continue to do when I’m reelected.** It’s been the honor of my life to represent Montana families in the United States Senate. I’m fired up and excited for the road ahead, and I’m grateful to have you by my side through it all. Thanks, Jon
---

Dear Friend, **Betsy DeVos will be in Mississippi ONE WEEK from today!**

There are only a few tickets left at our flash sale price of $30, so reserve yours now before they are all gone.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=36855adddf&e=5703353baa)

_Click on the image above to reserve a ticket!_
| As we have seen school choice on the rise throughout the last few weeks in states like Arkansas and Kentucky, we know that our country's education system is heading in the right direction. As a driving force in educational freedom, Betsy DeVos will be speaking on why Mississippi needs school choice, too.

You can reserve your ticket to this extraordinary event [here](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=30e0d4edb6&e=5703353baa).

Aaron Rice

Nancy Pelosi, Liz Cheney, and Democrats on the January 6th Committee knowingly and blatantly lied to the faces of the American people. **_→ They deceptively edited videos to fit their narrative_** **_→ They withheld critical video evidence_** **_→ They released footage without the permission of Capitol police. _** This isn’t just bad politics –**it’s a betrayal of their oath of office and the American people’s trust.** I believe we’re only just beginning to unravel Pelosi’s tenure of lies as Speaker. **But what’s more important is accountability.**[**_I AGREE >>_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=43b7fb2ba2b84ae2ab57d274b4a1701f&_e=UYKJei91uJQULA4Z6F_AxryBR5aUrPQXfaHdOwTF_xoSgVH4YyIFJtakQIRBheiDUxzoK9b6dKxQJsV5RQ-O-TlctS8EqR6ZrqR5ZqpmTFTuQQsYYAyh-lAJ9iKhDCNAXRvkJQT8txIriZYQkmvyajzrXq7uAvzsDPGJ8-icB-f4ZS1WzZ0lRxpZwtS3YVYU8GIzKoJtbjwAVTR2sVhddt1f0yL8EqpuHQPfXYNE5FD923qCvOIjM-6_UgZKeLyxKREPbR7IDiSOJh9XwSbi6We6lqr_rVi80MzuwMKK48J2iwYrtx5uhsbIUrpUkb1AKfk0wVsbu1Fggp90dqtrklcfHzdVgNbLgJeajZTf70Y%3D) Peter, these revelations mean nothing unless we take serious action to make government accountable to the American people again. Friend, it’s Ben Wikler, the Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. On April 4, Wisconsinites will vote to fill an open seat on the state Supreme Court— a crucial election that will determine whether that body will have a conservative or a progressive majority until 2025. This race could shape decisions on abortion access, voting rights, election subversion, legislative district lines, and so much more—**and could have a larger effect on the 2024 presidential race than any other contest in the country this year.** The Wisconsin Supreme Court election is just weeks away, and my team just got devastating news: **We found out MAGA-backed groups are officially outspending progressives on TV ads.** With so much at stake in these moments of the cycle, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you, friend, to help my team at WisDems fight back with a donation of any amount. **[C an you donate now to make sure commonsense candidate Janet Protasiewicz wins our state Supreme Court election? >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z4l4el4U9iAHrPxd3d0OP-RZ5h0to4OFS8TSKFbBPFzVzqjaDuJQiu2Q4G6pfDiNdD0D7oSYML7uGUp8YyHDp2cmkhizKkHRswh3izPUqHQebK_mI2ovZjU3_gFai0oIFqij5IFMhwh7_1uPg_QxWP0qLXU31LRnKWlicIW7uLQD2lLiTMi2Q0Mza887lXKmERK9k-LChTMYVVEboZbBEZJG5rZ7k9FKC4hfnQoh-coauZkwu0BLa8boLlx5ihCkKgz-CiBuMIMe4fXom-8w_-NDBIeKystVvO4waQvVGboBs_NEugvppXf6Fa6LZKy7u_Qb39jP_Ilv2KVC8cp5DtwJP4SFBEF7E1z6zqJCqrmirTpdCGGNM4__nwPBI37-DSJEt1Zw2vSFu5dn4JIpjGYZXZtbUS1LqbPiuTEPw3zg/3uj/mHdTTFRCTFqb4nIbZ4GDdQ/h2/C2fK5Qp1zRQj4pAXaCiUvhugqXkNzYHSFazXtSMvvDw)**
---
[ **Support Us** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z4l4el4U9iAHrPxd3d0OP-RZ5h0to4OFS8TSKFbBPFzVzqjaDuJQiu2Q4G6pfDiNdD0D7oSYML7uGUp8YyHDp2cmkhizKkHRswh3izPUqHQebK_mI2ovZjU3_gFai0oIHkAG09HdswexB-C-PH-XOeFxsaF7DkqoB1TpZq9ngpmE3R6eqOpMBa09PdTrvQQiLn_RpAuYECpcslkdzA7x4uu0er_B6jHEHUt7Vz-VvHOTgvFLrk9j5HhjCROzS2XCJV8wBMQmszrMlCPFz9q6by7U8Wz4T9eNoiWYK2ZZYvxxkcDQLCNUdfZQCoVg-BhO0OuK11vyOhZjfGIyGC6aSF-XiCYLyPkARqXwwoxgJW_3uUf2Gah1s2J3ZZ1A4uiRTvz5RuGdQQjl2f9hTGz4Y0FLjzAgHs2GTEHuOEZT5yYA/3uj/mHdTTFRCTFqb4nIbZ4GDdQ/h3/rd-m-DseDyQHIDwOplYm7U8q13QKk9nqkhtFZTvkgvI)

So much is on the line for Wisconsin and the nation ahead of our April election: **** Abortion access. Fair maps. American democracy. **If Dan Kelly wins this state Supreme Court election, my team is convinced he’ll continue to hold Wisconsin back on all of these issues****.** We can’t let Dan Kelly or his MAGA millionaires sway this election with misleading ads! **** Our priorities are on the ballot, friend, and I need a surge of support in this critical moment. **[Can you donate now so my team at WisDems can fight back against these attacks?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z4l4el4U9iAHrPxd3d0OP-RZ5h0to4OFS8TSKFbBPFzVzqjaDuJQiu2Q4G6pfDiNdD0D7oSYML7uGUp8YyHDp2cmkhizKkHRswh3izPUqHQebK_mI2ovZjU3_gFai0oIFelUSbosMNuHwE5Y4x8RG1YQz9Duj_-bvDZe5Gp6WGWwBnMyI9ZWxRSlvBYgQ1ge27U9b03eOvWXXMA4q8Vg-rjak-54vBU_mT0R2LXexh4PwPLHW3U_S6XhrCVMjQ4m-PeqxX_eOuyPDHUVH1wZ-fVDUaosAwcH3JRDEaN7xo5LqQsaLHE28nrV_lhbWCRLe9GoewwG1HhYBlMa2Rak_TXBEFrSuFcX1SxtzICc_aV6UIQDoRiv2lHpvxtuuypqrtPvcpePvRo06v8ct3uO9DR-CqMgLd-MssO1W7K7vRmA/3uj/mHdTTFRCTFqb4nIbZ4GDdQ/h4/OVBwD8uOHYvV3CPzpJvT95UxiuyuI9xcp12bntQEtTY)** **** We can’t win this pivotal election without you, friend. In a moment, [_**I’m going to ask you to split a donation between my campaign and HER Time ahead of our first public fundraising deadline of the year**._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60286819/396611275/-523917261?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20230316_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWIxNzA3NDMtMjBjNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_2U062-qa7rJ9uy3NfbpYX9AKtYwnk-Wqk0id-LQbv4=) But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why this donation is so important, especially right now. Shortly after, that report will be made public — and everyone from Mitch McConnell to Wisconsin Republicans will be looking to see how much we have raised and how many people chipped in over the last quarter. With my seat up for re-election next year, our numbers will be under close watch. | | | **Yes, it's a scary world, and yes, we need to defend ourselves, but... could we please[ stop giving the Pentagon money it doesn't need and didn't ask for](https://default.salsalabs.org/T10b23b77-11c4-452e-a807-94ecc0577173/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)?** _" It's budget season in Washington, so you know what that means — time for another huge increase in the Pentagon's budget for things they don't need or haven't even asked for. This year, the White House has asked for a staggering $886 billion for the Pentagon, a $28 billion increase from last year. That increase is more than the entire budget for the EPA! And Congress has signaled it's going to ask for even MORE on top of that!"_ What makes this especially crazy is that _ _ Congress is still routinely [pushing spending and weapons systems that the armed forces do not want](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te16c7f99-26fb-418f-bca9-b934380963b9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Seriously, can we restore some sanity to this process? name: Cindy Cerquitella
subject: I promise you, this is an email unlike any other you will receive today.
body:
Do you know why the Left has been so successful lately?

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29af6b59bd0c452998ba26df11302f7b&_e=Myqo-Nv_rhkM5_XMXuMVQqC11aOvB0HXCZ2NfLTSGaYoIl60UeCT1dhcXXBT9plqt2pm_ovqoNe55WhBh3paxx80ViMWw8ybYEEhu5EPDweHN5B-r8iBXOwSZyk4qOSi9sdvpF340FB-o4p-sjPRxzz4gZuMLW5h37dpY9acM5nZvyXj76sblB1UFks5t2bnxFfR8DdYXvFwoQFK8X7aj-SBiPWmv00zDECdBn-5TRt29ixLUsSkylrn4ufkz-My0FIBmqVaEe6qgP7__-J2ORbnN4Nk1MQgYBHwIgILoRM%3D)

Friend,

Do you know why the Left has been so successful lately?

It's because they take care of their own.

It doesn't matter who they are. The Left finds a way to include them as part of a bigger movement.

**Sadly, conservatives desperately lack this camaraderie. Until now ...**

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29af6b59bd0c452998ba26df11302f7b&_e=Myqo-Nv_rhkM5_XMXuMVQqC11aOvB0HXCZ2NfLTSGaYoIl60UeCT1dhcXXBT9plqt2pm_ovqoNe55WhBh3paxx80ViMWw8ybYEEhu5EPDweHN5B-r8iBXOwSZyk4qOSi9sdvpF340FB-o4p-sjPRxymKhKfXmxBIjZJMfrM_JjeUrjTTZGWZeCKLVHe_J6AkNt86FlZlx66vHxKWRujA0lFgjRmjrnsWVIRLSA5Fu4hcRB4IvRxdRvn65Y2MP1Jp2BwIq71YrxOQPNn4Ir3hvxh5ml8ZVXlM3aLd2-LA6ZQ%3D)
America's Future provides this and more. **America 's Future is building a community for freedom fighters** to support them personally and professionally.

[_**Please consider giving a gift of $50, $35, or even just $10 today. Even a small donation can make a big difference. Click here to show your support >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29af6b59bd0c452998ba26df11302f7b&_e=Myqo-Nv_rhkM5_XMXuMVQqC11aOvB0HXCZ2NfLTSGaYoIl60UeCT1dhcXXBT9plqt2pm_ovqoNe55WhBh3paxx80ViMWw8ybYEEhu5EPDweHN5B-r8iBXOwSZyk4qOSi9sdvpF340FB-o4p-sjPRx_TjfkaODjtLobDk5fwYc9A6he6cj-x3zWtwxTQWsf_dY-dqTgvJ4uc2glsXBVu2hh5_3WJ7VeiInliy7ns_lE9sNqatP5M_i7YOEO_Y5YfdwgMVl89L82XXp1SvE6pfwcCMmSW81IvvWX9yg5FQDYU%3D)

Good talent is hard to find. And once found, that talent needs to be retained and cultivated.

**America 's Future is the next step in the pipeline for young freedom fighters.**

Our members include-
* Veterans
* **Recent college graduates from programs like Young Americans for Liberty**
* Small business owners
* Conservative activists

And thanks to America's Future, even though they live across the country and work in different sectors, they can all work towards the same goal: continuing the fight for freedom! **We 've helped place hundreds of AF members into positions in politics, government, and at non-profits.**

One of our missions is to empower young people to become the freedom fighters and leaders their community needs.

And by building up lifelong advocates, supporting young professionals, and building a robust community that believes in freedom, America's Future can turn the tide where it matters most.

[_**You 're helping ensure that the next generation of freedom leaders is ready to carry this fight forward. Click here to support America's Future >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29af6b59bd0c452998ba26df11302f7b&_e=Myqo-Nv_rhkM5_XMXuMVQqC11aOvB0HXCZ2NfLTSGaYoIl60UeCT1dhcXXBT9plqt2pm_ovqoNe55WhBh3paxx80ViMWw8ybYEEhu5EPDweHN5B-r8iBXOwSZyk4qOSi9sdvpF340FB-o4p-sjPRxz4DI5GMlAh7VDXq-ZNBF4zJKXD1mzepzsPUPcij749595d3IT60oxNtZo-RK-m5tEUA9nZnbpQ1o1gvpgvMQPP4gszeV84ETrWIca_WqrD4kvfDCB3Jk7TXw-Jq-cUlux-0nkzoAXu6Pf5ySrk6uO4%3D)

While many groups reach out to young people while they are in college, AF is the only one focused on young professionals once they've entered the workforce.

America's Future stands out from other organizations by helping freedom fighters reach their full potential!

Not only do we help the next generation of leaders develop skills to fight for freedom in their communities. Our programs provide up-and-coming champions for freedom with professional development, networking, and mentorship opportunities.

We are teaching them how to position themselves to advance their careers now so they can become decision-makers in their workplaces.

**That way, they can fight to advance freedom both personally and professionally.**

I've set a goal to reach 250 new donors this month to support America's Future's development programs.

Can you help me meet my goal before the end of the month? **Click below to donate.**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29af6b59bd0c452998ba26df11302f7b&_e=Myqo-Nv_rhkM5_XMXuMVQqC11aOvB0HXCZ2NfLTSGaYoIl60UeCT1dhcXXBT9plqt2pm_ovqoNe55WhBh3paxx80ViMWw8ybYEEhu5EPDweHN5B-r8iBXOwSZyk4qOSiJkjFraMpDxDTh5GdKPER4mCVMv28pZjyrnQu40JoUM0L1kCgZ_NGIFInvVVGEvOcwArqfFtksHa7BxpHE7dW52W3DUmfF2L_yw35wSDA2XjKdOrSyqpNKqSBmgrzlSUtw8SBD2EbUux-A6HlM2fYpZ4pA_7lGQt7U5X07YVLskfUEhzZp651mH2wSnfv70kg)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=29af6b59bd0c452998ba26df11302f7b&_e=Myqo-Nv_rhkM5_XMXuMVQqC11aOvB0HXCZ2NfLTSGaYoIl60UeCT1dhcXXBT9plqt2pm_ovqoNe55WhBh3paxx80ViMWw8ybYEEhu5EPDweHN5B-r8iBXOwSZyk4qOSiPUPXdNF663X5LTTeW7MS1pkmPrsW6Ngq2a6ERacl-O4SZVIe-zyg1VGQRJAO65jzPl6ik3T00PmU9wXFO2T0v-mSqs0rxNSns46Gp22z99XrIDdTuwSSOvvpCRTAeyqpbcn4R8KlxXPFDf9v3vDi0QX4cDKnCbPuMFLfTpoVhqqMm-thaeez12GPMe9cSW-C)

Senate Democrats and the media want you to believe that support for conservative candidates is _fleeting._ This is a scare tactic to keep Republican voters home so the left can HOLD their Senate majority. clean_body: Can you lend a hand? | | | | | We wish we were writing you with better news, Friend— We learned last night that Team Kean is BEHIND on our EOQ fundraising goal ...And with this being Tom’s very FIRST quarterly fundraising deadline as a sitting Congressman, it’s of utmost importance that we hit it. Tom has been working around the clock to be a strong voice for New Jersey in Congress, We’re running out of time, so we’re calling on you to help us regain lost ground before the BIG deadline at the end of the month. It is CRITICAL that we hit this first goal, and with Tom busy in DC, we need grassroots donors like you to help us make up lost ground before it’s too late. Thanks for your help,Kean Finance Team | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2023 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is: Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. The end of the quarter marks our first filing deadline of 2023 — which means our fundraising numbers will be made public. Believe me... nothing would make Democrats, their rich donors, and their media allies happier than seeing a dismal number from my campaign. **Why? ** **Because I’m fighting for you, not them. ** This year, I’m fighting to... **stop illegal immigrants from voting** in our elections... **to wipe Critical Race Theory out** of our schools and military... and to **keep violent criminals behind bars** where they belong. body:
| | | Peter, The Woke Mob is waging a full on war against our children. Kids across the country are being chemically castrated by the same drugs that are used to punish rapists. It was revealed that not only are schools encouraging children to use these drugs, BUT they're hiding it from parents. **The radical left is brainwashing our children, indoctrinating them, and now CASTRATING them. ** And Tucker Carlson is spot on... **He said, "Parents want to know if their children are being CASTRATED." ** **[_Will you join Tucker, me, and the 1776 Project PAC by making a donation TODAY?_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440912:J2tljzGNq:m:1:3331421248:172C4FFD4A60324AECBB096DEB0EABBC:r) **Together, we can STOP the woke mob who are harming our children by targeting school board races across the country and flipping them from liberal to conservative. Our children can't fight this fight on their own. They need us now more than ever before. They're young, they're impressionable, and the radical left knows that. They're preying on our children day in and day out in their own classrooms.
I remember a time when the classroom was a safe haven. It was a place for learning, broadening your horizons, and expanding your knowledge.
Now it's a war zone and we can't send our children into battle alone. Our kids need you and me to stand up to the radical left on their behalf and STOP this madness once and for all. Thank you, Ryan Girdusky 1776 Project PAC

Larry Hogan led the nation as one of the first governors to ban TikTok on government devices. body:
| This is our second attempt to contact you. **According to our records, your signature on our urgent vote‐by‐mail petition is MISSING.**

_Without enough signatures from top Democrats, we won’t be able to prove that real voters like you STAND with Jon Ossoff in demanding the voting rights of EVERY American!_

The GOP is already enacting voter suppression laws across the country, but vote-by-mail would stop their evil voter suppression scheme in its tracks!

So please, click the button below and take one minute to sign our petition: | [SIGN HERE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_Jan2022?source=VPP_20230316_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=6736%2E878179%2E7FcVk-)
---
Heather G.
Executive Director at Voter Protection Project
* * *
**BREAKING! BREAKING! BREAKING!** [_Georgia Senator Jon Ossoff files the first bill in U.S. history to ever GUARANTEE the voting rights of EVERY American_](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_Jan2022?source=VPP_20230316_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=6736%2E878179%2E7FcVk-) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_Jan2022?source=VPP_20230316_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=6736%2E878179%2E7FcVk-) | [30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: STAND WITH JON OSSOFF, PASS THIS BILL!](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_Jan2022?source=VPP_20230316_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=6736%2E878179%2E7FcVk-)
---
Team, Senator Ossoff is AMAZING -- he just filed one of the _most comprehensive voting reform bills in HISTORY!!_

But Republicans are already coming out of the woodwork to keep this bill from going anywhere!

_They’re desperate to keep the loopholes in place so they can keep cheating and WINNING!_

[We need a groundswell of support to get this bill through. PLEASE, ADD YOUR NAME IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/Ossoff_Voting_Rights_Jan2022?source=VPP_20230316_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=6736%2E878179%2E7FcVk-)

_VPP_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=6736%2E878179%2E7FcVk-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=6736%2E878179%2E7FcVk-).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=6736%2E878179%2E7FcVk-) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=6736%2E878179%2E7FcVk-). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=6736%2E878179%2E7FcVk-)

subject: Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race, and what it means for state Democrats →
body:
In a moment, we’ll get you up to speed on what’s happening in Wisconsin and what it could mean for state Democrats | | |
---
| | **Here’s what you should know:**
1. _Hundreds_ of GOP state legislators and officials promoted the election fraud claims that led to Trump’s January 6th insurrection.
2. Trump’s election-denying crony Daniel Kelly just advanced in Wisconsin’s pivotal Supreme Court race that will have an important impact on abortion access and elections in the state.
3. The outcome of this Supreme Court race could give us the chance to un-gerrymander Wisconsin – giving Democrats their best chance in over a decade to pick up seats in the state's legislature.

State-level races are overlooked and underfunded – making them especially vulnerable to Republicans’ outsized spending. **That means we have to put in the work _now_ to make sure we're ready to elect Democrats who will defend our rights and fight back against Republican extremism in statehouses nationwide.** [Will you chip in $7, $25, or whatever fits your budget today to give state Democrats the resources they need to WIN in states like Wisconsin? body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8464?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank&t=1009&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

It’s happening again. Donald Trump, with the
help of corporate Democrats and the massively influential financial
industry, rolled back critical protections against economic collapse that
became law after the great recession.

Just five years later, we’re seeing a wave of banking failures that
threaten the stability of our economy and threaten to plunge working
families into economic chaos.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8464?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank&t=1010&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]That’s why we’re launching a new fund to pressure Congress to listen to
Bernie and take action to put the 2008 safeguards back in place. Can we
count on you to donate now to help us pressure Congress to act urgently to
avoid another catastrophic economic collapse?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8466?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank&t=1011&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8467?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank&t=1012&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8468?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank&t=1013&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8469?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank&t=1014&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8470?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank&t=1015&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8471?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank&t=1016&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

The Senate and the House both have bills to fix these problems, but
billionaire bankers are doing everything they can to stop them. As credit
card debt surges to record levels for working people trying to survive the
corporate greed of price gouging, we can’t delay.

That’s why we must act now while the Silicon Valley and Signature Bank
collapses are still fresh in the news cycle. Bank lobbyists will spend
enormous resources trying to convince us that the problem is anything but
deregulation, but we all know the truth.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8464?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank&t=1017&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]Please donate now to help us take on the power of the banking industry
in Washington. We were able to kill the Dirty Deal 3 times last year over
the fierce opposition of the oil industry, and with your support, we can
defeat the big banks as well!

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5923?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank.NPUQYz&t=1001&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]Our membership card

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank.pOcWw6&t=1002&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing as a 2023 Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $10 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230316_FR_Congress_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_BigBank.TyXRoM&t=1003&akid=4124%2E5885482%2Etc5yCr ]GIVE MONTHLY

# Bank Collapse, 2024 watch, TikTok ban and more...
I fill you in on all the latest thats really driving the news this week on Monday’s episode of Beyond the Briefing. Check it out if you haven’t already:

| [Listen now](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=072f80b4b2&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
And don’t miss the brand new episode this morning with Newsmax White House correspondent, James Rosen.

| [Listen here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8985581862&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
---
# ICYMI: President Trump's endorsement of my kids book...
Our children are constantly surrounded by lies in media and pop culture. We need to teach them how to discern the truth. That's why I partnered with BRAVE Books to write a brand new children's book that teaches kids the dangers of fake news and how quickly a story can get twisted around.
Get my book _The Parrots Go Bananas!_ AND _Elephants Are Not Birds_ for $1.00 when you subscribe to the Freedom Island Book Club! Just use code "FakeNews" to claim this great deal.
Teach your kids how to discern the truth when you get your copy of my book today!
| [Get My Book Here!](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=53b87ca174&e=f6564bbe3b)

# Stories I’m Reading...
[GOP primary debates should be with conservative media ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6536785f61&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Washington Times opinion
[Federal manhunt underway for man who was former Gov. Larry Hogan’s chief of staff](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=ddca3e802e&e=f6564bbe3b) \- via CBS News
[Three reasons to doubt Biden’s story on is father and a gay kiss ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1734030f57&e=f6564bbe3b)— via The Washington Post
You know it’s bad when The Washington Post calls him out.
[Who Needs the MSM? ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b0f5f6dfd9&e=f6564bbe3b)— via The Dispatch
[Hallie Biden revealed as ‘new’ Biden family member who got China cash](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=73d1284473&e=f6564bbe3b) — via New York Post
[House Oversight Chair Rep James Comer quietly subpoenas bank records for Hunter Biden business associates](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8c738c78d4&e=f6564bbe3b) — via CNN
[A third former House GOP candidate alerted to unapproved military records request ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=dc00b0b8c8&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Politico

name: American Update
subject: Sen. Warren Fails To Endorse V.P. Harris As Biden’s 2024 Running Mate
body:
V.P. Kamala Harris Dodges Questions About Her Responsibilities

| |
---
|
---
---
| | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652239%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u3o8IbuhL5cNiYphPqnhrQ&sysid=1)

| [ Sen. Warren Fails To Endorse V.P. Harris As Biden’s 2024 Running Mate ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652232%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GY08XFkwpqAS88rHbcu3Kg&sysid=1)
---
[ Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) has reportedly been ignored by Vice President Kamala Harris after failing to endorse Harris as President Joe Biden’s running mate in 2024. Warren has reportedly attempted to apologize twice to Harris for her comments, but Harris has not returned her calls. During a Boston Public Radio interview in January, Warren seemed to hesitate when asked if Harris should be Biden’s running mate, stating that she wanted to defer to what makes Biden comfortable with his team. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c652233%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7NWKpHIXRmiA2MLc3kQ9mA&sysid=1)

name: Marina Jenkins
subject: Exciting news for the NDRC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
this is a huge moment for our grassroots movement
|
---

Team, I’m excited to announce new leadership roles at the NDRC: I will be taking over as Executive Director, and my colleague John Bisognano will be the NDRC’s next president.

Since 2017, grassroots supporters like you helped the NDRC lead the fair maps movement across the country. As a result, we witnessed a historically successful redistricting cycle, and helped secure the fairest U.S. House maps in 40 years.

name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440964:6_xhNzGMN:m:1:3331421248:3B65F8F4FA26DD06500EB347229F0E5D:r)

Peter,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440964:6_xhNzGMN:m:1:3331421248:3B65F8F4FA26DD06500EB347229F0E5D:r)

**Support the January 6th Defendants**

**Goal:** $33,000
**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donation: PENDING

[Donate >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440964:6_xhNzGMN:m:1:3331421248:3B65F8F4FA26DD06500EB347229F0E5D:r) ****

**

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

If they were _ "insurrectionists," _then why were some of them being led around by police officers instead of being arrested?

_What else are they lying about?_

I know they don't want us to find any evidence that the FBI was provoking the protesters into rioting. We need to make sure all FBI involvement in Jan. 6 is released to the public.

And they used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they need your help to set them free.

[_**I am raising $33,000 to fund our legal battles to support the January 6th defendants in court. Will you send a gift of any amount today? Click here to show your support >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440964:6_xhNzGMN:m:1:3331421248:3B65F8F4FA26DD06500EB347229F0E5D:r)

I know all about this firsthand. I've seen how the Department of Justice and the government work. I've even been on the receiving end of their spying.

This is just the beginning.

The Deep State wants to turn you against anyone who speaks out against their influence. They are trying to manipulate you into believing their version of events.

**Please send your urgent donation today to fund our new America First organization to defend our supporters in the courts. **
**
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440965:6_xhNzGMN:m:1:3331421248:3B65F8F4FA26DD06500EB347229F0E5D:r)
[_**Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate $2,500 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62440964:6_xhNzGMN:m:1:3331421248:3B65F8F4FA26DD06500EB347229F0E5D:r)**
****
** **
****
Thank you,

Kash Patel

name: Cori Bush Media Alert
subject: Fox News is at it again…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
When Fox attacks Cori, we get political attacks, hate mail, and death threats.
#
Peter, Fox News is at it again...
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230316.xNwZIb&amount=5&refcode=em20230316-2342&t=1&akid=2342%2E1082990%2EGtbL5o)
We refuse to reshare the talking points that this “energy expert” used to try and defend his previous writings — which included doubling down on his baseless claims about Western culture being superior to all other cultures.
What matters at the end of the day is that Fox brought someone bought-and-paid-for by the fossil fuel industry to come on their show and attack Cori. It’s another stark reminder that when Cori speaks truth to power, the right-wing extremists at Fox get _scared._
Here’s why that matters, Peter: **Whenever Fox attacks Cori like this, Cori and our team get an influx of political attacks, hate mail, and death threats.**
**[Can you help our team fight back against these senseless and targeted attacks by rushing your first $5 donation today? Showing your support for Cori and our movement is one of the best ways to combat the GOP’s hateful rhetoric.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230316.xNwZIb&amount=5&refcode=em20230316-2342&t=2&akid=2342%2E1082990%2EGtbL5o)**

Thanks for your continued support. It means so much to Cori and our team to know you have our backs.
—Team Cori

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: Willis Match Status: [3X Match Active]
body:
__Supporter Status: PENDING. |
---

|
Peter -- on Tuesday, House Republicans introduced their signature dirty energy package, H.R. 1, and are now barrelling towards a high-stakes vote on a bill that could cause irreversible damage to the environment if it were to become law.

We are expecting a House vote that would remove permitting requirements on toxic waste storage. Requirements to open up public land for oil and gas drilling -- while gutting the rights of communities to give input on those projects. _Even requiring new dirty energy infrastructure like pipelines._********

We need to respond to their attacks... _but how much we can raise right now will make or break our ability to keep campaigning.____****_

A group of donors has put up a triple match fund that is ACTIVE until the end of the month. Peter -- we haven't heard from you yet -- so we're asking:______

[TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT: All gifts made by March 31 in support of our campaign will go three times as far. Can you make a donation to fund our campaigns today? Even $5 helps.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

| | **
** **League of Conservation Voters
Spring Match Campaign**

**Goal:** $40,000
**Progress:** 30%

**TRIPLE MATCH:** [_ACTIVE -- CLAIM OFFER NOW >>_](https://links.messages.lcv.)
**CAMPAIGN SUPPORTER STATUS:** _PENDING_

[Join our campaign, even $5 gets us closer to our goal >>](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
---|---|---

We cannot guarantee the health of our planet and those who inhabit it unless we win campaigns like this one, Peter. We _must_ stop Republicans in Congress from turning back the clock on addressing climate change at the speed and scale that science demands.

**We can beat this anti-environmental bill, but that can only happen if members of Congress hear from the environmental movement now, before Speaker McCarthy holds a vote and in the coming weeks.** We need to make sure that they hear from us, so we can stop them in the Senate and ensure polluters and their lobbyists won't be able to rewrite our most important environmental laws.

---
**[**TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT:
STOP THE GOP'S
DIRTY ENERGY BILL >>**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

[We're counting on supporters like you to help reach our $40,000 fundraising goal. TRIPLE your impact by making a gift today. _Don 't miss this opportunity_ __ -- even $5 brings us closer to our goal.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thank you for standing with us at this critical moment. Our movement is strongest when we speak together, with one voice, demanding a better future for our planet and our environment.

Onward,

LCV Membership Team
Alex, Annie and Norita

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9299901&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDQyNzU4OQS2&spReportId=MTcwMDQyNzU4OQS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9299901&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTcwMDQyNzU4OQS2&spReportId=MTcwMDQyNzU4OQS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_Rc9-) |

| | Hello , We all know that sleep is a pillar of health. But actually getting a restful night's sleep can be somewhat of a mystery. At Sleep Foundation, we're excited to provide you with [curated, timely tips for a better night's rest](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=TkVdrPNxuhJ01OVeLW3Zmb7oVphrhlinOUEn7YLa7D4mPSb2-2BH1IRcjtIurJd1nCQTYlFrTr3v92KSC9JAFGEy2amieEQHBAwDfTyM3-2Fp76qFefaFVhRLAyEKl5-2BMESvHNHnnYSF-2FHs1j03Z2Pe-2B8A2xGquPmy-2F9Qiyn0-2F-2FRCqwEgjluutmKJe0SvnhxUEO-2BJAn2m3RdjNt1W75lZwxgPQgPlH-2B3dkjurflB-2BfNapjk-3DKQ3p_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi78Xduz-2FD91HfBtIPwFV2QXPSli9Am6fMnuQwCxrqZcjOtzkomz3imp65t1RTAAwpwOhXFRujQKJmnPbVMMTPnJ-2FgZ93IqPhhgN8kqe9qN7NwPjUGdhFgn-2FXd0-2FlTEUlPAbMHhL-2BGolDfKgXeaEapx6VbsqdCZBr3D5CNy8FGb7yf9MmLY8rQd8ucJOgHM1V-2BbJUMtIUDQEVodxpFNQLliVgZEfZ4rOgoDI9ixZB-2F02B-2BZfpvz2NGDhVawS-2Fpx-2FyTFxPcOXMe0h-2FaORYXvJbrxSx0Jxye2E8NJ424Zegl3i4yuQ6o9bqm8EQQ8I1BAv-2Bb8). You'll also hear from the top sleep experts about how sleep and life are so intertwined, even beyond getting the recommended seven to nine hours of shut-eye. **Whether you're looking for information about sleep disorders, trusted product reviews, or data-driven stories about how we sleep, we've got you covered.** Visit SleepFoundation.org to build your foundation for a good night's sleep.

name: Lucas Kunce HQ
subject: “Josh Hawley thinks you’re too stupid to realize Tucker Carlson is lying to you”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
This ran in the Kansas City Star, Missouri’s biggest newspaper.
#
Peter,
Josh Hawley was grateful when Tucker Carlson tried to convince viewers that he wasn’t actually a fraud and a coward for running away from the same rioters he raised his fist for on January 6th.
**But folks in Missouri aren’t going to let him get away with it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29221?refcode=em20230316-2864&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2864%2E614464%2E7PGjUg)
**[HELP LUCAS DEFEAT HAWLEY »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29221?refcode=em20230316-2864&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2864%2E614464%2E7PGjUg)**
Josh can’t run away from the truth. January 6th is the day he proved who he really is — a fraud and a coward who’s willing to jeopardize American lives and even our democracy if it means he’ll get a little more power for himself, then run away when things get tough.
**Missourians deserve better than a fraud and a coward representing them in the U.S. Senate.** That’s why Lucas launched this campaign to replace Josh Hawley — and it’s why he’ll spend every day between now and Election Day working to expose Hawley to Missouri voters. But we need your help to get it done:
**[Can you chip in $10 or more right now so we’ll have the resources to get Lucas’ message in front of voters and cut through Hawley’s misinformation? We have a real shot to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat, and your early support could make all the difference.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/29221?refcode=em20230316-2864&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2864%2E614464%2E7PGjUg)**

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: re: My recipe for black bean soup
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Did you see Katie’s email from last week?
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19474%2E3422442%2E42t5fQ)
Did you see Katie’s email about meal planning from last week, Derek?
**[By making a donation of $5 or more towards Katie’s campaign today, you’ll not only join our movement, but also receive Katie’s exclusive budget-friendly recipes (like her black bean soup!). Donate by this Friday in order to receive the recipes!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230316-1?amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode=EMAF16_1_REC_20230316_V1_F&refcode2=19474_3422442_42t5fQ&akid=19474%2E3422442%2E42t5fQ)**
**[Send Me Katie's Recipes ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230316-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF16_1_REC_20230316_V1_F&refcode2=19474_3422442_42t5fQ&akid=19474%2E3422442%2E42t5fQ)**
Thanks for your support,
Team Katie Porter
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Katie Porter [info@katieporter.com]
Date: Fri, Mar 10, 2023
Subject: My recipe for black bean soup
To: Derek [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Derek,
As a single mom with three kids and a budget, I cook from scratch a lot. And while cooking meals is honestly not nearly as fun as whiteboarding witnesses, I do love seeing happy children when they come to the dinner table. I have a big bell, with a wooden ringer, that I clang to summon the kids downstairs. I know they heard it because I hear the thundering down the hallway.
**But when I’m in Washington, I cannot cook dinner, and my first year in Congress there was a lot of complaining—even about pizza!** My kids want their mom’s cooking, and they want it nearly every night, regardless of where the demands of my job require me to be.
**The solution is aggressive meal planning.** On the days I fly to D.C. for votes and hearings, I get up at 5:30 a.m. I quickly get ready for the plane and then prepare a dinner for the kids to enjoy that night. It’s always a slow cooker recipe or something that can sit in the fridge until the kids cook it. Favorites include pot roast, my grandma Doris’s meatballs, baked potato bar, chili, and a pepperoncini beef. **[(Contribute $5 or more by next Friday and I’ll send you some recipes!).](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230316-1?amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode=EMAF16_1_REC_20230316_V1_F&refcode2=19474_3422442_42t5fQ&akid=19474%2E3422442%2E42t5fQ)**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230316-1?amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode=EMAF16_1_REC_20230316_V1_F&refcode2=19474_3422442_42t5fQ&akid=19474%2E3422442%2E42t5fQ)
Last week, it was black bean soup, and as you see from the meal plan, I have learned to be specific. **Just like with government witnesses, I sometimes have to spell out how to do the job, even if it seems obvious.** “Take out bay leaves” comes from a past experience, where my kids were calling me while I was in Washington because they thought a tree leaf somehow got in their soup. And “wash the crockpot”—you guessed it, I’ve come home to it supposedly still soaking, three days later.
I know there are millions of other busy Americans juggling many responsibilities. If you’d like to make some of my favorite recipes, **[contribute $5 or more before Friday, March 17th, and we’ll send you some of my original recipes.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230316-1?refcode=EMAF16_1_REC_20230316_V1_F&refcode2=19474_3422442_42t5fQ&akid=19474%2E3422442%2E42t5fQ)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230316-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF16_1_REC_20230316_V1_F&refcode2=19474_3422442_42t5fQ&akid=19474%2E3422442%2E42t5fQ)**
Happy meal-prepping!
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF16_1_REC_20230316_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19474_3422442_42t5fQ&akid=19474%2E3422442%2E42t5fQ)**

clean_body: Did you see Katie’s email from last week? Did you see Katie’s email about meal planning from last week, Derek? Thanks for your support, Team Katie Porter \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Katie Porter [info@katieporter.com] Date: Fri, Mar 10, 2023 Subject: My recipe for black bean soup To: Derek [dpwillis67@gmail.com] Derek, As a single mom with three kids and a budget, I cook from scratch a lot. And while cooking meals is honestly not nearly as fun as whiteboarding witnesses, I do love seeing happy children when they come to the dinner table. I have a big bell, with a wooden ringer, that I clang to summon the kids downstairs. I know they heard it because I hear the thundering down the hallway. But when I’m in Washington, I cannot cook dinner, and my first year in Congress there was a lot of complaining—even about pizza! My kids want their mom’s cooking, and they want it nearly every night, regardless of where the demands of my job require me to be. The solution is aggressive meal planning. On the days I fly to D.C. for votes and hearings, I get up at 5:30 a.m. I quickly get ready for the plane and then prepare a dinner for the kids to enjoy that night. It’s always a slow cooker recipe or something that can sit in the fridge until the kids cook it. Favorites include pot roast, my grandma Doris’s meatballs, baked potato bar, chili, and a pepperoncini beef. Last week, it was black bean soup, and as you see from the meal plan, I have learned to be specific. Just like with government witnesses, I sometimes have to spell out how to do the job, even if it seems obvious. “Take out bay leaves” comes from a past experience, where my kids were calling me while I was in Washington because they thought a tree leaf somehow got in their soup. And “wash the crockpot”—you guessed it, I’ve come home to it supposedly still soaking, three days later. I know there are millions of other busy Americans juggling many responsibilities. If you’d like to make some of my favorite recipes, Happy meal-prepping! Katie Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.
