name: Sherrod Brown
subject: What are your priorities, friend?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend, if there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this:
I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are or what kind of work you do. For me, this means going to bat for working families in Ohio and across the country. It means making sure _your_ __ voice is heard in the halls of Congress and on the Senate floor.
I’m proud of the progress we’ve made in the last couple of years, including passing a historic infrastructure bill and standing up for workers’ rights. **But we’ve still got a long way to go, so as we chart out our next steps, I’m asking folks like you to weigh in.**
I’ve always said the best ideas don’t come from Washington – they come from the people we serve. In an ideal world, I’d get to sit down and chat with each and every member of this grassroots team to find out which issues are keeping you up at night, what makes you hopeful about our future, and what you want to see Democrats accomplish next. But since I can only be in one place at a time, our 2023 Priorities Survey is the next best thing:
[**So please, friend, will you take just a moment now to share your thoughts with me in our new priorities survey? Your unique perspective is critical to helping us defend this seat, keep the Senate blue, and continue making progress for working families.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60293047/396632979/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk37-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzE1ZjY2Yy0zNGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6tm3sz1JRPETBrDuMOIooMMwjJZ-pjLiPUoSoqySYdo=&emci=9a2733c8-e8c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6c15f66c-34c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)
| | [Take the Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60293048/396632980/-176176352?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk37-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzE1ZjY2Yy0zNGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6tm3sz1JRPETBrDuMOIooMMwjJZ-pjLiPUoSoqySYdo=&emci=9a2733c8-e8c1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=6c15f66c-34c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=18332626)

With gratitude,

Sherrod Brown

Now → the bill heads to the governor’s desk to be signed into law._ This is HUGE news, friend. name: Rep. Sara Jacobs
subject: Thank you SO MUCH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230316_em_sjj_thankyou [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230316_em_sjj_thankyou]
Friends, I officially have a new opponent in my upcoming re-election - an extreme candidate who idolizes Donald Trump and regularly sows hate and misinformation about everything from climate change to marriage equality.
You might read that and think it’s a scary prospect - and you’re not wrong. But look, I care about my constituents and our district, and I’m ready to put my track record up against anyone’s to earn another term (and to show why we really cannot stand by and let extremists govern this district or this country.).
And here’s the incredible silver lining - when we reached out last week and asked folks to step up and say they’re ready to fight for my re-election, this team came through big time .
Thank you SO MUCH for standing with me. Whether you signed our petition saying you’re all in for my re-election, donated any amount to support my campaign, or simply kept reading up until this point - thanks.
I have to say, having a supportive network like this one is the email equivalent of a hug and glass of wine after a long day - and I’m so grateful. Between now and November 2024, there are going to be a lot of critical moments (just like this one!) where we ask you to step up and support however you can, and knowing I can count on you means the world to me.
Thanks,
Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District
P.S. If you didn’t have the chance to sign our petition before, I hope you’ll add your name today to show your support and help lay the foundation for my re-election campaign [https://secure.ngpvan.com/bvILKb33P0mP6Aj31HcmhA2] .

name: Team Ro
subject: A bold agenda that uplifts every American
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
March is the final month before our first major fundraising report.
#
Friend,
March is the final month before our first major fundraising report. And it’s critical that we post strong numbers. Everyone from political pundits to opponents will be watching to see who has the support they need and who doesn’t. And it’s not just the amount of money that matters, it’s the number of people who give.
[**Will you make a contribution today to let Ro know that you have his back in Congress?**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11309?t=1&akid=2651%2E946728%2EIma8E9)
Ro could raise millions from PACs, that’s what most members of Congress do. But not Ro. Ro founded the No PAC Caucus. He’s never taken a dime of PAC money.
Ro’s in Congress to represent working Americans, not corporate interests. But that means he’s depending on grassroots supporters like you.
[**Will you make a contribution to help Ro build momentum?** **Each dollar you contribute allows Ro to deliver as he fights to revitalize U.S. manufacturing, pass Medicare for All, and make affordable child care a reality.**](https://act.rokhanna.com/go/11309?t=2&akid=2651%2E946728%2EIma8E9)
But that’s not all. Your grassroots support proves that there is an alternative to PAC money to fund political campaigns. When members of Congress see that their colleagues can raise as much money as they can by supporting bold reforms and rejecting PAC money, we’ll see more and more people join the No PAC Caucus. And we’ll see more and more policies that benefit working families, not special interests.
In solidarity,
Team Ro

body:
This news has sent shockwaves through our financial system and highlights the need to not only root out corruption in our financial system, but our government.

|
Fellow American,

Silicon Valley Bank is the latest example of crony capitalism running wild.

It makes my blood boil.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91aa614f61db465185f0045dde6cf166&_e=PVIQpCYtpuhty7yfutTdQa2dNmhaKkDaBcMxP_gKaSwqpS1UaBGWUsZrMnQaowKuX_GoaDvzMQje-JlOiVNLtJFfR6eT2NzjKW-DMigv8E426kqrp2atoAnDZSYBAKF5YYTEPtNlPjUc5oKNAH3O5cXRbgEDcl4ON7uLfO4jP2Falyz4YcBbe0NWT0WW10nGhlFXvsNWHxI2ARkotX6tCvkQxoqmYhwdhQOq0rkQln4OiJlnSycCxVealsWPSK6E0GurLsIu1CbFL1JnsO7b-ew51x0YKLE4zYUB62SJfHdjE3YpXWdL95cIz7Gh4rexcoYyoYJpMHxpopW004G3-t9vSRPUWeHsP6C3U8jWOpMzrM_PYRe277N1htqCoCNmP46U1pqR8biyE6nhB7WmKA%3D%3D)
The recent collapse of SVB has once again exposed the dangers of big government and the risks associated with government intervention in our economy. Our country cannot afford to have politicians in power who believe in reckless spending and uncontrolled government intervention in our financial markets.

**This is exactly why we need to support conservative principles and candidates who believe in limited government and fiscal responsibility.**

| [** STAND WITH VIVEK -> **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91aa614f61db465185f0045dde6cf166&_e=PVIQpCYtpuhty7yfutTdQa2dNmhaKkDaBcMxP_gKaSwqpS1UaBGWUsZrMnQaowKuX_GoaDvzMQje-JlOiVNLtJFfR6eT2NzjKW-DMigv8E426kqrp2atoAnDZSYBAKF5YYTEPtNlPjUc5oKNAH3O5cXRbgEDcl4ON7uLfO4jP2Falyz4YcBbe0NWT0WW10nGhlFXvsNWHxI2ARkotX6tCvkQxoqmYhwdhQOq0rkQln5_c7v78st8oUVckFT6EWqp6MWMAElaK42bXLFg4pAbK60gUfO6HlhQZD4y-k-12fmAzOHHz5pWzrokq1VR5IFr7_YXPFFy7DmOGQgFavmttStK7iWY4E2BEAjmzEaNdtJDycjFqK_3cJA4XUwg54Nm_5hQPvvVUaX1VxhN6gaz5A%3D%3D)
---

It's time we put an end to the reckless spending and wasteful government programs that have caused so much harm to our country. We need leaders who will fight for free markets and individual freedoms, not crony capitalism and bureaucrats who think they know better than the American people.

Fellow American, I know that you share my concerns about these issues. **[That's why I'm asking for your help in our fight to protect our economy from the dangers of big government from the Oval Office.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91aa614f61db465185f0045dde6cf166&_e=PVIQpCYtpuhty7yfutTdQa2dNmhaKkDaBcMxP_gKaSwqpS1UaBGWUsZrMnQaowKuX_GoaDvzMQje-JlOiVNLtJFfR6eT2NzjKW-DMigv8E426kqrp2atoAnDZSYBAKF5YYTEPtNlPjUc5oKNAH3O5cXRbgEDcl4ON7uLfO4jP2Falyz4YcBbe0NWT0WW10nGhlFXvsNWHxI2ARkotX6tCvkQxoqmYhwdhQOq0rkQln7rNHKSBVdXc5Iy_K1_n32otXoXPuuizRHeDy6b36au0-OkRYlUtUUTLvPHFeYNxG9XH_efEFAGIB50Xr6OLc7NWGVCZTyijKKTyP2KWirh1Rt9QRjpS9wCb8FA6FrCDcevnCjvTCCyaPy1PrZ_zfOTqPkOKYrYpYkC3zw057iy_w%3D%3D)**

I am asking you to take 60 seconds of your day to watch a video I recorded about the SVB collapse. After, I hope you join Team Vivek **[by chipping in $5 or more to ensure that our economy remains strong and free.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91aa614f61db465185f0045dde6cf166&_e=PVIQpCYtpuhty7yfutTdQa2dNmhaKkDaBcMxP_gKaSwqpS1UaBGWUsZrMnQaowKuX_GoaDvzMQje-JlOiVNLtJFfR6eT2NzjKW-DMigv8E426kqrp2atoAnDZSYBAKF5YYTEPtNlPjUc5oKNAH3O5cXRbgEDcl4ON7uLfO4jP2Falyz4YcBbe0NWT0WW10nGhlFXvsNWHxI2ARkotX6tCvkQxoqmYhwdhQOq0rkQln58Yuki6cgce6w6m2cOiK1XbQWHstVUaVepSHf8lpJowLEV9GXrNDmwVXVk7KBWn1HYh08mUPdZsO8iaoqTcxwGWCYMaV_IDTyLxOPPKaw3xiPPxHN-D5YSQAqtFLJoBpiJ6jZ98QUVdiSrfBDRUJ0wbAdWmAlks1JhU__tyJHRHw%3D%3D)**

I would be glad if the rest of the Republican Presidential contenders jump on the train and speak truth. It's telling that they have been quiet. I'll speak from firsthand observation: many Republicans are afraid of Silicon Valley's donor class and behave accordingly. But not me.

Together, we can fight against the forces of big government and protect the economic freedom that has made our country great.

Thanks,

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91aa614f61db465185f0045dde6cf166&_e=PVIQpCYtpuhty7yfutTdQa2dNmhaKkDaBcMxP_gKaSwqpS1UaBGWUsZrMnQaowKuX_GoaDvzMQje-JlOiVNLtJFfR6eT2NzjKW-DMigv8E426kqrp2atoAnDZSYBAKF5YYTEPtNlPjUc5oKNAH3O5cXRbgEDcl4ON7uLfO4jP2Falyz4YcBbe0NWT0WW10nGhlFXvsNWHxI2ARkotX6tCvkQxoqmYhwdhQOq0rkQln5sjYdWGzet9WiILNYxMoZ69AazdoY3YSIsEltdbpxOIeVwVb_FOfJBNYl4j8xWLtCwBRu4J5YWoxWVCAAvlk0sOdvcTNQ-py2kXO7_NMIH-ukjqcOwKhYnqySf6ugdN4Jmrs80TfudkC8jU3mvFv84v3i8_h2hICliMjtTVttK-Q%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P. S. The collapse of SVB is a wake-up call for all of us. It's time we take action and support candidates who will fight for the principles that put this country into motion 250 years ago. **[Please help me build this movement by chipping in $1 or more!](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91aa614f61db465185f0045dde6cf166&_e=PVIQpCYtpuhty7yfutTdQa2dNmhaKkDaBcMxP_gKaSwqpS1UaBGWUsZrMnQaowKuX_GoaDvzMQje-JlOiVNLtJFfR6eT2NzjKW-DMigv8E426kqrp2atoAnDZSYBAKF5YYTEPtNlPjUc5oKNAH3O5cXRbgEDcl4ON7uLfO4jP2Falyz4YcBbe0NWT0WW10nGhlFXvsNWHxI2ARkotX6tCvkQxoqmYhwdhQOq0rkQln5PPnET_l012tsXVx38KkJOnw0FENqB-76MutMBkkGN_qErnHe1t6WAnWRYdVIQW1vknXgPuHis8JfY7umoX2Rd74TduOy-sL8ap-WTtlQaKHHZynQ5GT9oUks7EaHpmZYvIlcqX1fmd9iCw71zcdf5WPsY3g5zL6RKNLEk1mgYmw%3D%3D)**

[** WATCH NOW -> **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91aa614f61db465185f0045dde6cf166&_e=PVIQpCYtpuhty7yfutTdQa2dNmhaKkDaBcMxP_gKaSwqpS1UaBGWUsZrMnQaowKuX_GoaDvzMQje-JlOiVNLtJFfR6eT2NzjKW-DMigv8E426kqrp2atoAnDZSYBAKF5YYTEPtNlPjUc5oKNAH3O5cXRbgEDcl4ON7uLfO4jP2Falyz4YcBbe0NWT0WW10nGhlFXvsNWHxI2ARkotX6tCvkQxoqmYhwdhQOq0rkQln7ZRUYLk9YWBBAfc3e1FPOQml5YUr9eHYuQ3BH2GwCSLB19FgcPHvKo82AO-SMc8M-fVSayjYg3LcrGe9qlDPFEwTPOccaL0tSiKbdUF_6ZE_bEnitcP_OSacNkQLG2rHco9reDC5P_jsS7XI2IQ0FgNVFlhw4u-pkpb5_iJRD7VA%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
The work we’re doing is effective and brings light to the records of these extreme Republicans -- but it’s also expensive, which is why we’re writing to you directly. | |
---
Derek, we could send dozens of emails about how short-sighted and harmful extreme Republicans’ legislative priorities could be for folks across the country. We could go on and on about their constant calls for tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy, pledges to pass abortion bans -- _or even their repeated support to end Social Security and Medicare as we know them._ Simply put, Derek: The extreme Republican agenda would hurt folks just like you. **As some of these Republicans travel the country, we’re making sure people hear about their records with mobile billboards outside of their events running ads to show their hypocrisy on some of these issues.**

clean_body: The work we’re doing is effective and brings light to the records of these extreme Republicans -- but it’s also expensive, which is why we’re writing to you directly. | | Derek, we could send dozens of emails about how short-sighted and harmful extreme Republicans’ legislative priorities could be for folks across the country. We could go on and on about their constant calls for tax cuts for the ultra-wealthy, pledges to pass abortion bans -- or even their repeated support to end Social Security and Medicare as we know them. Simply put, Derek: The extreme Republican agenda would hurt folks just like you. As some of these Republicans travel the country, we’re making sure people hear about their records with mobile billboards outside of their events running ads to show their hypocrisy on some of these issues. The DNC’s mobile billboard showcasing Ron DeSantis’s disastrous stance on Social Security and Medicare outside of his Des Moines, IA event. South Carolina Dems highlight Nikki Haley’s praise for Trump with launch day mobile billboard in Charleston, SC. Medicare and Social Security are bedrock programs that Americans have paid into and that tens of millions of seniors depend on to support their livelihoods, and extreme MAGA Republicans like Ron DeSantis, Nikki Haley, and others want to put them on the chopping block. The work we’re doing is effective and brings light to the records of these extreme Republicans -- but it’s also expensive, which is why we’re writing to you directly. With support from Democrats like you, we can keep holding Republicans’ feet to the fire. The Democrats Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . | Influential Big Oil corporations have claimed to combat climate change, but their proposals do fall short of the benchmarks laid out in the Paris Climate Agreement.

_**This is not a surprise!**_

Big Oil’s proposals to cut planet-warming fossil fuel emissions do not meet the requirements to limit global temperature increases.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Investing in the People > Profit-hungry contractors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Will you join me in calling for a more responsible defense budget?
#
Peter, did you know that the Pentagon hasn't passed a single independent audit in **_years?_**
Last year, Congress passed a **_record_** $858 billion defense budget. While the Pentagon continues to receive bloated budgets, there are millions of working people across the country who are struggling just to afford their basic needs.
This never-ending cycle of increased funding **without** real accountability is unacceptable and unnecessary. A recent study from the Congressional Budget Office revealed that the Pentagon could cut the defense budget by **_$100 billion per year_** without compromising our national security **There is simply no reason for taxpayers to continue to shoulder the burden of funding this wasteful budget.**
That's why our progressive movement is pushing to cut our bloated defense budget down to size and prioritize our people over profit-hungry military contractors. [**If you agree with me, will you add your name today to reduce the Pentagon's wasteful spending?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230316-Cut-Defense-Spending-Petition?source=em20230316-2279&t=1&akid=2279%2E420207%2ETAubtq)
**[Add Your Name>>](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230316-Cut-Defense-Spending-Petition?source=em20230316-2279&t=2&akid=2279%2E420207%2ETAubtq)**
Cutting the practically endless defense budget would allow us to divert potentially **_billions of dollars_** to help working people and make vital investments in health and childcare, education, affordable housing, combating the climate crisis, and much more.
We cannot allow this bloated Pentagon budget — and government handouts to private defense contractors — to come before delivering for the people. **We all deserve better.**
[**We must ensure that Congress continues delivering for the people and not profit-hungry defense contractors. Will you add your name today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230316-Cut-Defense-Spending-Petition?source=em20230316-2279&t=3&akid=2279%2E420207%2ETAubtq)
**[Add Your Name>>](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/em20230316-Cut-Defense-Spending-Petition?source=em20230316-2279&t=4&akid=2279%2E420207%2ETAubtq)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carlina=20Rivera?=
subject: What it takes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carlina 2023
body:
Do you know what it takes to get on the ballot in New York? It takes thousands of signatures from every corner of the District. | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=e150f88aa2&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter --

Do you know what it takes to get on the ballot in New York? It takes thousands of signatures from every corner of the District -- and that means it takes resources.

When clubs go out carrying our petitions or volunteers hit the doors to gather signatures, we don't send them alone. Petitions need to be printed. Volunteers need pens. And how are you going to sign a piece of paper if there's no clipboard with it?

[**_These resources are key to our success -- and they don't appear for free. Will you donate today to help directly fund our field operation?_**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=8b2d30cfc1&e=2de202398d)
---
| [$10 FOR PENS](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=815acb520c&e=2de202398d "$10 FOR PENS")
---
| [$25 FOR SNACKS](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=7d18ae4fd4&e=2de202398d "$25 FOR SNACKS")
---
| [$50 FOR CLIPBOARDS](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=24ea8a07f8&e=2de202398d "$50 FOR CLIPBOARDS")
---
| [$100 FOR PETITIONS](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=4f65fa0241&e=2de202398d "$100 FOR PETITIONS")
---
| [CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=eaf7f6b3c1&e=2de202398d "CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
| I appreciate each and every person who helps fund our campaign, and it's because of you that we're able to keep fighting -- and delivering -- for Lower Manhattan.

Thank you,
Carlina

P.S. Petitioning is just the start! Once we get on the ballot, then the real work starts: talking to voters -- and all of the pens, snacks, clipboards, paper, and resources we get for our field program now will help power us through the spring and into the summer as well. [**_Please consider chipping in right now to get our field program going!_**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=4fe1d8989e&e=2de202398d)

subject: Our shared mission

I am anxious. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60294543/396640991/17860314?refcode=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiNTQ4NTEtMzljNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CfRhySpCIUmDJPSVO4WQccImSK-6_bNs-qWtXjtw54I=)

Hey Peter.

I believe that honesty is the best policy for any campaign, so I have to admit that I am a bit nervous.

**We’re less than 12 hours from our mid-month deadline and $1,926 short of our goal.** We need to hit _every_ fundraising goal from now through November to stand a fighting chance against Tate Reeves.

No ifs, ands, or buts about it.

[So I have to ask: will you chip in whatever you can to help us meet tonight’s make-or-break deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60294544/396640992/-761526316?refcode=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiNTQ4NTEtMzljNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CfRhySpCIUmDJPSVO4WQccImSK-6_bNs-qWtXjtw54I=)

Grassroots donors like you are the backbone of our movement here in Mississippi. Your support separates our campaign from Tate’s. He’s just another elitist puppet, bankrolled by his daddy and the rich and powerful.

And he'll never understand the struggles of hardworking people and families like us.

That’s why we need change. The good folks of Mississippi need a governor who genuinely cares about their issues and delivers solutions that work.

[There’s just too much on the line to quit now. So I’ll ask again: Can I count on you to chip in $25 or whatever you can before tonight’s mid-month deadline to help me bring home the win in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60294545/396640993/-761526316?amount=25&refcode=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiNTQ4NTEtMzljNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CfRhySpCIUmDJPSVO4WQccImSK-6_bNs-qWtXjtw54I=) | **[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60294546/396640994/-761526316?amount=5&refcode=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiNTQ4NTEtMzljNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CfRhySpCIUmDJPSVO4WQccImSK-6_bNs-qWtXjtw54I=)** | **[Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60294547/396640995/-761526316?amount=10&refcode=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiNTQ4NTEtMzljNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CfRhySpCIUmDJPSVO4WQccImSK-6_bNs-qWtXjtw54I=)** | **[Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60294548/396640996/-761526316?amount=25&refcode=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ms=ea.60b54851-39c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjBiNTQ4NTEtMzljNC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CfRhySpCIUmDJPSVO4WQccImSK-6_bNs-qWtXjtw54I=)**

name: Team Fetterman
subject: We have to keep TWO Ds in the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Our senior senator Bob Casey is facing a tough reelection fight in 2024.
#
Hi Derek,
Thanks to this team's hard work, PA is represented by TWO Democrats in the Senate who are fighting for working families. 💪
**But our senior senator Bob Casey is facing a tough reelection fight in 2024.** We can be sure that once there's a GOP candidate in the race, the same super PAC million$ + right-wing smear campaigns we faced last year will come pouring in to try to beat him.
**[We need to make sure Senator Casey has the resources he needs to run the strongest campaign possible. Can you split a contribution between Team Fetterman and Bob Casey today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230316-1?refcode=em20230316-1-8293&refcode2=8293_434096_Alv-xj&akid=8293%2E434096%2EAlv-xj)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230316-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230316-8293&refcode2=8293_434096_Alv-xj&akid=8293%2E434096%2EAlv-xj)**
Bob Casey has always advocated for PA children + families in the Senate, and we need his voice now more than ever. With a slim Democratic majority, the GOP is sure to target his seat + try to take control.
**[It's up to us to fight back and keep Bob Casey in the Senate. If you can, split a contribution between John + Bob Casey right away.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230316-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230316-8293&refcode2=8293_434096_Alv-xj&akid=8293%2E434096%2EAlv-xj)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you for helping defend our Senate majority! 💛
-- Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230316-8293-footer&t=1&refcode2=8293_434096_Alv-xj&akid=8293%2E434096%2EAlv-xj)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8293%2E434096%2EAlv-xj)

name: Assemblymember Mia Bonta
subject: We will be at Sessions in Oakland on March 30th - PLEASE JOIN US!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2024, FPPC#1456426
body:
Dear Peter,
Thank you to everyone who has taken our team's calls and responded to the invitation already put out for our Re-Election Campaign Kick Off Event on Thursday, March 30, 2023.
I am pleased to share that we will be at Sessions on 15th in Oakland from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm - and, I encourage you to reply today and to share this invitation with your friends!
I have had a very productive year, and as I move full steam ahead I look forward to engaging with all our community members - in Alameda, Emeryville, and Oakland.
It’s less than twelve months from Election Day Tuesday, March 5, 2024 and I have started to prepare for my re-election to the CA State Assembly to represent AD-18 and hope you will be with me.
Please mark your calendars for my re-election campaign fundraiser on Thursday, March 30th at 5:30 pm to 7:00 pm !
I hope to count on you to support my re-election campaign.
Become an Event Sponsor! Click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/5sVCBU0eykuQIRlNLRZ_hQ2] .

clean_body: Dear Peter, Thank you to everyone who has taken our team's calls and responded to the invitation already put out for our Re-Election Campaign Kick Off Event on Thursday, March 30, 2023. I am pleased to share that we will be at Sessions on 15th in Oakland from 5:30 pm - 7:00 pm - and, I encourage you to reply today and to share this invitation with your friends! I have had a very productive year, and as I move full steam ahead I look forward to engaging with all our community members - in Alameda, Emeryville, and Oakland. It’s less than twelve months from Election Day Tuesday, March 5, 2024 and I have started to prepare for my re-election to the CA State Assembly to represent AD-18 and hope you will be with me. Please mark your calendars for my re-election campaign fundraiser on Thursday, March 30th at 5:30 pm to 7:00 pm ! I hope to count on you to support my re-election campaign. Become an Event Sponsor! name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=561dd96ab71f49149a67d500d6fd5b61&_e=guPbJoqCK3wSYbrvrU7qIWGfgOUJrJB61IVwblH2D21cEQzwv03UOrauTF65rpp8e7ZezeJ1kPTbX1qIr4Ol52MMvgd0rANptak6aJdVGV3GpeQWVdcY-qRdbYYcKzv1wmkUZFkzHiNf79gy0GJzUvM5wqdFr3hsvny9wiDB5sVVQphZllXb42vqNAB5vwq06UEJ2AIK69HUmc2u9-_br0Y7HCgF8J9W9CKWJrFYR6oJd-leSNLYIkYEPzmqNrN-WCbhGWagjU4FcI8zpx9P5U_RDzradSMXzVrg9rBzE4PVCpqB4i3m5t3kZE8xHMZf1uL3UBT4oTiXkwbs2UIz-xtIXyOFowdLv5VXJpMuahFo9-LASW0eGRIy4SIvK8V1eRPICQgtVXRItuqur49mZ-gvnqYcrqJZnuGsIq1csN37f8C-ZOplMNtkC7-oJQuH)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=561dd96ab71f49149a67d500d6fd5b61&_e=guPbJoqCK3wSYbrvrU7qIWGfgOUJrJB61IVwblH2D21cEQzwv03UOrauTF65rpp8e7ZezeJ1kPTbX1qIr4Ol52MMvgd0rANptak6aJdVGV3GpeQWVdcY-qRdbYYcKzv1wmkUZFkzHiNf79gy0GJzUvM5wqdFr3hsvny9wiDB5sVVQphZllXb42vqNAB5vwq06UEJ2AIK69HUmc2u9-_br0Y7HCgF8J9W9CKWJrFYR6oJd-leSNLYIkYEPzmqNrN-WCbhGWagjU4FcI8zpx9P5cj01kuvOu3Wmk94KXi_1KBiuM2rwxvpHthievqnRUQyivMb3CJS_GupWC3rAmPVJM-UA-WYNRxMcbaiAe92OTsY2DD8SjBFMpblWx06GNTVcwoYH0pvkQwTJYnbNSjQUq0tLcAGDOyoHgpGf0sd7GBt0WeLCw6HjCvA3sf8hYlO)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=561dd96ab71f49149a67d500d6fd5b61&_e=guPbJoqCK3wSYbrvrU7qIWGfgOUJrJB61IVwblH2D21cEQzwv03UOrauTF65rpp8e7ZezeJ1kPTbX1qIr4Ol52MMvgd0rANptak6aJdVGV3GpeQWVdcY-qRdbYYcKzv1wmkUZFkzHiNf79gy0GJzUvM5wqdFr3hsvny9wiDB5sVVQphZllXb42vqNAB5vwq06UEJ2AIK69HUmc2u9-_br0Y7HCgF8J9W9CKWJrFYR6oJd-leSNLYIkYEPzmqNrN-WCbhGWagjU4FcI8zpx9P5RSM3b3tBnLk0kIMUjovqQtM23_229Aym6UIp0F0nkNFDAKd7PUgnUuKuESqIaqY5OtjATNWsDlQ999UOuTi1hWOXjh71aZX-oSIhcSH2CTLkPp0BhyUb_-OANTKvkzDAPG1LMuwwGuPrgmVjcyquPWNjH_FzgwOD0yLTIrFH75T)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=561dd96ab71f49149a67d500d6fd5b61&_e=guPbJoqCK3wSYbrvrU7qIWGfgOUJrJB61IVwblH2D21cEQzwv03UOrauTF65rpp8e7ZezeJ1kPTbX1qIr4Ol52MMvgd0rANptak6aJdVGV3GpeQWVdcY-qRdbYYcKzv1wmkUZFkzHiNf79gy0GJzUvM5wqdFr3hsvny9wiDB5sVVQphZllXb42vqNAB5vwq06UEJ2AIK69HUmc2u9-_br0Y7HCgF8J9W9CKWJrFYR6oJd-leSNLYIkYEPzmqNrN-WCbhGWagjU4FcI8zpx9P5dJm4dRq54lI5hOkhNVEkATWhgRAsSs0FFWEr5gcxvcdGlz1Dpp-up_ukpDvkQ1dkwk-6uifC7f1cH8B-5B6B8sCR5U9o1PAi8xsTfr9nUA_yQe5ebL1aO2yvshYIhUACl237mfGE9Hq3Idw0bAXNz5XtBY5ZS0uDtfvszq63bfq).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Reclaiming American Freedom

body:
I need you to know three things.

Hey Team — in a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[pitch in and help my campaign catch up to our fundraising goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60295123/396643211/1342890860?refcode=email_031623_mmfr&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmY0YTdhZC0zY2M0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0OVKI-fgGcSY_k3B14L22hKvFG6R1LI9P3STf0Pfvyw=)** before tonight’s deadline, which is just hours away. But first, here are three things I want you to know about why it’s so important that we make our fundraising benchmarks, because this isn’t arbitrary. It really matters. Here’s why: 1) Colorado Republicans just selected a far-right, extremist, election denier as their new leader. 2) The new GOP leader promised to go on “offense, offense, offense” against Democrats like me. Subtext: We can expect to be hit with a blizzard of false attack ads between now and next year’s election. 3) We spent almost every cent we had defending against GOP attacks in the last election, and our fundraising has been slower than expected out of the gate to start 2023. We need that to change, and fast, if we’re going to put ourselves in a winning position. **[Team, I’m reaching out personally because getting a fundraising boost right now really matters. It’s as simple as that. clean_body: I need you to know three things. Hey Team — in a moment, I’m going to ask you to = before tonight’s deadline, which is just hours away. But first, here are three things I want you to know about why it’s so important that we make our fundraising benchmarks, because this isn’t arbitrary. It really matters. Here’s why: 1) Colorado Republicans just selected a far-right, extremist, election denier as their new leader. 2) The new GOP leader promised to go on “offense, offense, offense” against Democrats like me. Subtext: We can expect to be hit with a blizzard of false attack ads between now and next year’s election. 3) We spent almost every cent we had defending against GOP attacks in the last election, and our fundraising has been slower than expected out of the gate to start 2023. We need that to change, and fast, if we’re going to put ourselves in a winning position. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Let’s send a message to the Colorado Republican Party that if they mobilize around extremism, we will mobilize around our fundamental values — values like democracy, freedom, and opportunity for all, which I’m fighting for every day in Congress. This team comes through every time the going gets tough, and I know we will rise to the occasion once again. body:
March 31st is the first quarterly reporting deadline of 2023. Peter,

We're quickly approaching our first quarterly reporting deadline of the election year. Soon, the fundraising reports for every campaign in this race for Kentucky governor will be published and available to the public.

My opponents will be looking at our numbers for any sign of weakness. We need to put our best foot forward and show them that this campaign has the support of Kentuckians across the Commonwealth who are ready to protect the progress we've made.

[**As we near our first quarterly filing deadline of 2023, let's show my opponents what a strong grassroots campaign can do. Please, donate any amount you can today. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60295374/396644899/1737192232?refcode=em23_230316_mm3_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230316_mm3_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0e812f82-3dc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTgxMmY4Mi0zZGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b8q1owSwl3N3G58XFaySKOzoLpU_wK6_L4yK9AQ4P0I=)

Peter, our economy is strong. Every year, we're creating more and more jobs and opportunities here at home. My administration is showing that real leadership means working together, across party lines, to make life better for millions of Kentuckians.

We've made great progress over the last three years, and I'm ready to continue fighting for Kentucky’s future. But winning this race won't be easy. I have 12 Republican opponents, and outside spending has already begun to flood the Commonwealth. I'm hoping I can count on your support to finish the first quarter of this election year strong and ensure we have the resources to protect Kentucky's progress.

[**Will you contribute to my re-election campaign before our first filing deadline of 2023? I need your help to ensure I have the resources to compete with my 12 opponents so we can continue moving Kentucky forward together. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60295377/396644903/1737192232?refcode=em23_230316_mm3_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230316_mm3_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0e812f82-3dc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTgxMmY4Mi0zZGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b8q1owSwl3N3G58XFaySKOzoLpU_wK6_L4yK9AQ4P0I=)

Thank you,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60295381/396644909/1737192232?refcode=em23_230316_mm3_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230316_mm3_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=0e812f82-3dc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTgxMmY4Mi0zZGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=b8q1owSwl3N3G58XFaySKOzoLpU_wK6_L4yK9AQ4P0I=)

subject: Get some luck to make it go well

body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60296112/396646134/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWQ4NGZmMS0zZGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MxZEKcmQbEK6Dz5o_YU_W-5fmkJyq9NtFLxcPIfEdxQ=&emci=dd4807b6-fdc3-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=61d84ff1-3dc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43566853)

| | I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, Peter, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.

**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and proud of it.**

The truth is, I love this work. Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it also keeps me grounded, and it gives me perspective on the issues we face every day.

When I think about climate change, I’m thinking of folks on farms like mine, struggling with catastrophic droughts like the one we dealt with in 2021. When I think about reforming the USPS, I’m thinking of the people in rural communities across Montana who just want their mail delivered on time. And when I think about infrastructure, I’m thinking of airports like the ones I fly through every week, and the urgent upgrades we need to make to meet folks’ needs.

**These aren’t abstract issues. They’re very real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. I spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.**

[**_So I’m asking: Can you split a few dollars between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to support this work? Your contributions help us keep the Senate blue and fight for working folks from Montana to Georgia._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60296113/396646141/-1883314608?refcode=20230316.2_JT_3AG_ND&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWQ4NGZmMS0zZGM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MxZEKcmQbEK6Dz5o_YU_W-5fmkJyq9NtFLxcPIfEdxQ=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

I’ll leave you with one last truth about farming: some years you do everything right, but things out of your control go wrong and you’re stuck with a bad harvest. Other years, you get some luck and it goes well.

That means it’s important to be prepared for any outcome, and to have a support system by your side when things get difficult. The same is true in Washington — and that’s why I’m so grateful to folks like you for even opening this message in the first place.

I appreciate your support, and anything you’re able to pitch in. Thanks for your help, and I hope I’m making you proud.

Jon

name: Nick Freitas
subject: (READ) Joe should look to home before you....
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas
body:
They'll lock you up and let Hunter go free... | | | [](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=7483dd59462a4d29b549dc45eacec6f2&_e=MiN64ChipFDKKw_uZeeMKl63H4D3DhKouGJOwViPbeqa2aS4UTcaZVTt_ZiI2F8ln_jj4X2gJBuEFrGsDmnLL2EWroPOpEmB1ivshya1FAgBmqMXTq0C8AKiQERgtynaF_lbaIXE18CRCQ1w5YZsv6v1Xlw4XQ3b7z4bwPvQzmNGCopaFata6ez4DpmzsSryKsWI3nmOO5SIDvv-mZIchGEiDkl_2TiWrGjYXIDzFAVWrPlUoNkS1hbVtL4CAS-R)
---
What happens when you’re the President while:
* Hyper-Inflation destroys everyone’s savings
* You’re bailing out woke banks like Silicon Valley Bank
* Ordering the FBI & DOJ to target pro-life activists
* Forcing Critical Race Theory into public schools
* You think it’s “sinful and cruel” to prohibit the mutilation of children

You distract everyone by attacking law-abiding gun owners, of course!

Joe Biden just signed an executive order expanding background checks while bypassing Congress illegally. He’s going after Virginians for laws already on the books while violating his Oath of Office in his quest for a Federal Gun Registry.

Which is why I have a plan to fight back.

I want to submit a petition to the DOJ asking Merrick Garland to clean his own house before he applies this order to any Virginian.

---
[**Sign the Petition**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=7483dd59462a4d29b549dc45eacec6f2&_e=MiN64ChipFDKKw_uZeeMKl63H4D3DhKouGJOwViPbeqa2aS4UTcaZVTt_ZiI2F8ln_jj4X2gJBuEFrGsDmnLL2EWroPOpEmB1ivshya1FAgG7cu7z_RrniHzZ-H4svtiiaEV4wokfVP7jCYndr2y2HD2WStJXj1gCnVZ9QojHEQ0ZRzE72ig-pV3suGpLCQX6KgdhWK_pzZ1jyLQ3i7Ep9c7MdVjDgyPmI4mfAbAZdAQYGIN5CFU87jWp8bAEu0P)
---

You see, as it turns out Joe Biden’s OWN SON Hunter lied on a background check–a federal felony. Joe & the DOJ are attempting to turn the screws on you while letting his son walk free for committing a felony.

That’s the very worst of politics -- and we need to call them out on it. _Will you _**[sign your name](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=7483dd59462a4d29b549dc45eacec6f2&_e=MiN64ChipFDKKw_uZeeMKl63H4D3DhKouGJOwViPbeqa2aS4UTcaZVTt_ZiI2F8ln_jj4X2gJBuEFrGsDmnLL2EWroPOpEmB1ivshya1FAggmGIYgkc9OWlxhksIoE6pHxa50k_s8VgDYQLEvT6hBi9dCIm5XpfZMQZF49HLh7Uk0syKlHhBjVFd_4dq45DchX3cQSfFEsj1Yfz1CoUg4OLAKBpYcJb4u4z2o6RZPKOu9vXw4kjbf1tSEflYC5JL)**_ to my petition asking the DOJ to Investigate Hunter Biden for lying on a background check?

_
---
[**Sign the Petition**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=7483dd59462a4d29b549dc45eacec6f2&_e=MiN64ChipFDKKw_uZeeMKl63H4D3DhKouGJOwViPbeqa2aS4UTcaZVTt_ZiI2F8ln_jj4X2gJBuEFrGsDmnLL2EWroPOpEmB1ivshya1FAhNeqJ68b0FUk3gHGJxVNKYKPHvgFlv9bkUuEDtYhZCBxQ37LN9cHsbk5G0KcYX7RE4_p3bwmnxTAqHh9MogvlD_AUogmHIK3FTehjex3axujEwdXCud8TFj5fUMXJ5NSMUAYd09gwRzFJefA_x1Z2J)
---

I will __**ALWAYS**__ fight to protect the gun rights of law-abiding Virginians.

The Second Amendment is the most sacred right we have. It protects our Bill of Rights, while ensuring we have the **natural right to defend ourselves** **and our property**.

Our Founders knew a free people needed the ability to defend that freedom. Biden wants that freedom removed for Americans, but enshrined for the people of....Ukraine.

I wish I was kidding.

We’re not going to be distracted from his failure of a Presidency. We’re not going to let him target you while protecting his _felonious son_.

Sign the petition below, and join me in pushing BACK against Joe Biden’s unlawful attempt at building the platform for a Federal Registry!

---
[**Sign the Petition**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=7483dd59462a4d29b549dc45eacec6f2&_e=MiN64ChipFDKKw_uZeeMKl63H4D3DhKouGJOwViPbeqa2aS4UTcaZVTt_ZiI2F8ln_jj4X2gJBuEFrGsDmnLL2EWroPOpEmB1ivshya1FAjvHxS4dnB0H5gqNIeqVPUvLSOde59CYNTcvDHBpuOXbZFpME4zu434pQMKFfx3OaMvN2Cy23qVZAYD0SITWythBcMZ2_LspxAjvuEylElBYN0HZP7U8xS7WaG_NGGZqS2F41Fm1U8K4RUz02tm8v6u)
---
Thanks, Nick

[**CONTRIBUTE**](http://links.nickforva.com/u/click?_t=1288bb27b50344f7a99321d594ffc386&_m=7483dd59462a4d29b549dc45eacec6f2&_e=MiN64ChipFDKKw_uZeeMKl63H4D3DhKouGJOwViPbeqa2aS4UTcaZVTt_ZiI2F8lACrKjAUPgqD0OxSOlyg_XtkNluxCN356QsoMqoV46_X82vcQQ-MIlXHBSWKcV6_E-_N8Xnk-zbaesXO0ibnEQVxW11evAWFFQYYalLBM1TiIIXdgu4AJ2XCX8Hk-GnLESSbkloGPdFUQ3AN4U2npsh6-6qz9Ep9sF6sG8RpfC9hPUT3IDrhuN3z8mTxrMlVb)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kelvin=20King?=
subject: The mission continues.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/8952e43a5420/the-mission-continues?e=cb396c52a2)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

The Let’s Win for America Action (LWFAA) team has been hard at work, furthering our mission to bring a winning conservative message to those who THINK the Democratic party has their back. We may have a long road ahead, but we are dedicated to expanding the Republican tent through authentic conversations with minority communities. At LWFAA, we believe that everyone has an opportunity to succeed in America, no matter your skin color, background or neighborhood.

You might have seen my wife and Co-chair, Janelle King, on Fox News recently discussing the Left’s intolerance of opinions that don’t align with their narrative. If you missed it, check it out below.
---
| [ ](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=e3f1ce001d&e=cb396c52a2)
---
| I have also been spreading our message about the American dream across the state from [local activist groups](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=22f3932d23&e=cb396c52a2) to [high schools](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=bd2063bd6b&e=cb396c52a2). Our audience is growing, and our momentum isn't slowing anytime soon.
---
|
---
|
---
| Lastly, if you don’t already, please be sure to follow us on all social platforms below:

Facebook: [Let's Win for America Action](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=e3ef3e0f96&e=cb396c52a2)
Twitter: [@LWFAA_](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=1f4eb4855b&e=cb396c52a2)
Youtube: [Let's Win For America Action](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=5e17747bca&e=cb396c52a2)
Instagram: [@lwfaa_](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=6c87d961ef&e=cb396c52a2)

We are turning out new content in the LWFAA studio weekly and have exciting announcements coming soon that you won’t want to miss.

We have been tremendously encouraged by the rise in support for Let's Win for America Action. With the help of our supporters, we will continue to share our message of solid economics, empowering families, and limiting government with minority communities. [Donate today to join our team and expand the Republican party.](https://LWFAA.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e05b015cc2e6982fdaa22b89&id=bfa05a6374&e=cb396c52a2)

God Bless,

Chairman, Let's Win for America Action

Would you like to have Kelvin or Janelle speak at an event? Contact [Info@LWFAA.com](mailto:Info@LWFAA.com) to connect with a scheduler and get your event on our calendar!
---

900 Old Roswell Lakes Pkwy, Ste 310

Thanks to Joe Biden, gas prices are still SKY-HIGH, and we need help filling up our tank to make it to each end of our state. | | Thank you, Team Scott | | | A message for you, from Senator Rick Scott: Joe Biden’s America includes record high inflation, open borders, unlimited spending, and increasing crime. Defeating the radical Left has never been more important and it will be no easy task. Peter, with your support, I can continue to protect our Conservative values. I can’t do it without patriots like you, so Thank you for your support, Senator Rick Scott | | Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida | | Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: .

Keep Becca fighting the good fight in the halls of Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60296620/396648556/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzA4N2E5Ni00MWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e5miTEKHeKczabkknGJxDFUeQxIVBKaC75LHYyUkCos=&emci=b8575959-1dc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=bc087a96-41c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Peter, From being an educator in Windham County to serving as a member of Congress, Becca has always been **ambitious** — not for personal gain, but to serve her community and fight for working people. As Becca’s campaign manager, I’ve seen her ambition firsthand in her commitment to justice, equity, and delivering for Vermonters. _And we’ve been running her campaign the same way since Day 1_. **This quarter, we set an ambitious fundraising goal of $32,000. But as of today, we are 15 days out from the end-of-quarter deadline, and we still have over $9,000 remaining to raise. ** [_**Peter, will you help us close our fundraising gap and get back on track with a donation?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60296621/396648557/539210454?refcode=E20607-20230316-EOQ1-SL-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzA4N2E5Ni00MWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e5miTEKHeKczabkknGJxDFUeQxIVBKaC75LHYyUkCos=) [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60296622/396648558/539210454?refcode=E20607-20230316-EOQ1-SB-DeadlineOther-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzA4N2E5Ni00MWM0LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e5miTEKHeKczabkknGJxDFUeQxIVBKaC75LHYyUkCos=) Becca is all but guaranteed to have a primary challenger. As Becca’s campaign manager, I’ve seen her ambition firsthand in her commitment to justice, equity, and delivering for Vermonters. And we’ve been running her campaign the same way since Day 1. This quarter, we set an ambitious fundraising goal of $32,000. But as of today, we are 15 days out from the end-of-quarter deadline, and we still have over $9,000 remaining to raise. = = Becca is all but guaranteed to have a primary challenger. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: They just proposed the death penalty for abortion
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Right now, in at least half of the states, abortion rights are under
attack. And as more abortion bans are passed, right-wing extremists are
radicalizing their political agenda even further. They’re looking to
outlaw the abortion pill, jail doctors, and even propose the death penalty
for abortion:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131367?refcode=em20230316-28016&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28016%2E1203867%2E-qo1QU ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131367?refcode=em20230316-28016&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=28016%2E1203867%2E-qo1QU ][IMG]

We know that abortion access can already be a matter of life and death,
but this is beyond the pale. Our work to elect a new generation into
Congress to fight for our fundamental freedoms has never been more urgent.

The anti-abortion movement is moving full-speed ahead, which means we need
to fight twice as hard to protect our reproductive rights. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131367?refcode=em20230316-28016&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=28016%2E1203867%2E-qo1QU ]Help us
transform the Democratic Party into one that will fight nonstop to protect
our communities and defend our autonomy. Will you chip in
$3 or any amount you can?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131367?refcode=em20230316-28016&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=28016%2E1203867%2E-qo1QU ]Contribute $3

This week, an openly anti-abortion GOP judge heard a case brought by an
ultra-conservative Christian group to ban mifepristone, the most widely
used FDA-approved abortion pill.

For decades, this extremist movement fighting to take away our
reproductive rights labeled themselves "pro-life." But when push comes to
shove, their true colors show: all they want is to control our bodies —
they’re even willing to put our lives at stake.

Right now, Republican-held state legislatures, Governors, General
Attorneys, and more are exploring every avenue they can to criminalize
abortion. It’s critical that leadership in Congress steps in to pass
life-saving interventions and protect our freedoms at the federal level.
That’s why we have to keep fighting to support our Justice Democrats in
Congress — and elect more next November.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131367?refcode=em20230316-28016&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=28016%2E1203867%2E-qo1QU ]With you and our grassroots base behind us, we will fight back against
the GOP’s extremist agenda and make Congress work for the people again.
But it will take all of us, so we have to ask: can you donate any amount
to support us right now?

In solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=28016%2E1203867%2E-qo1QU ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=28016%2E1203867%2E-qo1QU ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230316-28016-footer&t=1026&refcode2=28016_1203867_-qo1QU&akid=28016%2E1203867%2E-qo1QU

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=28016%2E1203867%2E-qo1QU

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

| Fellow Conservative,

Joe Biden forgave $400 BILLION in student loan debts. **But there 's a catch - he wants YOU to pay for it.**

That means millions of Americans who haven't gone to a college or university - or those who took out loans and worked their butts off to pay them back - will _pay for someone 's tuition to attend a gender studies class._

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Paul Ryan is trying to update his record
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=56%2E35263%2Ep3aalo ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Hey Peter,

Last week, we emailed you about a potential challenger to Tammy’s Senate
seat next year: Paul Ryan.

Over the past few months, he’s been publicly feuding with President Trump,
trying to separate his legacy and record from the disgraced former
president’s.

But we can’t forget the work Paul Ryan did to advance a far-right agenda
as Speaker of the House, including tax cuts for the wealthy, blocking
immigration reform, and threatening Social Security and Medicare.

In fact, Trump is even calling out Ron DeSantis for being a disciple of
Paul Ryan — which tells you how ultra-conservative Paul Ryan really is.
Being lumped in with *Ron DeSantis* is never a good sign.

[ http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1952?t=1004&akid=56%2E35263%2Ep3aalo ]We know that Paul Ryan has no place representing Wisconsin in elected
office ever again. Rush in $10 to keep Paul Ryan as far away from the
Senate as possible.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

Thanks, Peter.

— Team Baldwin

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Wisconsin Senate Update (via Tammy Baldwin for Senate)
Date: Friday, March 10, 2023
Subject: We won't forget Paul Ryan's Legacy
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Peter — You’ll never guess who is being named as a potential
Republican challenger to Tammy for the U.S. Senate.

Paul Ryan.

Remember him? He used to represent Wisconsin’s 1st Congressional District
in the House. He was the most conservative nominee for vice president in
over 100 years. He served as Speaker of the House — where he was
hand-picked by the radical right-wing House Freedom Caucus.

While in Congress, he worked to dismantle the Affordable Care Act,
supported anti-abortion legislation, tried to cut funding for Social
Security and Medicare, and embraced President Trump’s MAGA agenda.

And if you’re wondering what he’s been up to since leaving office, he
currently sits on the board of directors for Fox Corporation (you know,
the group that controls Fox News). He’s on tour promoting his new book,
trying to rewrite his record and distance himself from Trump.

Peter, we will never forget the work Paul Ryan did to uplift
Trump’s policies and raise taxes for hard-working Wisconsinites.

[ http://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1952?t=1011&akid=56%2E35263%2Ep3aalo ]Speculation or not, we have to keep Paul Ryan as far away from the U.S.
Senate as possible. Will you rush in $10 or any amount today to stop Paul
Ryan and support Tammy’s campaign?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/1953?t=1012&akid=56%2E35263%2Ep3aalo ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

body:
| | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, [please click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDC1zXjOgMKTq1qg9b7LMk8NY4biyiGBVJXIDelS7m60cKaXwQDfsi6wVlrlpGB5RcgfuIIHe6hd8iOGFvsd6XbH6bPGloasmPsNPOUCpYuDqjrfWXPulk7ACO8jglUSTg2RZFiiwTDS5Qe-wKPLOaqz3wBjQ2RxioBX7MridnrHqqKFJLoMH0M6jDfNXhxVACB9ZOPK6xjaWPhP3CRNXe8cLpa-c_mwYFOHLwaFJq5NaI81-bVYMty9ensM6cL_SM-yato18fD9VZqETIJq5aq_aVlgwkrUkxw9kIRkw92AcFRhXGj3nllAygNxk4seg5g/3uj/C0yfAF0xQbSLbjLDPtjpuw/h0/d3DjRhpBTZ4yVDRshvZApvfkc5XGp3m7K1ehDHSkWog) And if you have a moment, please read our message below.
---
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yDlvnM2jBW9sbXZMScUxaDDAZib5N3I5cZ-7Y6cDGksPKXTlKvsGpCXSzqyy_eJwH5WRhl4jsOTFLOdM1474NNcth7_S9sR22NmZndwJR3bG1-NqVEgUrJmdn_bVl-Jrc1MOYbdkCwHgiIwVim6KJqxOiEF-rq8tGKugK3D483Kv0D0d_FQJy_7WoU41lnRX1PFFHYgTXKC9ctFsBIptuoTf1puBILsgGG4KnYaKNKeWqfcjELWGOL1FdORryX5pk0hRrSugVMZoMpOIRcb44yrgXHrIgZGJ-znGQdZA2CR5IpFHgQYDS8oR4BK9mI4kqxX1mrxaLijaNxpg4OVV4-gzZJ4b8GU8zu28-OTlsXhaR6iZPxzUCekPb5-6lm1BY/3uj/C0yfAF0xQbSLbjLDPtjpuw/h1/Oagym0GydnjOghgXYYjSecwtZ-xLNkzTI1QHJfTBlPQ)
Folks, I wanted to follow up on yesterday's email from my team.

When we had the House in 2018 and 2020, our first order of business, literally our first, was to pass H.R. 1 – the _For the People Act._

This bill would have done a number of things to improve election security, modernize our elections, and increase access to the polls for all people, and yet...

The powers that be in the Senate, in Washington, and in GOP cloak rooms killed our bill. Not because it was bad policy or because of some substantive reason, **but because it challenged their power.**

Our bill would have FINALLY made critical changes to election finance laws, taking the power to decide elections out of the hands of the mega-rich, Wall Street, corporate America, and hand it right back where it belongs – to the people.

**But I’m not giving up on the For the People Act or the transformative change it promises to deliver – you can’t either, friend.
**
And as my team mentioned yesterday, the only tool we have to fight back now that we’re in the minority, is grassroots activists like you, friend. Without you, we have _no chance_ to take back the House and deliver on our bold agenda.

[**So with your help, and if you can – I’m asking you to chip in just a few dollars today to help my campaign raise $3,500 by the end of the weekend, and do your part to help elect House Democrats in 2024. »**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad1UPDKtbU9VdBnKa54UyDTE9qSPD6r46--IyW2nb-dkLhGoyKoZ1iyAHORqHTQtlqrXQp06Cq3NB_BO8i8Z7LGlp8l0N5LEadlvtLKTjHkUvN7LdXwSpuHR9MD9XtWxNM9PCYbjh4PCFPJ1dVeduQIcctNos0oys2_PUBCEUd1d3_NsMmsX9CvLr7UeWUVfGktDF9yPwAlavqRhAuno0zIIZK980zGNvu2BfNkpLDXq-gU6O_yNe6_nLcwxRcuY3d-Gt1Z0wfy-iTPDg-Z6JhANFTOm9JEuBGEWgbs0PwOWCujtQJYtDej9uvNKvdafHs5EptHKiE5kJF_b1w37RQGzaj_bvcWnHuVyalt_XEJt6jkeHXNMLaqHoeNbDkeQAKLSDdhV_BCjwjokNvUkrxoA/3uj/C0yfAF0xQbSLbjLDPtjpuw/h2/afMOWWOSbj2OPnLoHUgjr1v9OBC7i4SW3kiVJztygS0) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad1UPDKtbU9VdBnKa54UyDTE9qSPD6r46--IyW2nb-dkLhGoyKoZ1iyAHORqHTQtlqrXQp06Cq3NB_BO8i8Z7LGkecWBU6evr9Q4TH6oAsLFQVrfn_m0ZuxG8prBBZaqfYK0N5G8HuYeQK7RfBMTJj1iyeRqx6aZIi5tClSDR2x2ei4zvMPG8T7izLs8Od35HjteBXP-FOLp_seFPKAY66b4NlzVMq5Dw7J5LBz9Ff3BqJQ-IH_mHEIlMX6Ncb8ppJTqG4IGMcns0tkiUciXHHz2XqPadvurXSLZ5qLqqhYSrUglwLhQ5t1Bov-b4OvsISb49YMU4BMnm0Zy39hL7yKdcUDSa9n4T4d1vIR4mp0tjHrIjotAMitxlba1iVoOG_UW2ywfKrhUUYNK4-ElVoic-o-2F2WYKEQyk_QJsPUwT/3uj/C0yfAF0xQbSLbjLDPtjpuw/h3/VNwu1g8ZnQFH9qXlvFVVonViDPwWenz3LpWayV_mIFE)

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Folks, I wanted to follow up on yesterday's email from my team. When we had the House in 2018 and 2020, our first order of business, literally our first, was to pass H.R. 1 – the For the People Act. This bill would have done a number of things to improve election security, modernize our elections, and increase access to the polls for all people, and yet... The powers that be in the Senate, in Washington, and in GOP cloak rooms killed our bill. Not because it was bad policy or because of some substantive reason, but because it challenged their power. Our bill would have FINALLY made critical changes to election finance laws, taking the power to decide elections out of the hands of the mega-rich, Wall Street, corporate America, and hand it right back where it belongs – to the people. But I’m not giving up on the For the People Act or the transformative change it promises to deliver – you can’t either, friend. And as my team mentioned yesterday, the only tool we have to fight back now that we’re in the minority, is grassroots activists like you, friend. Without you, we have no chance to take back the House and deliver on our bold agenda. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | Thank you for helping our campaign, friend. I deeply appreciate it. | | Peter,

Those who abused our trust and locked down our schools and businesses now seem to want "amnesty" from their horrendous policy decisions. We cannot forget about what these people tried to do and the long-lasting implications.

Folks starved to death, killed themselves, and stopped caring about living; this isn’t about ‘forgive and forget,’ it’s about accountability! name: Senator Amanda Chase
subject: Senator Amanda Chase Wins the VCDL Debate!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Amanda Chase
body:
Voting Records Matter
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE March 16, 2023 Contact: Chris Farmer 804 912 6007
---
| Senator Chase Wins Tuesday Night's Virginia Citizens Defense League Debate
---
| 2A VOTING RECORDS MATTER
---
| Colonial Heights, VA \- Senator Amanda Chase was the clear winner at the VDCL Senate District 12 Debate that took place Thursday evening at the Colonial Heights American Legion Post 284.
"Senator Chase was the only candidate on the stage with a solid 8 year 100% uncompromising VCDL voting record that we can trust. Her knowledge of the questions was spot on. She nailed the answers. It is clear her opponents are both moderates and have no command or knowledge of most 2A questions that were asked. Senator Chase was also the only candidate that was carrying on stage. She has my vote," owner of TAC Solutions Dee Dee Van Buren.
"Senator Chase was the only candidate who answered the questions and was on point with her answers. She clearly showed her knowledge and expertise with every question that was asked, while her opponents could only answer questions generally," said owner of TAC Solutions Dave Van Buren.
Her opponent former State Senator Glen Sturtevant apologized for his bad 2A votes during his one term in the Senate to include voting for red flag laws. He apologized profusely and asked 2A supporters to give him a second chance.
During the debate, Sturtevant replied that he would give localities the ability to decide which schools could allow armed law enforcement. Senator Chase said she disagreed with Sturtevant and that she would allow any law abiding citizen to conceal carry under any circumstance and that the Constitution, not a locality should determine where individuals were allowed to carry for personal protection.
Her second opponent Tina Ramirez, who has no voting record on gun rights and has not been involved with the NRA or VCDL nor has she attended any of their rallies or gun shows, could only speculate that she would support gun rights. She also mentioned she was leaving for Iraq tomorrow. Some attendees asked how would she serve in the Senate if she is constantly out of the country for months. Senator Chase was the clear winner of this debate.
---
| "Voting records matter. Senator Amanda Chase is the only candidate and incumbent senator running in Senate District 12, which includes Chesterfield and Colonial Heights to receive a perfect lifetime score of 100% for all 8 years she's served in the Virginia Senate. Senator Chase has a proven track record of not only defending the 2nd Amendment, but actively working to repeal harmful gun control legislation passed between 2020 and 2022. We strongly encourage the 2A community to join us in supporting Senator Amanda Chase," Dave and Dee Dee VanBuren.
---
| Senator Chase responded, "I am humbled to receive the endorsement of Dave and DeeDee VanBuren, owners of TAC Solutions who train thousands of 2A supporters, not only in Senate District 12 but across Virginia.
---
| In case you missed the VCDL Virginia Citizens Defense League Senate District 12 Debate last night, Senator Chase won the debate hands down.
Senator Amanda Chase, voting record, lifetime 8 year 100% VCDL rating Glen Sturtevant, voting record, 96%, 93%, 80%, 88% ratings Tina Ramirez, no voting record
---
| Senator Amanda Chase 8 Year "Perfect" Pro-2A VOTING RECORD
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| Most Proven 2A Choice for Senate District 12
---
| Re-elect Senator Amanda Chase to SD12 (Chesterfield and Colonial Heights)
---

| 2023 2A Legislation introduced by Senator Chase: SB806 Repeal gun free zones by localities Control of firearms by localities. Removes the authority for a locality by ordinance to prohibit the possession or carrying of firearms, ammunition, or components or any combination thereof in (i) any building, or part thereof, owned or used by such locality for governmental purposes; (ii) any public park owned or operated by the locality; (iii) any recreation or community center facility; or (iv) any public street, road, alley, or sidewalk or public right-of-way or any other place of whatever nature that is open to the public and is being used by or is adjacent to a permitted event or an event that would otherwise require a permit. The bill provides that any firearm received by the locality pursuant to a buy-back program shall be offered for sale by public auction or sealed bids to a person licensed as a dealer. Current law provides that any such firearm shall be destroyed by the locality unless the person surrendering the firearm requests in writing that the firearm be offered for sale. The bill also limits the authority of localities to bring lawsuits against certain firearms manufacturers and others and further provides that the right to bring any such action is reserved exclusively to the Commonwealth and shall be brought by the Attorney General. 2022 2A Legislation introduced by Senator Chase: SB74 Repeal of Gun Free Zones by Localities Control of firearms by localities. Removes the authority for a locality by ordinance to prohibit the possession or carrying of firearms, ammunition, or components or any combination thereof in (i) any building, or part thereof, owned or used by such locality for governmental purposes; (ii) any public park owned or operated by the locality; (iii) any recreation or community center facility; or (iv) any public street, road, alley, or sidewalk or public right-of-way or any other place of whatever nature that is open to the public and is being used by or is adjacent to a permitted event or an event that would otherwise require a permit. The bill provides that any firearm received by the locality pursuant to a buy-back program shall be offered for sale by public auction or sealed bids to a person licensed as a dealer. Current law provides that any such firearm shall be destroyed by the locality unless the person surrendering the firearm requests in writing that the firearm be offered for sale. SB75 Repeal of Gun Free Zones at the State Capitol and State Buildings Carrying a firearm or explosive material within Capitol Square and the surrounding area, into building owned or leased by the Commonwealth, etc.; penalty. Repeals the prohibition on carrying a firearm or explosive material within (i) the Capitol of Virginia; (ii) Capitol Square and the surrounding area; (iii) any building owned or leased by the Commonwealth or any agency thereof; or (iv) any office where employees of the Commonwealth or any agency thereof are regularly present for the purpose of performing their official duties. Current law makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person to carry a firearm or explosive material within these areas, subject to certain exceptions, including the following individuals while acting in the conduct of such person's official duties: any law-enforcement officer, any authorized security personnel, any active military personnel, any fire marshal when such fire marshal has been granted police powers, or any member of a cadet corps while such member is participating in an official ceremonial event for the Commonwealth. SB1009 If a state or locality creates a gun free zone they lose their sovereign immunity. Firearm-free zones designated by the Commonwealth or a locality; regulation of weapons; waiver of sovereign immunity. Provides that (i) if the Commonwealth designates any property owned by it as a firearm-free zone or (ii) if any locality designates such locality or any part of such locality as a firearm-free zone, the Commonwealth or such locality waives its sovereign immunity as it relates to any injuries sustained by persons lawfully present in such firearm-free zone. The bill further provides that if the Commonwealth or a locality adopts any ordinance, rule, policy, or regulation regulating weapons, the Commonwealth or locality assumes an affirmative duty to protect invitees lawfully on the premises of the Commonwealth or locality and establishes a waiver of sovereign immunity for any governmental entity or official responsible for such regulation.
2019 2A Legislation Introduced by Senator Chase: SB1012 Allows Firefighters and EMS to Conceal Carry when they're on duty Carrying a concealed handgun; firefighters and emergency medical services providers. Provides that any firefighter or person employed as emergency medical services personnel may carry a concealed handgun while engaged in the performance of his official duties, provided that such firefighter or person employed as emergency medical services personnel has been approved to carry a concealed handgun by his fire chief or emergency medical services chief. The bill requires the Department of Criminal Justice Services, in consultation with the Office of Emergency Medical Services of the Department of Health and the Department of Fire Programs, to develop a model policy regarding carrying a concealed handgun for firefighters and emergency medical services personnel. SB1422 Reduces fee for getting a conceal handgun permit Local law enforcement; fees for concealed handgun permits; courthouse and courtroom security; assessment. Eliminates (i) the fee, under current law up to $35, that a local law-enforcement agency is permitted to charge for conducting the background investigation for a concealed handgun permit and (ii) the requirement that the local law-enforcement agency forward to the State Police any amount assessed by the FBI for providing criminal history record information in the background investigation. The bill makes discretionary the current mandatory fee of up to $10 charged by the clerk for processing a concealed handgun permit application or issuing a permit. The bill increases from $10 to $20 the maximum amount, designated solely to fund courthouse and courtroom security, that a local governing body may assess against a convicted defendant as part of the costs in a criminal or traffic case in district or circuit court. [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?171+sum+SB1422](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DCCxXxayahrznaDVpaJfK6VYF0Of0-kIG1_QWjvPvt50cbrRYzLN4eodw_wTxlwikOt06Ny7E6C-CuiJO_oH3zQdWO0mkO0Je_ReOHkJ0XRK7fXIWDu-1agcJr9dH1-QI5XOUlXjqpJC8bQN5PwJYaxDsmTHzLdwSL34aOiweR2qHRheMzzF10Rlee62RAM367MJiQgFvNo=&c=tKeIbbqjSC9hlWL6yt7wZaSXDG9Uv1vpyWOQT1bLYM8vUnftYqm9kg==&ch=6-xzF6Y1Tp2Dx21H-DfMp9dxApvMW_uT8bLiOmUTmSnUi7bwapIrvw==)

SB616 Reciprocity with other states Out-of-state concealed handgun permits; photo identification. Removes certain requirements for an out-of-state concealed handgun permit or license to be recognized and accepted in Virginia and instead requires an out-of-state permit or license holder to carry a government-issued photo identification and present his permit or license and such identification upon demand by a law-enforcement officer in order for his out-of-state permit or license to be recognized and accepted in Virginia. This bill was incorporated into [SB 610.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DCCxXxayahrznaDVpaJfK6VYF0Of0-kIG1_QWjvPvt50cbrRYzLN4eodw_wTxlwiMl8g0Cp5wezVUBUw_M52f_Kz51pAQI-vDg7G1k_RJRvxA7HvSANeJRsW0D9D_0KrhO9Tg_2MFv0z86emO_DaZeIgn2I87PBInlT1tzH1bE3e38O7dufW2PQf0e2G6stJ5-MOokQ9VCw=&c=tKeIbbqjSC9hlWL6yt7wZaSXDG9Uv1vpyWOQT1bLYM8vUnftYqm9kg==&ch=6-xzF6Y1Tp2Dx21H-DfMp9dxApvMW_uT8bLiOmUTmSnUi7bwapIrvw==) [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?161+sum+SB616](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DCCxXxayahrznaDVpaJfK6VYF0Of0-kIG1_QWjvPvt50cbrRYzLN4eodw_wTxlwi9lh4lFBtTIbJaUL2F02AHyst_x36OaAI7Rfc0G78VqeacjlhdnTe3v10Do66f5mENPSRDVDgMh22VfLeEWwETr6Y2Rvrkw5dWkzDyw8wStq7K_7h_skZpq7jvauum6d7SPXXbTNxsrY=&c=tKeIbbqjSC9hlWL6yt7wZaSXDG9Uv1vpyWOQT1bLYM8vUnftYqm9kg==&ch=6-xzF6Y1Tp2Dx21H-DfMp9dxApvMW_uT8bLiOmUTmSnUi7bwapIrvw==) PASSED & SIGNED INTO LAW
SB677 Reduce fees to get a conceal carry permit Fees for concealed handgun permits. Makes the $10 fee that the clerk of court is now required to charge for processing a concealed handgun permit application or issuing a concealed handgun permit discretionary with the clerk.
